name: The Democrats
subject: January 18, 2025.
body:
---
Since Election Day, we’ve received thousands of small-dollar, individual donations from Democrats all over the country who are ready to keep fighting. Today is the day we’re asking you to join them. Here’s why: In just a few days, Trump will be inaugurated as our next president. He already has a Republican Congress ready to do his bidding. We need to be prepared for _anything,_ including harmful executive orders, attempts to rip health care away from millions of our friends and neighbors, and the worst parts of Project 2025 becoming our new normal. At the same time, our work is not just about fighting back against Trump and his allies. It’s about building long-term infrastructure to help elect as many Democrats as possible — this year, next year, and beyond. January 18, 2025. That’s today. With so much on the line and so much work to do, we’re asking you to make your first contribution to the Democratic Party today. [**You can use this link to pitch in, and we’ll put your contribution to work immediately as we prepare for Trump’s inauguration and build our long-term strategy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250118_2564_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2564_22930333_7wKaT8&akid=2564%2E22930333%2E7wKaT8) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250118_2564_fr&refcode2=2564_22930333_7wKaT8&akid=2564%2E22930333%2E7wKaT8)**

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: Please read this Special Election message BEFORE early voting ends:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Early voting JUST BEGAN for his primary and I was proud to endorse him for this can’t-lose seat.

| |
---
| | | Hey - I'll make this email short and sweet.

MAGA Patriot Jimmy Patronis is running in FL-01's Special Election to fill Matt Gaetz's seat. **Early voting JUST BEGAN for his primary and I was proud to endorse him for this can 't-lose seat.**

This is our first real test since Republicans won the House, Senate, and White House so it'll take every single one of us to keep that momentum going.

That's why I'm following up. _I 'm humbly asking you one last time to read Jimmy's message BEFORE early voting ends:_
| | [*** CLICK THIS SPECIAL ELECTION MESSAGE ***](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=2e552115c56040408a09c5f021adcb56&_e=pMK13ba0RXqhTiagc9SEV6NQlHlmvENCN7RrEmt7uV3_UrEONTpnDF9E1DslAFpFEBUXh5GRxn3pZypQYoGCGKY78PXmf97cVi9zSlZDbUxPTDKICcDXVS_nVYKJW4nH_tJErzLoS0cSN1JuOOZD-B23LIY_uvfL-dYSbW6RD4iTa7U_LqXInVvgW0hMR6i3aD8qnW8Qu3tfA-AsS3qII5FboORTFcfdyvNBzmz1Hyw5IVp-dTpAq8V5CU5iLPu336FWMImB0ogts99rzVdgWRv3nA3NR9AvfDKJ5QUWo6Vq14YJAhV0dGSBm6t44nYEBwqVUQM2sExi2xSzCuY-4qQQV-E_D7FpJf61qereya43pVZzaaWMz028q4-bSMHwvvJsib2NRF-fK9Fobg5dwSgQIe_N1zg9o6TTd-BRJG1OJoiMRrV23H54QaBeBLp5ni-YhpvtgXcliaNcZsZEIfxq-4s0N42J9LktuTK7aLCx-TnGbFvnAoIcENP77TCv "*** CLICK THIS SPECIAL ELECTION MESSAGE ***")

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: 🚨🚨🚨 these three open House seats ---->
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]

Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: ALERT FROM TRUMP
subject: 24 hours left!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
I need your response before my rally begins.

In just 4 days, America First fighter JD Vance will make history as the first millennial and first Marine Corps veteran to become Vice President of the United States.

clean_body: Peter, In just 4 days, America First fighter JD Vance will make history as the first millennial and first Marine Corps veteran to become Vice President of the United States. We couldn't be more excited for President Trump and JD to Make America Great again, but there's just one problem: Rumor has it, far-Left politician Sherod Brown might even run in the special election, which would be a NIGHTMARE for our Trump Senate Caucus. President Trump and JD Vance are counting on a strong Majority in the Senate to enact their agenda over the next four years. But if we fail to defend Ohio, there's almost of passing crucial legislation to save our country. DEADLINE: ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** Thank you, NRSC HQ ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Today I was sworn in at the heart of the district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
Earlier this month, I had the privilege of standing on the U.S. House floor and officially becoming your CA-12's new Congresswoman.
Today, Friend, was even more momentous.
I was officially sworn in right here in Oakland, the heart of our district, surrounded by the community that made this moment possible.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_011825_swornin-oakland [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_011825_swornin-oakland]
Right now, I am filled with immense pride in the Bay Area. Having lived here, fought for justice, and advocated for our community for years, I now have the profound honor of directly representing CA-12 in the halls of Congress. This is personal.
As we celebrate this victory, we also know that challenges lie ahead. On Monday, a new administration takes office — one that presents a stark contrast to the values we hold dear here in the Bay Area.
But Friend, today, as I was officially sworn into the district, looking around at the beautiful people that make up Oakland, I was reminded: the Bay Area is special. Not just for its beauty, its innovation, or its diversity, but because of the people here — the fighters, the dreamers, the warriors for justice. This place has always been a home for those who believe in a better future and a more just and compassionate world. I am committed to continuing the legacy of leaders like Barbara Lee, whose courage and vision built the foundation of everything we stand for.
Together, we will rise above these dark forces. We’ve faced challenges before, but this community has never backed down, and we won’t start now.
Will you chip in today to send a powerful message that we’re ready to fight for the future CA-12 deserves? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_011825_swornin-oakland]
If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_011825_swornin-oakland [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-swearingin?refcode=X_011825_swornin-oakland] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: Our Neighbors Need Our Help!
body:
Donation Drive Tomorrow

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bfad85655d68/our-neighbors-need-our-help?e=7b1b739a89)
---
| | | | |
# Our Neighbors Need Our Help!
# Donation Drive Tomorrow
---
| Dear Friend,
I hope this message finds you well! I'm reaching out to remind you about our donation drive tomorrow, where we have the opportunity to make a real impact on families affected by the Eaton Fire.
**Event Details:****\- Date: Sunday, January 19th****\- Time: 12 PM - 3 PM****\- Location: Pasadena Unified School District****351 S Hudson Street, Pasadena, CA 91101**
You can drive up, donate your items, and leave—it's that simple! Your contributions of blankets, clothes, diapers, hygiene products, pet food, and other essentials will directly help those in need. If you’d like to offer financial support, please use this [_**Donation link.**_](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=27a82fa1aa&e=7b1b739a89)
Together, let's show our community the power of compassion and generosity. Your participation can truly change lives. Thank you for being a part of this effort!
Best,
Asif
---
[Donate Now!](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=fa0ae114ed&e=7b1b739a89)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aeaea72f-d3b4-41ef-aeda-88f48f34702d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thanks, Lynne Boecher, for snapping a photo while I spoke at the Women's March in Glen's Falls on Jan 18, 2025
Huddled with blankets and cats on what would otherwise be a wonderful winter evening, I listen to the final chirps from my daughter's Tik Tok app. She has prepared for Tik Tok to go dark by downloading her content and other favorite videos.
At this moment, a video is explaining the importance of carrying documentation with you if you are an immigrant. Know your rights. What can you do? What must you do?
In my circle of friends, a small-talk question in the last few days has been, "Are you going to watch the Inauguration?" Most respond with something about ratings. A few are dedicating the day to service in honor of the Rev. Martin Luther King.
I honestly cannot fully process the mash-up of events and cultural moments.
We're at an inflection point. That's 21st century American progressive-speak for "WTF"? ("What's to Follow"?)
The community of people who marched today at the Crandall Library in Glens Falls, New York, suited up and showed up. We're tired. We're disappointed. But, as we have done so many other times, we raised our voices, and lifted our signs, and put one foot in front of the other to move the cause one step further.
We're not going back.
What do we want? Justice!
When do we want it? Now!

_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. Donations are much appreciated. Checks can be sent to Paula Collins for Congress; 441 Old State Road, DeKalb Junction, NY 13630, or click these words to: [visit ActBlue](https://substack.com/redirect/e4add61d-9387-4fef-8ffa-2c8e44cd2c9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). name: Kirk Cameron
subject: You'll want this in your home in 2025
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zko81vkidi42d3tk3ge7nh0ehna44rbam6riivso_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj6clh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4a7tgr4tt1gubbos8pprmimo1b5tncn0t639s3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj6clh2bs)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9fn9v4j7dr6omudfop5ffh4j9rgcg14d6ogdia0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj6clh2bs) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zepv55ha22g2p20arf0tfu7a36p91gr95ivhab98_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj6clh2bs)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zae67htoblogual2j1bg322smim4n47jbc4gi5jo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj6clh2bs)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0o2nnhaduq1ebfb6u514efhiva8e6a7vd004lrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj6clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4cptfp8tgnqr00morv1205gqgfqnksm75mpojno_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj6clh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[**Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfpm1psln7hdf2kkhqjm7ihcvi69p7lshiod4ob8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj6clh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zcq3r8mcaacs626fp49q7t0u0igolgggi2838apg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj6clh2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

National Republican Polling
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znjrk7a05b2o3tao534bviq83uhoc2sokv8a3j48_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36cjg60pj4c8gq48bi4bh28pr6cth6epr2cpim49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdgubp4d1u52n36qs3jbj3ur397uai9jif3rhtj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj6clh2bs)_

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr00om985f50clarij64q50pjmu1i8ql13rhj9to_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cth6epr2cpim49fg)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: I want to send you a “47” hat
body:
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION “47” hat

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zubtqs6d27guqgjubb7u68h523mdi2cjta1f82rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj2cjh2bs)
---
Friend, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Friend, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President-elect's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8pod380pon104hiihmcuk6q2d0ub7e9mlfb4220_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj2cjh2bs)
---
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president-elect: DONALD TRUMP. _**[_**All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again in the year ahead!**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpfn6aadb5g5t6299ltsffsc52ohnepvqavhrd1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj2cjh2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze52m0uf416kappt3sp7qhhepav8v5uhqvut3t70_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj2cjh2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z694lia90dllk13i6kqdjgkte7pqjd3tlh78k1bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj2cjh2bs)
---
Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA:
* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

* **Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content** -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND

* **Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again** , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25!

But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! _**[Please, friend, make your gift of any amount today to help Turning Point USA make MILLIONS MORE kids LOVE AMERICA again, and I'll send YOU a limited-edition "47" hat as my personal thanks.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zu7s5epbt7js785b1s51asibrjqk3al0lb54j1vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj2cjh2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zttpa0fvavcb5p7pq3m7h4ebgnddejkhdbms88q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj2cjh2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the "Woke" Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country's way of life again! Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO

Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA: Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states, Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25! But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! ** Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: You'll want this in your home in 2025
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1q70uco1i31grc9an0eaigu87484tdv5oo3cuco_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdt91dun28np2kn3surbo6fknta0t38g5iklrd7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze7o5hcmskvl4tpn4g1au5q4h1nlmsmn1n0tlf40_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9dgv4sb6e2p41d4gdf629q7fc4tvi5v10e1dcq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvhbfedsdqia3gik3a9tj9go64is609miaikpcg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3jlm6fhfupusplj6l1hddfccphkva4rq1jnmq7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za6epvdau95dfdsc6nuasbrv3f9peolsrttakut8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[**Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrdomvfctij35jvc8ffahnrijnoh2fufc6trr3ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlc6tl395o0jnn4oq0fslvdt1fa9fde6e1met3rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8nqr3qv3lurd3qqnl0rpl4mu0ag2gshf49j3b48_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshj69o30cpim48d245p25oh4ctj6eoj7cth62o324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zljn77bk81k8jj7ndm4jqerfctcq9m4vo0iltah8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkk7k5uhm95u8efblqkmnr7qtqnpltetc8eatar8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6cth6epr2c5g649fg)

name: NEW! NEW! NEW!
subject: Good morning, America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
What we need today...

|
---
| | | Friend - our new GOP Majority is just hitting the ground running and we have a critical window of opportunity to restore America's strength and security on the world stage. **But the radical Left will stop at nothing to undermine our efforts and put our nation at risk.**

That's why we need your input now. We're launching a **[BRAND-NEW House GOP National Security Survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk637fm7oe74s5812ijfq1256t6me3dqmglkb9co_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs "BRAND-NEW House GOP National Security Survey")** to inform our leaders' decisions on the most pressing issues facing our nation, from border security to terrorism and beyond.

**NEEDED TODAY:** Before the Radical Left makes a mockery of our democracy, House GOP leaders need your critical input in our **[BRAND-NEW House GOP National Security Survey.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhtmkhpalifs6j8p3aftj1skp2b98csdl0dkhnfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs "BRAND-NEW House GOP National Security Survey.")** Your feedback will be a crucial factor in shaping the future of our national security strategy and ensuring that our country is protected from emerging threats.

We must act now to ensure that our nation's security is not compromised.

---
| | [BEGIN WITH QUESTION #1](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zri7r4jgr3i18bpalsfshvnio1bkjhcc2j1m41d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs "BEGIN WITH QUESTION #1")
---

_Estimated time to complete: 2 minutes_

---
| |

name: Special Election Update (Urgent)
subject: It’s all about Ohio in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
And thwart the MAGA agenda

Friend,

In just 4 days, America First fighter JD Vance will make history as the first millennial and first Marine Corps veteran to become Vice President of the United States.

We couldn't be more excited for President Trump and JD to Make America Great again, but there's just one problem: **[In 2026, there will be a hotly contested special election in Ohio to fill the Senate seat JD is vacating, and Democrats are sure to spend MILLIONS to try and buy the election.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2s7c540f2g9forf8r3ejfr35h1scflbcovuqvr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)**
_Rumor has it, far-Left politician Sherod Brown might even run in the special election, which would be a NIGHTMARE for our Trump Senate Caucus._
President Trump and JD Vance are counting on a strong Majority in the Senate to enact their agenda over the next four years. But if we fail to defend Ohio, there's almost **[no chance](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi4tjq4mfc5e2njn02s373r6j6r691a8un0pq0oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)** of passing crucial legislation to save our country.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z32kd4qbvds67r7d2d9ogrsb1ardq5usvnikg7fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zooriao0gpa55enkqeliogafd4qnqd7d9m17qteo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z86cg86tlh5528pjitont1i0nn7p1se8a6515m58_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6lhlrquh7i6pthrcgm6ef6g5v31v616439gd9ug_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj4s1g6cpj246h22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0tt3s90lq1vb5nuni3anhdgcrso8a6mq816mob0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zde8e851irjrevfs9hl7tadsc53pen9ndrdjhabo_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj1c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
That means we have less than a day to BLOW our Inauguration Day goal out of the water

| |
---
| | |
* * *
**-- OFFICIAL NOTICE --**
* * *

_President Trump's inauguration is just 24 hours from now! _

That means we have less than a day to hit our Pre-Inauguration Donor Goal for defending President Trump's top allies in Congress. **Unfortunately, we are only 58.4% of the way there.**

_**[That's why we have organized an emergency Pre-Inauguration donor goal to hit 100,000 donors in the next 24 hours. And we need everyone to chip in and do their part to help us reach it.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6j36cfo9tilfguqg6nii5gno10iu0mftm337ij0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj2cjh2bs "That’s why we have organized an emergency Pre-Inauguration donor goal to make sure we hit 100,000 donors in the next 24 hours. And we need everyone to chip in and do their part to help us reach it.")**_

* * *
**Pre-Inauguration Donor Goal**

Progress: **58,400 of 100,000 Donors**
Deadline: **1/20 @ 12:00 PM (ET)**
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z80bugecbdqou19kjus20rnmqgck4m0v5rqc6g7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj2cjh2bs "CHIP IN NOW")
---
* * *

We need you to step up and chip in now so we have the resources to launch grassroots campaigns, mobilize our supporters, and make sure our voices are heard all around Washington. _Every single dollar you give will go directly toward these efforts. _

But the clock is ticking and the success of our House Majority depends on our ENTIRE grassroots base. That's why we need your help.

_**[So with only 24 hours left, will you donate now and help us start Inauguration Day with a bang?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhp7vm240nk37ooui7gesga6kncsqp94vjb2etio_rp22sh2s8i6epj7c9jmeoj2cjh2bs "So with only 24 hours until our deadline hits, will you donate now and help us start Inauguration Day with a bang?")**_

_Anything you can chip in truly helps and please know we are beyond grateful for every dollar you give. _

Thank you,

House Conservatives

President Donald J. Trump is hosting his HUGE Make America Great Again Victory Rally today in Washington, D.C.! Before he takes the stage this afternoon, I am setting a goal to gather 470,000 names on my official Trump endorsement record in honor of Donald Trump’s inauguration this week, where he will be officially sworn in as our 47th President! Due to your incredible record of support throughout this entire election cycle, I want to give YOU the exclusive opportunity to be the very first name on this list and I’ve even left a space where you can leave a message for me to share directly with his team. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=0e3567399ebf36c8edac5b9f3739b1ea19ae1a20ca071fbef212592010c4b21b5015a57c0d4668519e6cb6a37f355a0db6db095394375c7f40c26d8df72ecdd2 I’ll be reviewing all the responses personally, so please use your personal link to submit anything you want me to keep top of mind the next time I speak with the President! | | Hello Reader, Are you in search of a state-of-the-art camera that offers discreet surveillance, high-quality footage, and the convenience of portability? Look no further! Gunner Gear is thrilled to present our latest addition: **The Spy Cam**. **Pocket-Sized Powerhouse** : Gone are the days when surveillance cameras were bulky and noticeable. Our Spy Cam is designed to fit snugly in your pocket. It's WiFi-enabled and crafted for discretion, ensuring that you have the power of surveillance right at your fingertips, anytime, anywhere. **Crystal-Clear, Day & Night**: With full HD imaging, an expansive 170° field of view, and night vision capabilities, you can trust the Spy Cam to capture every detail with unmatched precision. Whether it's daytime or nighttime, you'll never miss a moment. **Smart Features for the Smart User** : Enjoy the perks of motion detection and loop recording to always stay on top of what's happening in your surroundings. And with its compact size, it seamlessly blends into any environment, making it the ultimate tool for discreet surveillance. **Special Launch Offer!** : Because we appreciate you, we're giving our loyal customers an exclusive opportunity to be among the first to own the Spy Cam. [Order now and get a whopping 50% off!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19890/6374453/9fe255b811e6aafd8eec39ffa3d9430afd99f258/292bd963d5ac8d23c87cd00ea7574fe9dfa96387) This offer won't last long, so don’t miss out. The Spy Cam is more than just a camera; it's a testament to the future of surveillance. Whether you’re safeguarding your home, capturing life's moments, or looking after your valuables, we've got you covered. Upgrade your surveillance game with the Spy Cam, and embrace the future of security, today. [Order the Spy Cam Now & Save 50%](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19890/6374453/9fe255b811e6aafd8eec39ffa3d9430afd99f258/292bd963d5ac8d23c87cd00ea7574fe9dfa96387) **Best regards,

~John, _GunnerGear.com_** _**Disclaimer:** Please use the Spy Cam responsibly and ensure that you respect privacy laws and regulations in your region._

body:

With confirmation hearings officially underway, Senate Democrats are in FULL ATTACK MODE, slandering President-Elect Trump's nominees like Pete Hegseth, Kristi Noem, and Pam Bondi.

name: Brandon Gill
subject: Will you co-sponsor the Remain in Mexico Act?
body:
This will be transformative.

undefined
| | | | |
---
%recipient.first% – I just introduced my very first bill:
**[The Remain in Mexico Act](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9QeV/?__vbtrk=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
Let me be blunt, this might be the most important fight of our generation.
[ACT NOW: BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR OF THE REMAIN IN MEXICO ACT](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9QeV/?__vbtrk=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Why? **Because Democrats have declared WAR on our border.**
They have openly aligned themselves with the same interests as _**criminal drug cartels**_ , _**foreign governments trafficking poison and humans into our country**_ , and _**terror cells that lie in wait**_ , embedding themselves in our nation through an open border.
Under President Trump’s leadership, we had a strong border. The Remain in Mexico policy WORKED:
* Fewer illegal crossings.
* Fewer fraudulent asylum claims
* More deportations of dangerous criminals.

But then, in 2021, the Biden Administration took over, and what did they do?
**They gutted EVERYTHING.**
They opened our border wide for the cartels...They enabled human trafficking... They invited chaos into our cities.
_**_[ENOUGH IS ENOUGH](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9QeV/?__vbtrk=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**_
The Remain in Mexico Act is our first step to take back control... But allow me to state the obvious:
**Democrats won’t give up their open-border obsession without a fight.**
That’s why I need YOU in this battle.
America is at a breaking point and I need **AS MANY PATRIOTIC AMERICANS AS I CAN GET** to become **CITIZEN CO-SPONSORS** of my **Remain in Mexico Act**.
**__[Will you help me secure our border and STOP this madness](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9QeV/?__vbtrk=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?_**
[ACT NOW: BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR OF THE REMAIN IN MEXICO ACT](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9QeV/?__vbtrk=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Together, we can make our voices heard loud and clear: We will not tolerate an open border, and the death and destruction that comes with it.
_**_[Will you step up before it’s too late](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9QeV/?__vbtrk=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_?**_
Yours Sincerely,
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9QeV/?__vbtrk=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Congressman Brandon Gill
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9QeV/?__vbtrk=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcwNjQ1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

| Peter, We’re just a day away from Trump’s inauguration, and we all know he and his MAGA cronies in Congress will go to work immediately stripping our reproductive rights, limiting access to Medicaid and Social Security, and launching mass deportation programs that risk trapping American citizens. But there is still hope – and that comes from Democrats in state and local offices fighting back against the Trump administration. | Trump is going to need help from other politicians, like governors and state legislators, to enact some of his more extreme policy ideas – like his plans to use ICE and law enforcement to deport EVERY undocumented immigrant. Democrats can pose a big challenge if they push back on attempts to subvert our democracy. But to do so, we need to make sure there are as many Democrats in office as possible over the next four years so we can have majorities in states around the country. This year and next year, THOUSANDS of positions are up for grabs – so we need to invest TODAY in Democratic candidates to turn the tides. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: JW
subject: Giant MAGA attack on my district - good sign??
body:
If he was a shoo-in, MAGA wouldn’t need to pump millions into the district.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GHA6RyFtGqebyekgQSJ8MnMNrq2tQveSy6_3Al-0uYQvob-c9ogGSs6HUQjL_PaiBFq4X3nATleJIHaNMVSiBalp0kZKATZ42HiEzxEISNRsYCLr8fElNcXmLV5ILIB2pNowaDW4A2EmtBFkds3Row9Qhhcnq2PyhXc6Ti3ejGYi7o1nQOsjDgWAv2_idzXDCg_P42BtW9usKzS2GJt9YTuxAOmqKEZ_-ZODfybei_Q=&c=f3VbgplxJ_CU6x6NmHErudQ_-BXDKB-uFGJevakN7GahHT4a1HR6ug==&ch=_tfonHj5mqEp5SfNmvTjZ7VYkFe6SvYfNy_AeaZgX3tFB2uYiqVtlQ==)
---
| | | | Team,
As you know, I am the Democrat running in the FL-06 Special Election which is set to take place on April 1st.
Whereas in most normal special elections for vacant Congressional seats, the Governor in the state will give campaigns an average of six months to build their campaigns and introduce themselves to voters.
Florida's Governor Ron DeSantis has compressed this window into around 4 months to give us the shortest amount of time to build out our campaign while the MAGA movement dumps tens of millions into our district, saturating it with ads in hopes of shooing in their ultra MAGA pick: Randy Fine.
Yesterday the full frontal MAGA assault on my district entered its newest phase. A pro-Trump super PAC began flooding our district with this ad in support of our opponent:
---
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GHA6RyFtGqebyekgQSJ8MnMNrq2tQveSy6_3Al-0uYQvob-c9ogGSs6HUQjL_Paiq3W-2Ta5AI0F-zZAy4m4pK1CTSaJxxJtRMNfS7iJD9NTD15XX3QffsKt1nlnNsrJN3xct70SCDmzbY0TUEL37m9OR5IxvwY6wWM6NceLbDikylmyLeoCsXKy7113N1-M7UcC8--agEG45iCHMQkdqln8-YsvaYOo&c=f3VbgplxJ_CU6x6NmHErudQ_-BXDKB-uFGJevakN7GahHT4a1HR6ug==&ch=_tfonHj5mqEp5SfNmvTjZ7VYkFe6SvYfNy_AeaZgX3tFB2uYiqVtlQ==)
---
| The ad that Defend American Jobs - a MAGA aligned super PAC began running in my district yesterday.
These ads are beyond critical to my opponent's path to victory because no one in this district knows him. He is a carpetbagging Casino mogul from South Florida.
If he was a true shoo-in, MAGA would keep its powder dry and wouldn't feel the need to pump millions into this district. The fact that they are having to saturate the district in ads to save their candidate, is extremely promising for us but only if we can keep up with their spends in the 73 days left until E-Day.
So far we are rolling with the punches and are closing in on having raised $500,000 since we began fundraising in late December but we need to scale up faster.
---
| | | | If just 1 out of every 20 people we send this email to donate $5 we could raise 100k off of a single email and run more of our own ads to keep up. [Can you help us keep up with the dark money pro-MAGA PACs flooding this race by making a donation of $5 or more?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GHA6RyFtGqebyekgQSJ8MnMNrq2tQveSy6_3Al-0uYQvob-c9ogGSs6HUQjL_PaiE-3xZd403FkjML23qCho4QvPhPgKe1Mpfbg_qYlqDukkBt01S4zdY-8ppUM-eXoqtIb_VrPBkmRdaVjmD2r_ywNyE08W1W_D_V6mHugbarM7s0pv6YyCNU3MLM7DLscu3L5-L8G3PKkev4czeCEmW1LxO8XzuywmO1TgMpgLboHVR25h9V0UJA==&c=f3VbgplxJ_CU6x6NmHErudQ_-BXDKB-uFGJevakN7GahHT4a1HR6ug==&ch=_tfonHj5mqEp5SfNmvTjZ7VYkFe6SvYfNy_AeaZgX3tFB2uYiqVtlQ==)
---
| | | | | [Donate $5 now >>](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GHA6RyFtGqebyekgQSJ8MnMNrq2tQveSy6_3Al-0uYQvob-c9ogGSs6HUQjL_PaiE-3xZd403FkjML23qCho4QvPhPgKe1Mpfbg_qYlqDukkBt01S4zdY-8ppUM-eXoqtIb_VrPBkmRdaVjmD2r_ywNyE08W1W_D_V6mHugbarM7s0pv6YyCNU3MLM7DLscu3L5-L8G3PKkev4czeCEmW1LxO8XzuywmO1TgMpgLboHVR25h9V0UJA==&c=f3VbgplxJ_CU6x6NmHErudQ_-BXDKB-uFGJevakN7GahHT4a1HR6ug==&ch=_tfonHj5mqEp5SfNmvTjZ7VYkFe6SvYfNy_AeaZgX3tFB2uYiqVtlQ==)
---
| | | | | [Donate another amount >>](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GHA6RyFtGqebyekgQSJ8MnMNrq2tQveSy6_3Al-0uYQvob-c9ogGSs6HUQjL_PaiNvDfHtJDrFPcfW1X9W-xhTllgwnh797sUUZT7qvzdq9ICLKevWRo98vb95JQtdGsEnsM-EmtpCZsoLgKVBgn6TtTe96nHjUU08NDw2asQIm2ptacfv4Xip_LzQ9mB2pzuAhCXlgfCAsoU1Th6bx8dpaLkQlSwJMw&c=f3VbgplxJ_CU6x6NmHErudQ_-BXDKB-uFGJevakN7GahHT4a1HR6ug==&ch=_tfonHj5mqEp5SfNmvTjZ7VYkFe6SvYfNy_AeaZgX3tFB2uYiqVtlQ==)
---
| | | | [Or multiply your impact with a monthly recurring donation!](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GHA6RyFtGqebyekgQSJ8MnMNrq2tQveSy6_3Al-0uYQvob-c9ogGSs6HUQjL_PaiaVTQJ8oO2Wz9btxErpTXsfqjkDNE3kvv0Ll4YLxytWsn86kEElHC6BW-WHoAutA_-xjYd3DJDkq83RtazE9fNHYfivktym75gMyFf0z9IhKpYYC3U7dHFglR3uH1RMcruQHBcJIbSyRAB9WVfia4v7ATaV-lGAPn2G1zww0itflHyfLUzyiPig==&c=f3VbgplxJ_CU6x6NmHErudQ_-BXDKB-uFGJevakN7GahHT4a1HR6ug==&ch=_tfonHj5mqEp5SfNmvTjZ7VYkFe6SvYfNy_AeaZgX3tFB2uYiqVtlQ==)
---
| | | | That MAGA needs to flood the airwaves so early on in this race is a good sign for us - with your support we'll soon be flooding the airwaves with ads of our own.
Have a great weekend, and thank you in advance for your support.
Josh Weil Democrat for Florida's 6th

subject: Freezing Football, James Bond Watches, and a Horse Makes Snow Angels
body:

# SUNDAY, January 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1955, President Dwight D. Eisenhower hosted America’s first televised press conference, allowing film and sound newsreel cameras into the room to record the session. ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuszAUBeCnsbcgX1_AePDwS7_Y6Jp0QgZfB7cmjoiB0qev6N71HOk7Oteu72yI4XF_szOZ7FMvhawuAi6ge2dDPPqSO-OJJCEnAwqVbOoKaz4ZQQ61qzyMHmWthgE1Dc424CulvJY8mFMTABoAhVBFU5ZeNNqOSoHUoFgpyIWcluIjhUeeyMcjbbQUY5p5NFPOzxfDf0y2TLb7vhdHWvM60Nmfic3jxLDdGP4fv9bP4Xr7vnXvfDHuuYcYw6s-J-6zDfGXzH9d3Iz8CQAA__9UV1Kc)) The NFL playoffs [are proceeding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHvpCAUxD8Ndhh4oEhBcY3dXnulIfLUt8eKEdT47S_e1v9mivklk5n58xpeniKt82__QVemNICAhgvJpR2Cp3gPugpuQgRUFTpplIGubVRbLU7b1oKH1shGeR0aa5qu0R67UckgBVbknjQhpZVSCWHqTutJdNaPxkiw0jAtMFBJe_1OtJYFp3inE_d6TJ8quqWULTP1i0HPoL-uq8a8rQ9k0K9TZNDnkvabQT8w6Dc_4xechNd8UECuldZSaPv1eaCTMqXVR76nYw18i_5O05T5RuPfzPO4YDgi8hRC5rS-j50w81x8yRwE6EeaandhuyhGyu2zYf54iv87l58-PB38CwAA___umnJw) in Philadelphia and Buffalo today, despite the freezing temps and snow. Are any of you braving the elements to watch your team in a frigid stadium? Hit reply and let us know! Today's edition of _The Flyover_ is brought to you courtesy of [Smart Nora](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD9rwzAQRz-NvMXoj21Zg4ZCyJauHcVFOjsX9CfISkK-fXFpx67Hu8fj93V2Z6BIef2EhLYtxUkuxwMXB2FcAIpvN3TBLogSVYdWaKXlPI1q6q42wDwbIeeLDuMFNPfaD9PFg5GwzDDKjuxu40IYIRTnup-HYeGzAa-1kEZoNnAM1Ertb4Vyu-IS3-WJtfclddFeW7tvTH0weWLyRPmJW-u3BLXlUmGHmDo9WnJbeVSPTB0zvraIrWF1vyqXoVHJEJmcdjRhoEdi6ogJ6O_oId2B1szUseLq_OJukIU5iK7acH9RjLRNe-26P_3Utf_Welr5HQAA__8cyG8a), a truly interesting anti-snore device—and investing opportunity. Don't miss this one!
|
---
## Record Cold Temps to Blanket US
The polar vortex is [delivering a deep freeze](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ_GdFgs2MYUFH-TLn97pYXwEnPCwYJNSN7-5Et95YxGM6Pv67pcXUzxfvvvdrQU8iKFHLkADmZZXUzvZWCrDYgSFUMLWmk5T6Oa2GaDHs3k1CxwVIDCeK_BY9CrVjCME7BozzYBYACUELqfhyGI2TivNUgDuhsErpFy6b9zvNOGIb3zE0vv886S3YiO2ql_nbx08tJa60N-NXS0fSKn-VH8jq128nLk5Ap_5kL44o_KXfEUPSfcDyyOHgUrD7mgd5VYsevRYkqxTueT2-5i-l2mv0g8rfwJAAD__1pZYfE) to nearly 300 million Americans this weekend. A developing coastal storm will likely dump moderate-to-heavy snow in several major cities from the mid-Atlantic to the Northeast on Sunday, including New York City, which is predicted to get 3 to 6 inches of snow. A wide swath of [4 to 8 inches of snowfall](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFqwzAQxvGnkTcZ3Um25EFDoXhLl1I6mot1jlVkK8giIW9f3L3zB39-fN-X6UIxxf32QRv7uuQJFXZSgYRhChTTazJN8Aszsm7Yg9UWXd_pvlk9aIs9A5KdXegNLlcyHQ0LO6PIdtREf9YUwACglbKtM2ZRbqDZWsABrDCKQ6y5tD857nXlJb3yg0s7561Jfq31fgj9JnAUONJ13vl5tLd8zgLHr0-Bo-vkFlOKeZe0cYkz7YeccwryyVRXLpISl3oIHI-ay0voMQah3wGsw8461xQf7s8zcfQn6LZRTH-A-t8hD4-_AQAA__8AJmCD) is expected from West Virginia to Maine. As the cold snap progresses into the south, cities along the Gulf Coast may get frozen precipitation, including Houston and New Orleans. At least 19 [record-cold high temperatures](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0zzFvgzAQBeBfYzYj3wExHjx0YUvXjsiBc7jKwZHt4qa_vqJ7tyc96X16H9f56jjwfn93D7LFxxkVDlKBBDOvjsNr7pvVeiKkriELutM4Xobu0mxWLQiA_jYORiG5YRxWMLT0g-7IOFIN23NNARiATindjn3v1WjcojWgAS16RSuXmNrPyHvZyIdXPCi1S3w0wW6lPLPo3gROAqdaa7vc8k41n73A6YwCp2cMLskjpkLfMvONEjv5lWUlVzZK0ieiH97vAqcm2fVZOQTOl1O_PxyHP6389_6w-BsAAP__iapchw) are expected from the Plains into the East. Forecast temperatures will be 25-30 degrees below average for this time of year. Portions of North Dakota, Minnesota, and Wisconsin have an extreme cold warning in effect as wind chills may reach as low as -50°F.
## Trump Signals Reprieve on TikTok Ban
President-elect Donald Trump said on Saturday that he will “most likely” [give TikTok a 90-day reprieve](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvwyAUBOBfgzcseNgBBoYu3tK1o0XMI3kNBsumdv3vq2TvdMNJp0_3dR2vnhLl-6ef0dVYRhDQcyG5tGPwlM6xa4KLiICqQSe10mAuvbo0D4c3NCZGK4MSWoguoEJQUlsVRZxU35B7rQkprZRKCN2arovCWD9pLcFKzTqBgWpZ2-9CuT4wprPsuLZTmZvkHrUuG1MfDAYGw3Ecbb5NGY_t1TMYlpKo0rQxGELJPgVe1595YTC8kyd6Yjr5nXbklZ61PLkVPPiT42_FvFHJ3O-FAr_5zNcpe2kM9KZZXVgOSom2y8t4nz2lt6n-99Hu4C8AAP__waxpxg) from a ban in the U.S. after he takes office Monday. Tech observers and TikTok users are waiting to see [what happens next](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ_G7oiAxV4oKP4mXf72SmvBi8OFGMtGifL2J19_3YxGGn36vm7TjXLJ6_KfnuxbqpOWehBSCeWmmXL5TKaffWLWDD17hYDajgOM_d3HGNChslYHHDE6DCEYDmSTSlry0Gd_vkmlnFIgJV6sMUlaRxFRaaewM5Ln3Op--a55bXdO5VNfvF9iffbF31vbjg7-dfra6SttK7-PczrL3nIs3Olry49WHyLQKmjbxNHqzscZC4ul1qWwICeH0UE04KxhF6ycDWgCcgCEkPrdz9s7l5KP8WRanpTLL0P7y8nL658AAAD__5G8YX4) with a ban on the social media platform scheduled to go into effect at midnight on Sunday, unless Chinese parent company ByteDance sells the app to an American entity. [RedNote, another Chinese-owned app,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAYBOCnwRsW_BADA0MXb-na0SLwE9NgiAyNlbev3L3bSSfdp_u6LleXcir3T7eh7bEuwOBCGafcLMGl_F7kEGxEBBQDWq6EAj1dxDSsVsoodUCnXZBqiujjxQFEoScljTJ8SPZcY5wbzgVjatRSRqaN80pxMFwRyTCkXvfxu6bSV4z5XV-4j75uQ7Zr789GxAeBmcB8HMfob63g0c6ewHxGAnNPj14fdMdQakfq11Qc_WnU13LfsTV6c4XAPOw2PI-Uc2rTKd83l_Kf1P97_rLwGwAA__9E7FsF) has been the most downloaded free app on Apple's app store in the U.S. since Tuesday. The photo and video-sharing platform has often been compared to Instagram. RedNote, just like TikTok, could face an ultimatum to divest, or be banned.
## Jury Finds CNN Liable in Defamation Case
A Florida jury found that [CNN defamed a U.S. Navy veteran](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vtDAQhH-N6Yzs5cNQuHgbunvblGjB62Mjn30yDoj8-oj06UYaaebR8_GYH8iB4_M_vsgWn2ZQ0EmlpR5nhxyuua2c9URATUVWm8bA0HdNX23WNAuS6TpABcYsrlN6WIDQKOeJVF-xvdeU1qPWjVKmHtrWq2HE1RgNozaiVeS4pFx_Jo5lIx-udFCu1_Sqgt1Kee-i-SdgEjCd51mvyx7p3O9ewHRHAdMao_QhZXYoS2YM8qDseC0y8EJBRjwueVChjFF-47phvuSVvuJTwFRl694nh8B7f_M8X8jh97_85eOw8BMAAP__zktjmg) in a 2021 story about people paid to rescue endangered Afghans following the Taliban takeover of Afghanistan. The jury awarded $5 million in compensatory damages to Zachary Young, who blamed CNN for destroying his business. A CNN segment portrayed Young’s work helping corporate clients extract workers from Afghanistan after the government collapsed as “exploitation” and part of deals in a black market. Young's legal team [obtained damning CNN internal messages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LtuxCAQheGnsTsswBdMQZHG3aZNac3C4J2IywoTO_v2kZM69S8dfToft_UGFCht7xDRVJ9XyeXIuGBCrw4ovNahdcYjSuxbNEL1Ss7T2E_twzhn7xaGaRw016OWivdazvdxnjRX6MeWzLXGhdBC9Jyrbh4Gz2cNVikhtVDNwNFRzaX7zJTqA3145QNLZ3Nsg3nU-tyb_q2RSyOX8zw7n78TnvvVG7lEdASNXJ4BKFXyntmUmEMPESrlxGohCMxiwHuBijs7KDmyf9HnEPJJaWM2f5Vaco7MFYjAKLItgGNUd3Zx2mLc86QQaJ8u8xaBwq-x_vfZYeRPAAAA__8BXnF8) through discovery, repeatedly showing staffers expressing overt hostility towards the Navy veteran. [A CNN spokesperson](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQBb_GZB7ZbcZA4OASZ3PphagHt6FPYCPsYcXfr9h80_ekUqn-vcYX8spp_osbuRrzCAqeUmmphzEgr9fYNsFFIiDTkNOd6aC3T2ObxSlAY02Ilt6ksLfvwQ6t0lpRRDC2bdjdNKX1oLVRqnv0bRtVP-DUdRoG3YlWUeCaj8f_zKkuFNcrn3Q8prw1q1tq3YswfwR4AT5dey71vgT4GyzAKy3A606A3ygwCvBTSnL7lCp3vORzkzEfMlDEjdMsE56XPKnSgUmGz3Fvbw6UisQ4L5i4VEwyMpYpC_DN4cL-xevKxd6y84a8_sjV32KdDr4DAAD__8iLaqY) said, “ _We remain proud of our journalists and are 100% committed to strong, fearless and fair-minded reporting at CNN, though we will of course take what useful lessons we can from this case_.”

clean_body: The polar vortex is to nearly 300 million Americans this weekend. | | | | | | SUNDAY, January 19, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1955, President Dwight D. Eisenhower hosted America’s first televised press conference, allowing film and sound newsreel cameras into the room to record the session. () The NFL playoffs in Philadelphia and Buffalo today, despite the freezing temps and snow. Are any of you braving the elements to watch your team in a frigid stadium? Hit reply and let us know! Today's edition of The Flyover is brought to you courtesy of , a truly interesting anti-snore device—and investing opportunity. Don't miss this one! | Record Cold Temps to Blanket US The polar vortex is to nearly 300 million Americans this weekend. A developing coastal storm will likely dump moderate-to-heavy snow in several major cities from the mid-Atlantic to the Northeast on Sunday, including New York City, which is predicted to get 3 to 6 inches of snow. A wide swath of is expected from West Virginia to Maine. As the cold snap progresses into the south, cities along the Gulf Coast may get frozen precipitation, including Houston and New Orleans. At least 19 are expected from the Plains into the East. Forecast temperatures will be 25-30 degrees below average for this time of year. Portions of North Dakota, Minnesota, and Wisconsin have an extreme cold warning in effect as wind chills may reach as low as -50°F. Trump Signals Reprieve on TikTok Ban President-elect Donald Trump said on Saturday that he will “most likely” from a ban in the U.S. after he takes office Monday. Tech observers and TikTok users are waiting to see with a ban on the social media platform scheduled to go into effect at midnight on Sunday, unless Chinese parent company ByteDance sells the app to an American entity. has been the most downloaded free app on Apple's app store in the U.S. since Tuesday. The photo and video-sharing platform has often been compared to Instagram. RedNote, just like TikTok, could face an ultimatum to divest, or be banned. Jury Finds CNN Liable in Defamation Case A Florida jury found that in a 2021 story about people paid to rescue endangered Afghans following the Taliban takeover of Afghanistan. The jury awarded $5 million in compensatory damages to Zachary Young, who blamed CNN for destroying his business. A CNN segment portrayed Young’s work helping corporate clients extract workers from Afghanistan after the government collapsed as “exploitation” and part of deals in a black market. Young's legal team through discovery, repeatedly showing staffers expressing overt hostility towards the Navy veteran. said, “ We remain proud of our journalists and are 100% committed to strong, fearless and fair-minded reporting at CNN, though we will of course take what useful lessons we can from this case.” Enjoy reading The Flyover? mailto:?cc=editor@jointheflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0D%0A%0D%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you%27ll%20love%20it%20too.%0D%0A%0D%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20news%20first%20thing%20in%20the%20morning.%20They%20cover%20important%20and%20interesting%20stories%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0D%0A%0D%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fjointheflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3D83%0D%0A%0D%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will!%0D%0A to share with your friends and family. | Flying together with our sponsor When Oura Ring launched, it transformed the way people track and improve their sleep and health. name: Special Election Update (Urgent)
subject: JD Vance is about to make history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
And thwart the MAGA agenda

Friend,

In just 4 days, America First fighter JD Vance will make history as the first millennial and first Marine Corps veteran to become Vice President of the United States.

We couldn't be more excited for President Trump and JD to Make America Great again, but there's just one problem: **[In 2026, there will be a hotly contested special election in Ohio to fill the Senate seat JD is vacating, and Democrats are sure to spend MILLIONS to try and buy the election.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99b7f77c19ab4c4abf00dd8b97862aa3&_e=iFlQ7zqz1_A25sU6GihWWllzfZmcFG59kfMAepBnUmM-RAAHXqP43W_1ox6VRyN5mMd5pkdWqA57wHcu5uazc9l9tP38NwwTXwRMGkldyN7z-RWeMjAjT0WbKdww6iZWJBtUkkoruNyeBBPbDV4CywzNByqdN8b3VVLRGu0hcS2UKJIC8g4DcWBxwLxZzeQ5VdgX9eyV-TmRNY805ZjG1V92hDkPg7y_y03oaW-aTBN221P3IUh_yUW3XHLUqmBaQyO3ZSWEj2yfAP-7gdWkycKOpmT9srCmHZwfQppRYXW1g-Nz7SHrjAXraLiI6EPRHRQHU8ZYNvpap9kadWLODhR3pE_Jdnlj90g-9rok2FhvOLMBejWZnW_sifMJl8d0S_ex55l_P2Y70y2ccUyM5w1YFCiPaQpLC9X_7Rdw5QO-qEcRSgBjwBks4gbTItgIyNrQsXvnShZv-HI2Tpq9AA%3D%3D)**
_Rumor has it, far-Left politician Sherod Brown might even run in the special election, which would be a NIGHTMARE for our Trump Senate Caucus._
President Trump and JD Vance are counting on a strong Majority in the Senate to enact their agenda over the next four years. But if we fail to defend Ohio, there's almost **[no chance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99b7f77c19ab4c4abf00dd8b97862aa3&_e=iFlQ7zqz1_A25sU6GihWWllzfZmcFG59kfMAepBnUmM-RAAHXqP43W_1ox6VRyN5mMd5pkdWqA57wHcu5uazc9l9tP38NwwTXwRMGkldyN7z-RWeMjAjT0WbKdww6iZWJBtUkkoruNyeBBPbDV4CywzNByqdN8b3VVLRGu0hcS2UKJIC8g4DcWBxwLxZzeQ5VdgX9eyV-TmRNY805ZjG1V92hDkPg7y_y03oaW-aTBN221P3IUh_yUW3XHLUqmBaQyO3ZSWEj2yfAP-7gdWkycKOpmT9srCmHZwfQppRYXW1g-Nz7SHrjAXraLiI6EPR-pGnuaoeJV_vi6TCRnKD6pga46aJtI5lEf96XpSkhvZdnlbtHLLCko4Q43m4BSjlBKbdgvxHuhLtjmpln_aN9pMFhHf8tl-1a9OcHpAb7VzSLPYs7yx2rxlc2VgAu-o-d-t_nM4ZvyWcJPTE4r45Pw%3D%3D)** of passing crucial legislation to save our country.

subject: Would you show up to a Trump Rally in your city
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
For an epic rally

Friend,

This Sunday, President Trump is holding his _**[final rally](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/bG3M5dF2HeFlKYpzIL6nOA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpb3_AP0T1aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjLzIwMjUtdHJ1bXAtcmFsbHktYXR0ZW5kLXBvbGwtZS1wYS8_dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPW8ybV9ucnNjX3BhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNTAxMTkmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjUwMTE3X25hX3RydW1wcmFsbHlhdHRlbmRwb2xsc3dvcm4tdjFfUEFfbnJzY19ucnNjJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWZ1bmRyYWlzaW5nJnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJmFtdHBvc2l0aW9uPTRXA3NwY0IKZ39n54xn6fU7tFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) **_before officially being sworn in as the 47th President of the United States.

Over the last nine and a half years, President Trump has travelled to every corner of America, held hundreds of campaign events, and celebrated with millions of America First patriots just like you.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dadd48fcb0f4ca4b5aaae5e6a5b5ab6&_e=2itKLbHGIt1Cydb_TyW0HzsH59Va58uP62vvDbyPkdc90MmHVbB4qoLUhkg5ayKuusLMtkK8SJWYlppwwiou6xFriiWwDARd6SCsFAv5JheQjcHhjGCkXfdH7Aj2tJlUTDUW5Sy5NE9w1v65hk7EDfy-j7VUMxIahLJprBX33vmabBKpriAWnYpY7pEoXA-skqhu3aS72ORRsVZ4MY3yLBnPeLLJwSBBMnkpL6VTU-j_8jeJvgisO0_3xgJM6CV5QYAnq4G55g5Qdi_P9_JnsQ5QVgLX9rADJlc_KGYA_-AnQHVIcyVCAUNoUmtijJPgFJPEPXgn1BaIsMytEEGogXRQJ5LOOFZ81Bn85FCeRYEggmryk7vtKx9cbNn3YcFv)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dadd48fcb0f4ca4b5aaae5e6a5b5ab6&_e=2itKLbHGIt1Cydb_TyW0HzsH59Va58uP62vvDbyPkdc90MmHVbB4qoLUhkg5ayKuf44RSiTcoVQWX9zwQj-768iMJtrV1lJ2QrDDcx0-mv28hLaVbeRreQvjwMv7xba44OBBEmZsOLOOJgdefIB31_v7J63T7nWR4ALHwN8GrFJYjMB_z8BiyqEU9ept726-TLRCGo7n2cMXmLn7rNTXHPkct0mnSKiw5-LVXQ4mwAez7e8DAMcNB50YoXrwfqbqKh9Ypg8NOU-sY8QE1bMG9X6sjYXp5UAbXyolzojtBamjAnrklNXrbWlQYcfybUEfe_-q7_Mkb-WQWDuDQjbM6-SsLCLTQBd475cNCJyAiBqlECkqRpKk1j_JBlb21qaKJEw-q-H772gFGbvkbDofdA%3D%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/socialism-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dadd48fcb0f4ca4b5aaae5e6a5b5ab6&_e=2itKLbHGIt1Cydb_TyW0HzsH59Va58uP62vvDbyPkdc90MmHVbB4qoLUhkg5ayKuf44RSiTcoVQWX9zwQj-768iMJtrV1lJ2QrDDcx0-mv28hLaVbeRreQvjwMv7xba44OBBEmZsOLOOJgdefIB31_v7J63T7nWR4ALHwN8GrFJYjMB_z8BiyqEU9ept726-TLRCGo7n2cMXmLn7rNTXHPkct0mnSKiw5-LVXQ4mwAfgWxI3gCGAMJL1kcCrbyHhwJVqpdNcQ8Vo-HefooM1cDdX43wHKLKTsar9IUtFaLdR4WQJU_LDMYZ8Ta1pgzgZ4cVYCCvnVVtqeCxMnw0nkLD8KVbgpDA3cdmCqarpN6JNNgmgpW1lVkSzZw6jPOaEsbqG5B8adzyYTV5fII1nxw%3D%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=0dadd48fcb0f4ca4b5aaae5e6a5b5ab6&_t=sIobb10Zy4mass8zwOCwYvlwXI5YV0nk7HebFsg685MEXal0V0iAeUwfVMmqAgnVWrqNMWBk3K-YFra6akGHl_eOtkpM_2P3hZGwm8eXzAQ-JTRCF5pwmk6yBmw8asIjT7OVB5OtuMQ3tn1blNVyBAsIF0HO1q_iaE-Um9OABJc%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dadd48fcb0f4ca4b5aaae5e6a5b5ab6&_e=lpJasw76cDXOjLs4SDj8aXpRhVtLfll2RyNVx-oqZyXPBSI3rCoocrZzBDyuz0CRb-0lpFNb11DJCGY0kKw32cnnHESp5sqZRCTXphDzQfHZRCKz_qVGVSiHdeTF1pL6g4PvRNI1KoJeV59E3nZ0DNUjtuIiybjuje5sExfqh116yS3WRFGr3bju4nkgmvC-Fdh-uV4pmYjRAzqXFEneVwjpLRf8FcIMXA2XfAvh9oMMFnBOaBYDvclXLGsQfo3WaacbFvDFuG6ixmy79Pz6Wmq1M8kxZU2cht7ybmY9KfQ%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0dadd48fcb0f4ca4b5aaae5e6a5b5ab6&_e=2itKLbHGIt1Cydb_TyW0H2bFb4vbe15foAF2woT0PCrNAhI_rGj2mn01lUysNgb1Zg1xWzaLWVkj1s4nNUpDOMChSMuAidU4SLYVcT_DzssHaiBBpsi1yOwoXbPzxG73o9u4uunhZ_HgLw-kkuJOBmpb1io5i7dMJZX9Gm-sOal5t0R1NTcAmQgCUcUPCMZix-LnUOc9fpYEqnRhoaqD-TY6vy1OVVVPMYUMKCiqtZU%3D)_

| | | Friend, there’s good news and bad news about Pete Hegseth.. Trump’s biggest allies, even if it means **SMEARING** a true patriot like Pete with vicious, hateful lies! Pete proclaimed Jesus Chris as his Lord and Savior in his opening statement, and then proceeded to face a baseless smear campaign, filled with anonymous allegations perpetuated by the fake news! _**[_**Deranged protestors even interrupted the hearing on multiple accounts. We must do something before the attacks against MAGA escalate even further!**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=55ba914d385d42f284ed094e92f3fee9&_e=_dje0xOi3gE9MQddRi7ELmMJ9CzQy8JYNBYBUEpazPlnChNcgUV49-34gHluzDV_08Xjb6qTpQafoDPwRisXqygz_Xn45WY-8YFiUpSiGCzxIMNrSqcIjYc45gR9qxCoJ1pLuEcZMvvPnMVoIcHf93Aa8OAGuJRe20QdE1TZv4dEpgZlATqIzjalZvCYQGYIXj1zA-d-EXScfHG0JZUWOT_mOWQoUv8HjWXaSn8A7FLi_Ww0w89FF18vaW0O8yF09Wa4Fkrb0Cz2YFi-O-tkakhHbqY3bJH9TD0wvePg8QtRMkWscx4AhirD1PQc9mHMIABRsgaGnS2ROabaXE_Lb8-CmIQngeKFz-3tqjXL1qZt-JZ8Vfhimy24CGoeRq96WSDloka_mLdjOVwSTg8wQIljnqdb7rm31HeDDSJioA99rATFsakUP3AEgZsBcumlekNf17j1yUvmtOxagaDR2LFbwg6HD9kycWRJ-ha4udE%3D)**_ _The radical left doesn't care about the truth!_ **_They simply want to DESTROY MAGA because men and women like Pete are a threat to everything they’ve built!_**
