With faith in his heart, he stood firm for the truth! Even as the Dems spewed vile lies and attacked his character, he remained calm and responded! This should be an inspiration to each of us!! _**[It’s time to stop the all-out witch hunts against Conservatives ONCE AND FOR ALL!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=55ba914d385d42f284ed094e92f3fee9&_e=_dje0xOi3gE9MQddRi7ELmMJ9CzQy8JYNBYBUEpazPlnChNcgUV49-34gHluzDV_08Xjb6qTpQafoDPwRisXqygz_Xn45WY-8YFiUpSiGCzxIMNrSqcIjYc45gR9qxCoJ1pLuEcZMvvPnMVoIcHf93Aa8OAGuJRe20QdE1TZv4dEpgZlATqIzjalZvCYQGYIXj1zA-d-EXScfHG0JZUWOT_mOWQoUv8HjWXaSn8A7FLi_Ww0w89FF18vaW0O8yF09Wa4Fkrb0Cz2YFi-O-tkakhHbqY3bJH9TD0wvePg8QtRMkWscx4AhirD1PQc9mHMIABRsgaGnS2ROabaXE_Lb9rqsxWOK5aMEN0O00MX2-miJlb5k8w-Xa4l1Fzyti8hA37PqawXJuqMM24GPhwRUh4MOXYTZdaA_91gzmmrSda_pJ91QL5adYU-TpBpxA0crdaSOJOf-hZkFSqHsumYqmHOHmY8TzrdCvcBkiVHiAY%3D)**_ The radical left wants their attacks to make us lose hope and give up. But we know you have the strength and resilience of a proud patriot. _**[_**Will you rush support now to DEMAND support for Pete Hegseth in the final stretch and condemn these baseless attacks against ALL conservatives?**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=55ba914d385d42f284ed094e92f3fee9&_e=_dje0xOi3gE9MQddRi7ELmMJ9CzQy8JYNBYBUEpazPlnChNcgUV49-34gHluzDV_08Xjb6qTpQafoDPwRisXqygz_Xn45WY-8YFiUpSiGCzxIMNrSqcIjYc45gR9qxCoJ1pLuEcZMvvPnMVoIcHf93Aa8OAGuJRe20QdE1TZv4dEpgZlATqIzjalZvCYQGYIXj1zA-d-EXScfHG0JZUWOT_mOWQoUv8HjWXaSn8A7FLi_Ww0w89FF18vaW0O8yF09Wa4Fkrb0Cz2YFi-O-tkakhHbqY3bJH9TD0wvePg8QtRMkWscx4AhirD1PQc9mHMIABRsgaGnS2ROabaXE_LbwLf3G6AGGg4-fV5a_e2jzL9l6UBzYiR-UwUKmJXgA534NTeHloj6U8GP6pn5ZNS0J6V2S0gps52Aa1htUFVpS49pzmJZTW6OEtkX0W2Al5iRu_01Yl8PSPHca7Pm8ohloMsZCLXrEA4w6B6renK-10%3D)**_ Conservatives everywhere need to rally behind a Conservative Christian veteran like Pete and ensure these smear campaigns END for GOOD!

name: The LaRouche Organization
subject: Weekly Newsletter
body:
Will You Shape This Presidency?

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=1)
---
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFtXyROgmp6QINI7F_4c8OEHZKvcGP6g5H8F9pE7MCnEY&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=2 "LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST") [LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFtXyROgmp6QINI7F_4c8OEHZKvcGP6g5H8F9pE7MCnEY&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=2)
---
Friend —
Last week marked a dramatic shift with the announcement of a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas, which is poised to take effect today. While only a beginning and very fragile, this announcement is welcome news after a far too long delay, and the loss of far too many lives—thanks to the refusal of the Biden Administration to do anything earlier.
We now have two developments—the shift in Southwest Asia and the inauguration of Donald Trump tomorrow—which underline the dramatic nature of the world we are living in today. Most important to recognize is that the Deep Anglo-American State is increasingly not in control of world events, and thus our opportunity to act has never been greater.
Almost one year ago, The LaRouche Organization put out our proposal for an "Oasis Plan" in Southwest Asia, modelled on the proposal by Lyndon LaRouche in the 1970's. This has never been more relevant than it is now, as the tenuous peace between Israel and Hamas must rapidly be upgraded if it is to become a lasting peace, and therefore an element of serious economic development must begin. We are launching a whole new level of mobilization as we go into this next period.
Additionally, The LaRouche Organization has launched a full assault on the "Liars' Bureau"—the web of intelligence and related agencies which have lied the country into war after war, while at the same time attacking anyone who opposes them. The confirmations of Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel are therefore crucial battles if Trump is actually going to be able to combat this entrenched apparatus.
These openings are not stagnant or pre-determined—they are _dynamic_. The world is experiencing a shift away from the past 500 years of colonialism, and what is done in these coming days will be crucial to transform these openings into a new, post-imperial era of mankind.
* * *
## Starting At 10am EST! Sunday LaRouche Show - The Lost Chance of 1989, Part 2
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFtXyROgmp6QINI7F_4c8OEGp_iQIYjJVKTO7nIMclmRvN32qPxTcbN-9OxF9BnWqAw&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=3)
Tune in this Sunday (today) at 10:00 am EST, for the second part of the LaRouche movement's "The Lost Chance of 1989" documentary from 2008.
In the Fall of 1989, the collapse of the Berlin Wall signified the beginning of the complete disintegration of the Comecon system. At a press conference in West Berlin in October 1988, LaRouche had proposed the reunification of Germany based on a policy of economic cooperation between East and West to rebuild the ravaged economies of the East Bloc, a cooperation which could have ushered in a completely new era of peace and prosperity.
However, due to the London-Wall Street establishment's brutal suppression of leading figures involved, including assassinations, blackmail, and the imprisonment of LaRouche and many of his associates, any chance of this was dashed. Thus, "The Lost Chance of 1989."
This video tells the story, one we must learn today in order to live up to the opportunity now facing us. LaRouche concludes this video with the following question: "Do we have the ability today to stand up and to reject this threatened crisis as we tried to back in 1989?"
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2fVGP-PhvXIwVfYRj2FCFtXyROgmp6QINI7F_4c8OEHZKvcGP6g5H8F9pE7MCnEY&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=4)
* * *
## The Oasis Plan: LaRouche's Plan for Southwest Asia
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNGkyf-6bftPvBP4skQiOHZyiq_-5S0ZdXIyx-ovaHeFw&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=5)
Lyndon LaRouche insisted that there is no purely "political solution" to the conflict in the Middle East, and said this during a speech in 1990:
> The simple reason is, that without a policy of economic development, the Arabs and Israelis _have no common basis for political agreement: no common interest._ It is only as the Israeli—not as a Zionist, but as an Israeli—finds his or her interest to be the economic development of Israel, as a nation... and the Arab similarly, that both have a fundamental, common interest in the progressive development of the fertility and fecundity of the land of the entire region. On that basis, for the sake of those respective and common economic interests, a political settlement is possible. Without that element, the idea of political settlement is an old fool’s coughing into the wind.
The Oasis Plan is the only realistic approach to resolving the decades old tensions in this region today. Without economic development, in particular a massive increase in the water and power available, then the next war is waiting in the wings. This proposal lays out the basis to change the underlying dynamic leftover from the British Empire nearly 100 years ago.
[**Watch the video here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmMlfZNV325VqNX2wPAACMyy&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=6)
[**Read the report here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNFwdJMrXR2G1R3l2fQ2L0oOXwBgrxshxDuqXXiM5Qaq84Cp2VTMR-tsrMEB5uaMFG17XrKfp-eUcEuuVYcdTGN&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=7)
* * *
## Special LaRouche Organization Report:
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXYvEBvw1V4YzP41gFotuQMtXvxK6p2WV5A7S3POuthfc&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=8)
Yes, it is indeed true that the national security of the U.S. is under threat by various forms of meddling and malicious intrigues—but the problem does not originate in Russia, China, Iran, or any of the other nations on the neocon “bad guys” list. The threat emanates from long-term operatives embedded deep within the permanent bureaucracy of the U.S. government and other related agencies.
Trump's nominations of Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel have sent waves of fear into this establishment, and they are now mobilized to stop their confirmations. Gabbard and Patel are not without their faults, and no one can say with certainty what they will do once they assume office. But we can with certainty tell you who fears their scrutiny, and why.
[**Read here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXYvEBvw1V4YzP41gFotuQMtXvxK6p2WV5A7S3POuthfc&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=9)
And get active! Contact your Senators and demand they vote for confirmation. **You can call your Senators' DC offices via the Congressional switchboard 202-224-3121.**
**For the local offices:** Print out the [PDF copy of the report](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNFwdJMrXR2G1R3l2fQ2L0oVnr8Kx-L0MD1TUz4DI27ij19CZN2rKCP6NUsdJ93DPJlO_jUn7fWDGtCnRHIYi3up42Lyftys8Its7DtUpTnkle4j6-emi9StVnYpgEkxF0&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240119_newsletter&n=10) and hand deliver it to the staff at the local offices near you.
**For the Washington offices** : Call both your senators' offices in Washington and email them the PDF copy of the report.

clean_body: Will You Shape This Presidency? | | | | "LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST" Friend — Last week marked a dramatic shift with the announcement of a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas, which is poised to take effect today. While only a beginning and very fragile, this announcement is welcome news after a far too long delay, and the loss of far too many lives—thanks to the refusal of the Biden Administration to do anything earlier. We now have two developments—the shift in Southwest Asia and the inauguration of Donald Trump tomorrow—which underline the dramatic nature of the world we are living in today. Most important to recognize is that the Deep Anglo-American State is increasingly not in control of world events, and thus our opportunity to act has never been greater. Almost one year ago, The LaRouche Organization put out our proposal for an "Oasis Plan" in Southwest Asia, modelled on the proposal by Lyndon LaRouche in the 1970's. This has never been more relevant than it is now, as the tenuous peace between Israel and Hamas must rapidly be upgraded if it is to become a lasting peace, and therefore an element of serious economic development must begin. We are launching a whole new level of mobilization as we go into this next period. Additionally, The LaRouche Organization has launched a full assault on the "Liars' Bureau"—the web of intelligence and related agencies which have lied the country into war after war, while at the same time attacking anyone who opposes them. The confirmations of Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel are therefore crucial battles if Trump is actually going to be able to combat this entrenched apparatus. These openings are not stagnant or pre-determined—they are dynamic. The world is experiencing a shift away from the past 500 years of colonialism, and what is done in these coming days will be crucial to transform these openings into a new, post-imperial era of mankind. Starting At 10am EST! Sunday LaRouche Show - The Lost Chance of 1989, Part 2 Tune in this Sunday (today) at 10:00 am EST, for the second part of the LaRouche movement's "The Lost Chance of 1989" documentary from 2008. In the Fall of 1989, the collapse of the Berlin Wall signified the beginning of the complete disintegration of the Comecon system. At a press conference in West Berlin in October 1988, LaRouche had proposed the reunification of Germany based on a policy of economic cooperation between East and West to rebuild the ravaged economies of the East Bloc, a cooperation which could have ushered in a completely new era of peace and prosperity. However, due to the London-Wall Street establishment's brutal suppression of leading figures involved, including assassinations, blackmail, and the imprisonment of LaRouche and many of his associates, any chance of this was dashed. Thus, "The Lost Chance of 1989." This video tells the story, one we must learn today in order to live up to the opportunity now facing us. LaRouche concludes this video with the following question: "Do we have the ability today to stand up and to reject this threatened crisis as we tried to back in 1989?" The Oasis Plan: LaRouche's Plan for Southwest Asia Lyndon LaRouche insisted that there is no purely "political solution" to the conflict in the Middle East, and said this during a speech in 1990: The simple reason is, that without a policy of economic development, the Arabs and Israelis have no common basis for political agreement: no common interest. It is only as the Israeli—not as a Zionist, but as an Israeli—finds his or her interest to be the economic development of Israel, as a nation... and the Arab similarly, that both have a fundamental, common interest in the progressive development of the fertility and fecundity of the land of the entire region. On that basis, for the sake of those respective and common economic interests, a political settlement is possible. Without that element, the idea of political settlement is an old fool’s coughing into the wind. The Oasis Plan is the only realistic approach to resolving the decades old tensions in this region today. Without economic development, in particular a massive increase in the water and power available, then the next war is waiting in the wings. This proposal lays out the basis to change the underlying dynamic leftover from the British Empire nearly 100 years ago. Special LaRouche Organization Report: Yes, it is indeed true that the national security of the U.S. is under threat by various forms of meddling and malicious intrigues—but the problem does not originate in Russia, China, Iran, or any of the other nations on the neocon “bad guys” list. The threat emanates from long-term operatives embedded deep within the permanent bureaucracy of the U.S. government and other related agencies. Trump's nominations of Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel have sent waves of fear into this establishment, and they are now mobilized to stop their confirmations. Gabbard and Patel are not without their faults, and no one can say with certainty what they will do once they assume office. But we can with certainty tell you who fears their scrutiny, and why. And get active! Contact your Senators and demand they vote for confirmation. You can call your Senators' DC offices via the Congressional switchboard 202-224-3121. For the local offices: Print out the and hand deliver it to the staff at the local offices near you. For the Washington offices : Call both your senators' offices in Washington and email them the PDF copy of the report. name: History Facts
subject: Air Force One isn't a single plane
body:
The presidential airplane is iconic, decorated with an American flag on the tail, the seal of the President of the United States by the door, and the words “United States of America” along the side. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cgn3b9x1ajz0bh0pim8uklez7x5ofrr6tgen211lumfy5oosvsxuo1afqxgibnzq4drivioishhy844mc49nkt8r74pddys6zomu0r3a04kvcthuwv9rlzhd8im7bzaq3egze0r4m4z71b2&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqc4hr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [Air Force One is the name of any plane the president is on.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqc4hr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqc4hr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqc4hr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he presidential airplane is iconic, decorated with an American flag on the tail, the seal of the President of the United States by the door, and the words “United States of America” along the side. It’s known as [Air Force One](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqc4hr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) — but that term actually refers not to any specific plane, but to [what is being transported](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqc4hr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Air Force One is the radio name for any airplane that’s carrying the president of the United States. Usually, the president travels on a plane custom-designed to transport the commander in chief, nicknamed the “flying Oval Office.”
---
The first plane to bear the designation “Air Force One” was Columbine II, the aircraft that transported President Dwight D. Eisenhower from 1953 to 1954. In 1953, Eisenhower’s plane, then called Air Force 8610, almost collided with a passenger plane, Eastern Air Lines 8610. The Air Force One name was born to quickly communicate to air traffic control which plane the president was on, avoiding confusion with other planes in the area.
The current presidential aircraft is a customized Boeing 747-200 (and another identical plane) first used during George H.W. Bush’s administration. It boasts three stories, a medical suite that can function as an operating room, food galleys capable of feeding 100 people, and quarters for staffers and members of the press. It’s even capable of fueling mid-flight.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqc4hr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqc4hr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Franklin D. Roosevelt was the first president to have a custom aircraft.
The first plane custom-built to carry the U.S. president was [the Flying White House](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqc4hr&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), a Douglas VC-54C Skymaster, better known as the “Sacred Cow.” Its amenities included an executive conference room with a bulletproof window and — extremely luxurious for the mid-1940s — a working refrigerator. Because it was built for President Franklin D. Roosevelt, who used a wheelchair at the time, the aircraft included a battery-powered elevator for easy boarding. The aircraft’s first flight, to the Yalta Conference in the Soviet Union in February 1945, was also its last flight carrying FDR, who died two months later. The plane stayed in service for the first 27 months of Harry S. Truman’s administration.

clean_body: The presidential airplane is iconic, decorated with an American flag on the tail, the seal of the President of the United States by the door, and the words “United States of America” along the side. | T he presidential airplane is iconic, decorated with an American flag on the tail, the seal of the President of the United States by the door, and the words “United States of America” along the side. It’s known as — but that term actually refers not to any specific plane, but to . Air Force One is the radio name for any airplane that’s carrying the president of the United States. Usually, the president travels on a plane custom-designed to transport the commander in chief, nicknamed the “flying Oval Office.” The first plane to bear the designation “Air Force One” was Columbine II, the aircraft that transported President Dwight D. Eisenhower from 1953 to 1954. In 1953, Eisenhower’s plane, then called Air Force 8610, almost collided with a passenger plane, Eastern Air Lines 8610. The Air Force One name was born to quickly communicate to air traffic control which plane the president was on, avoiding confusion with other planes in the area. The current presidential aircraft is a customized Boeing 747-200 (and another identical plane) first used during George H.W. Bush’s administration. It boasts three stories, a medical suite that can function as an operating room, food galleys capable of feeding 100 people, and quarters for staffers and members of the press. It’s even capable of fueling mid-flight. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Area (in feet) of floor space on the presidential aircraft 4,000 | | Range (in miles) of the presidential aircraft 7,800 | Range (in miles) of the presidential aircraft 7,800 | | U.S. presidents since Eisenhower 12 | | Box-office gross of the 1997 action film Air Force One $172 million | Box-office gross of the 1997 action film Air Force One $172 million | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Franklin D. Roosevelt was the first president to have a custom aircraft. The first plane custom-built to carry the U.S. president was , a Douglas VC-54C Skymaster, better known as the “Sacred Cow.” Its amenities included an executive conference room with a bulletproof window and — extremely luxurious for the mid-1940s — a working refrigerator. Because it was built for President Franklin D. Roosevelt, who used a wheelchair at the time, the aircraft included a battery-powered elevator for easy boarding. The aircraft’s first flight, to the Yalta Conference in the Soviet Union in February 1945, was also its last flight carrying FDR, who died two months later. The plane stayed in service for the first 27 months of Harry S. Truman’s administration. | | | 🚨🚨🚨 President Donald J. Trump's former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo has already reached out 3+ times, so this is your FINAL NOTICE: We need your input to help set the GOP agenda before President Trump takes office 🚨🚨🚨
Hi Friend,

We're shocked that despite multiple requests from former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo, we still haven't received your responses to our **[Official GOP Priorities Survey](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/M-KSmmsux3AqUJTc3dRiwA~~/AARclAA~~~ "Official GOP Priorities Survey")**. As one of our top Conservative supporters, your voice is crucial in shaping our Republican Party's agenda for the upcoming legislative session.

And with the Trump administration just days away from taking power, it's imperative that we have your input to ensure that our party is focused on the right issues and that we're driving the change that the American people voted for in November.

_By taking this survey, you'll help set the agenda for the next Congress and shape our country's future._

There's just one catch: This is your LAST CHANCE to make your voice heard before the survey closes for good. **[So please, Friend, we don't want to miss out on your input - take a few minutes and record your responses!](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/M-KSmmsux3AqUJTc3dRiwA~~/AARclAA~~~ "So please, Friend, we don’t want to miss out on your input – take a few minutes and record your responses!")**

name: Trump-Vance Senate Allies [via NRSC]
subject: It’s all about Ohio in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
And thwart the MAGA agenda

Friend,

In just 4 days, America First fighter JD Vance will make history as the first millennial and first Marine Corps veteran to become Vice President of the United States.

We couldn't be more excited for President Trump and JD to Make America Great again, but there's just one problem: **[In 2026, there will be a hotly contested special election in Ohio to fill the Senate seat JD is vacating, and Democrats are sure to spend MILLIONS to try and buy the election.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00a2a6b466a5430ab6b8e6ad2f1f8ca7&_e=TkMTjejT0vtvQeizGaXq1NytZeoQKHrCsCjQbp3mxv6pcIBGXwG1zCQz8s1zCOh8WWa7kKGrLyJ2ctGcqMSJTdf8qbPNFwGM_u1egZH3G8zzYlIiRS8nECWL6XfZLVdwL-rY2Cs-Dvp3z_3gvNOgy74J4CYSwjOEBXVPnp3OjxgOlALIwks6N_7lS4klVaIjdUMZau2YU8BLcXc7R2FPXS8TJKnKEm944gXNhLbhZRD200PssBJ9OlrYrSaM1lhwkuEJtJ8K4vQd6BFoOjm2MiAqsoHRChxO1y4CBXOV__TpnlowkMaRlgT7dPV1hBrbcQZfXcBCbj698tv17ieK0IgI-euWA8MywR8-6hogn5CkMFgkg3sQ1xrcC6pue7nAvtOka1Hd4Vooz9c3i10EWOF6NCanuidaG-8166X5_Fuo9jnxMV9bOLEb_aGcTm--oJZTcMVIFk8mcavv6oafTg%3D%3D)**
_Rumor has it, far-Left politician Sherod Brown might even run in the special election, which would be a NIGHTMARE for our Trump Senate Caucus._
President Trump and JD Vance are counting on a strong Majority in the Senate to enact their agenda over the next four years. But if we fail to defend Ohio, there's almost **[no chance](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00a2a6b466a5430ab6b8e6ad2f1f8ca7&_e=TkMTjejT0vtvQeizGaXq1NytZeoQKHrCsCjQbp3mxv6pcIBGXwG1zCQz8s1zCOh8WWa7kKGrLyJ2ctGcqMSJTdf8qbPNFwGM_u1egZH3G8zzYlIiRS8nECWL6XfZLVdwL-rY2Cs-Dvp3z_3gvNOgy74J4CYSwjOEBXVPnp3OjxgOlALIwks6N_7lS4klVaIjdUMZau2YU8BLcXc7R2FPXS8TJKnKEm944gXNhLbhZRD200PssBJ9OlrYrSaM1lhwkuEJtJ8K4vQd6BFoOjm2MiAqsoHRChxO1y4CBXOV__TpnlowkMaRlgT7dPV1hBrbM0F6tKxTP3-tNE9uXiSgh3yG-VSsXvIbcj_oETVEBmlKKgYEHcExj9oTWYIPMKDK78SGEx9vv8KeuDVAPVEc6nwR4jJ7GXpbAPjqefCqGL1z-F1ObAFluDT6D2wS1mCFTcDu22ux51LO5kiLIlvMqA%3D%3D)** of passing crucial legislation to save our country.

**[That's why we're coming to you, friend. Will you help us DEFEND OHIO in 2026 by making a special election contribution today?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00a2a6b466a5430ab6b8e6ad2f1f8ca7&_e=TkMTjejT0vtvQeizGaXq1NytZeoQKHrCsCjQbp3mxv6pcIBGXwG1zCQz8s1zCOh8WWa7kKGrLyJ2ctGcqMSJTdf8qbPNFwGM_u1egZH3G8zzYlIiRS8nECWL6XfZLVdwL-rY2Cs-Dvp3z_3gvNOgy74J4CYSwjOEBXVPnp3OjxgOlALIwks6N_7lS4klVaIjdUMZau2YU8BLcXc7R2FPXS8TJKnKEm944gXNhLbhZRD200PssBJ9OlrYrSaM1lhwkuEJtJ8K4vQd6BFoOjm2MiAqsoHRChxO1y4CBXOV__TpnlowkMaRlgT7dPV1hBrb0JDMJdafOxl3SWF4NI2jke_YPWcNEqFTe2PxbF01XMsA2ynzDDaMnnJjvWRZtAHIZx2qFIG6Aqz9_ZkPyAuJ165kcSJVKWgzRRKtORzgYiTZm3e6dBu8DsegCMjoFPUrfvyo0pHEXfC-xKyzaAHC1Q%3D%3D)**

clean_body: And thwart the MAGA agenda Friend, In just 4 days, America First fighter JD Vance will make history as the first millennial and first Marine Corps veteran to become Vice President of the United States. We couldn't be more excited for President Trump and JD to Make America Great again, but there's just one problem: Rumor has it, far-Left politician Sherod Brown might even run in the special election, which would be a NIGHTMARE for our Trump Senate Caucus. President Trump and JD Vance are counting on a strong Majority in the Senate to enact their agenda over the next four years. But if we fail to defend Ohio, there's almost of passing crucial legislation to save our country. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: How My Father's Journey Taught Me About Faith and Resilience
body:
This One Choice Could Change Everything
It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon’s report on my father.
| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=663c66c368fb43c79760a3b54e6cf369&_e=IxbeFJ-b9wI12wlj8ZUIZxlWm28mCqxlbcdm3rFgk1TWjqpjf_qcp4iCsFFvlHvIvueyyB_tMXzouehS4bE8E4wI2YZrHaW7r-DS0id6GW0xS7rDrXLtcCfg5sTXsLW0agpN0TL8KnSXLNuK0_eWdRHbdsLes0eV7B-vngJaxGNhfK8aRBDnDIfRKCmDd2qChv-PpYDq0XKlrsLzjnmtCTupG_3w8gXdYzWPYQe8G00sktMjE0LUtXmW_MmoJi3DR-cVL623YeFsB93ifyGh-KUNZ0gzE6k7YP7PYBoSiCeWc-0coCXx6p8lvGnmh5e73ZDmou8rKzrsiRFwaxeCs_9GuSBFM1qSJ59_yQi4fDVfcFJiHYK8DM6GUFJXN8uDWf1E3QpGDKd2-6_YmyPrE2svsuUbkoWhWC7Zj705KVDRm1cxz02mRIGOOzkC6P82)
---
Peter,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=663c66c368fb43c79760a3b54e6cf369&_e=IxbeFJ-b9wI12wlj8ZUIZxlWm28mCqxlbcdm3rFgk1TWjqpjf_qcp4iCsFFvlHvIvueyyB_tMXzouehS4bE8E4wI2YZrHaW7r-DS0id6GW0xS7rDrXLtcCfg5sTXsLW0agpN0TL8KnSXLNuK0_eWdRHbdsLes0eV7B-vngJaxGNhfK8aRBDnDIfRKCmDd2qChv-PpYDq0XKlrsLzjnmtCTupG_3w8gXdYzWPYQe8G00sktMjE0LUtXmW_MmoJi3DR-cVL623YeFsB93ifyGh-CkN9VGmnObtKJ8BmudVyLTWMgptSFv7Olq3rhvRHLleTh0mKHfEMoWxEE3huzRCv_6T8aDY5Ut2Sm0-l6LAGoJayfWQJGWf5sKKNLRps59x8D2cMBo3fR6OuFq1t2cw7s9BLnowGIHcOaaBPblGkj0q79wePRztz1xnYQvbKAGx)
---

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: House Dems may derail Shapiro legacy
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9683bc4e86&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[How Pennsylvania House Democrats may derail Shapiro’s national ambitions](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c846524229&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Erik Telford_
The 2024 election may be over, but it is safe to bet that Gov. Josh Shapiro — whose national ambitions are well known — already has his eyes set on 2028. As Pennsylvania enters the final legislative session of his term, Shapiro should avoid putting the presidential cart before his gubernatorial horse. Shapiro entered office two years ago[ promising bipartisan leadership](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d76b139560&e=b7b3eddce2) and committed to work with Republicans in the state Capitol. He campaigned telling voters he would[ take on the big fights](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a2f7658f47&e=b7b3eddce2) and pledged to deliver on policies with broad bipartisan support, including tax cuts and Lifeline Scholarships for kids in failing schools. Despite the hype about Shapiro’s talent as a politician, he’s proven unskilled and ineffective at governing. His first two years in office tell a story of a stunning lack of accomplishment, abdication of leadership, and betrayal of trust with the legislature. **Why It Matters.** Despite his lack of productivity and leadership, Shapiro still garners national attention. The national media has devoted a significant amount of attention to Shapiro, whom some pundits have praised as a “[Democratic rising star](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0241b1cdcc&e=b7b3eddce2),” “[Superman](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=677f753c16&e=b7b3eddce2),” and “[the Dem’s next darling](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=114e2d4bfa&e=b7b3eddce2).” In 2024, this national notoriety catapulted Shapiro as[ one of the leading candidates](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=712c6ed237&e=b7b3eddce2) to serve as an eleventh-hour running mate for Vice President Kamala Harris. But the public is wising up to Shapiro’s abysmal record. In recent polling, when asked if the governor has delivered any significant accomplishments during his time as governor,[ 54 percent](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e3179d1054&e=b7b3eddce2) of Pennsylvania voters said either “no” or “unsure.” Those who answered “yes” struggled to identify any specific Shapiro milestones other than the quick repair of I-95 in July 2023—a rebuilding effort that had less to do with the governor and more with[ the federal government backing it](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f2e4a1b6e8&e=b7b3eddce2) (which didn’t stop Shapiro from[ taking credit](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f166fd737f&e=b7b3eddce2) for in the Washington Post).

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3ca1c11022&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[An unlikely case against open primaries](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9d4bf0e680&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Pennsylvania is one of fourteen states in the country with closed primary elections, meaning a voter must officially register with a political party in advance of the election date in order to participate. And the only political parties that get to vote in the Pennsylvania taxpayer funded primaries are Republicans and Democrats.

As one of only fourteen states in the country with a closed primary process, the discussion of open primaries regularly surfaces in Pennsylvania.

There are many reasons why people are against open primaries, but my perspective on it is likely different from the typical arguments.

**Why It Matters**. Since I am not registered as either a Democrat or Republican, I am excluded because only those registered voters can participate in the primary. Yet, I am forced to pay for this expense.
However, I don’t think the answer is to allow independents and other third-party voters to participate in the primary of their choice. The answer should be every party pays for its own primary.

Why should the government, aka taxpayers, fund the Democratic and Republican primaries when third parties fund their own selection process?

Imagine the cost savings for the state government if there was only one election day each year?

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2d04aa9bf8&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Judge’s donations from campaign committee raise ethical issues and questions](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=238d19b1aa&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Owen Wister and the ‘Western Cure’](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7347e0ec09&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Suburban congress members prioritize illegal immigrants over citizen safety](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=06b1148a51&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Progressives policies are doomed to fail — often in deadly ways](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d940fee6cf&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Lange silences Willistown taxpayer despite Sunshine Act, gets sued](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5f64e4c2bb&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
President-elect Donald Trump will take the oath of office tomorrow, thanks in large part to his victory right here in Pennsylvania. At _RealClear Pennsylvania_ this week, Athan Koutsiouroumbas writes that [the Republican sweep in the commonwealth was no fluke](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=607b57e7c1&e=b7b3eddce2). Increased voter registration across the state, once assumed to be universally favorable to Democrats, has instead built an electorate that leans more to the right than it has in many years. Still, as author (and Broad + Liberty co-founder) Albert Eisenberg warns at the same website, the GOP should be sure [not to become complacent](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fa74d293db&e=b7b3eddce2). Republicans made striking gains among Hispanic Pennsylvanians, but keeping new voters interested in supporting the party means showing up and supporting their needs and interests more than once every four years.********

name: Marina Jenkins
subject: Before Trump’s inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Chip in to help us fight for fair maps under Trump’s next term
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100626713/523382573/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzZTc2ZGFkLTZkZDYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FwtJb_vTLeR1-E8ABUBhRx4OF20Q1Q6PP6b45FdptBo=&emci=8c48a51d-f4d4-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=53e76dad-6dd6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=8431045)
---

Hey Peter, Tomorrow, Donald Trump will become the 47th president of the United States. I know that many of us are still grappling with this reality — and for me, the best way to face what’s lying ahead is to get to work. **So before tomorrow’s inauguration, let’s take a moment to gameplan.** With a new president who seems hell-bent on destroying our democracy — and a Congress eager to operationalize his most dangerous policies — we must be focused, we must be persistent, and we must be strategic. Here’s how we do it. You already know about our 10 Year Plan, the comprehensive strategy to have the fairest national map possible in 2032, and in every cycle until then. **To stay on track, we’ll be focused on three key goals during Trump’s upcoming term as president:**
1. **Working to ensure fair congressional maps** in states like Ohio and Wisconsin to level the playing field in the U.S. House of Representatives so Democrats have a fair shot to take back control and put a check on Trump’s power. Thanks in part to the fair maps community, Republicans’ current House majority is just a few seats — already more closely reflecting the will of the voters. After 2016, they had a 47-seat majority when their margin of victory in total votes for the House was much smaller. Looking ahead, the NDRC and our affiliates will be part of critical redistricting efforts nationwide — making sure congressional maps are as fair as possible.

2. **Electing pro-democracy champions to state-level offices** where they can slow down or stop the MAGA agenda. From state legislatures to state supreme courts, supporting the election of our endorsed Democracy Defenders will provide a critical bulwark against the most dangerous and anti-democratic elements of their agenda — and help make sure the officials who are shaping future electoral maps are committed to fair representation.

3. **Protecting the upcoming U.S. Census.** This isn’t just about a head-count — it’s about supporting fair representation and maintaining crucial resources for our communities. In Project 2025, Trump’s team threatened to upend this process by skewing the count to unfairly allocate federal resources, including the proposed addition of a citizenship question that could discourage people from responding to the census and leave some communities with fewer seats in Congress and less political power. An inaccurate census count would distort redistricting outcomes and roll back our fair maps progress.

These are three enormous undertakings that will have lasting consequences for U.S. democracy and our fair maps movement. **I know we can achieve these goals, but only if we all work together, stay involved, and contribute our time, energy, and financial resources to power this movement forward.** I’m so grateful to have you in this fight alongside us. Sincerely, Marina Marina Jenkins
Executive Director of the NDRC | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100626720/523382586/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TomorrowInauguration_email_20250119-NDRC-Tier1-TomorrowInauguration_NoCTA&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250119-NDRC-Tier1-TomorrowInauguration_NoCTA&utm_campaign=TomorrowInauguration&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzZTc2ZGFkLTZkZDYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FwtJb_vTLeR1-E8ABUBhRx4OF20Q1Q6PP6b45FdptBo=)

We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. **[Click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100626730/523382601/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TomorrowInauguration_email_20250119-NDRC-Tier1-TomorrowInauguration_NoCTA&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250119-NDRC-Tier1-TomorrowInauguration_NoCTA&utm_campaign=TomorrowInauguration&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzZTc2ZGFkLTZkZDYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FwtJb_vTLeR1-E8ABUBhRx4OF20Q1Q6PP6b45FdptBo=)** to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression.

An inaccurate census count would distort redistricting outcomes and roll back our fair maps progress. These are three enormous undertakings that will have lasting consequences for U.S. democracy and our fair maps movement. I know we can achieve these goals, but only if we all work together, stay involved, and contribute our time, energy, and financial resources to power this movement forward. I’m so grateful to have you in this fight alongside us. Sincerely, Marina Marina Jenkins Executive Director of the NDRC | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: First, we countered drag queens in libraries. Now our next battle needs you!
body:
Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=56c4c8db45284498a43881833302b907&_e=mzNgb1CYxhL4idpD7d3cgQ-WkPufBmtQ0uDx-LV1GcKg0C_3oPTJ76SmjweXIZbm9zABNiNjrdsxZ7LkcNxAEAEcDVGY-UeSdJos-03o3Rltp5Yvj3VnblPo6umhPprYG5_gX546GI-Ob1dlxOuE4PRAnL8FwdGtf4mpZoO_5YLoJEya2ZiIu4mwNV4N1URhxERBsaJdQk52sWd8ZKKpQT80MkG9nM6hUgl8cWBexrjmO7B-EBqtiabeKhBUVvsLa7pgQRfxmSJSQ7r1Fuq220hDwJ1bNX3TFAMhnFVbtQXwbhPT3v0-utcoZz_2mtdCucM7QTiljP5jXBNCmo40S7erV8GVR91oBdbq2l2sAc9LJZLleF7ETJ2REW8pJWuCYWSc8SyLnCUHGrXqPJ_TwA%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=56c4c8db45284498a43881833302b907&_e=mzNgb1CYxhL4idpD7d3cgQ-WkPufBmtQ0uDx-LV1GcKg0C_3oPTJ76SmjweXIZbm9zABNiNjrdsxZ7LkcNxAEAEcDVGY-UeSdJos-03o3Rltp5Yvj3VnblPo6umhPprYG5_gX546GI-Ob1dlxOuE4PRAnL8FwdGtf4mpZoO_5YLoJEya2ZiIu4mwNV4N1URhxERBsaJdQk52sWd8ZKKpQT80MkG9nM6hUgl8cWBexrgnu4M-WfsVmSjsDjFfygXxAmR6UikHc8J3sSFEsX0IUZxWWvoEE3UdFCaMrIcLxBMu_Rx92Hn9vajF4WhwN5DceoEkkiwuM_FdvTHgXjIjD1PVPfzVOxNI_QEXY7sCet1bUhjYpIZ7uYoFFRojdKect8AZNXzPTOaKqnC9_qV3wg%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=56c4c8db45284498a43881833302b907&_e=mzNgb1CYxhL4idpD7d3cgQ-WkPufBmtQ0uDx-LV1GcKg0C_3oPTJ76SmjweXIZbm9zABNiNjrdsxZ7LkcNxAEAEcDVGY-UeSdJos-03o3Rltp5Yvj3VnblPo6umhPprYG5_gX546GI-Ob1dlxOuE4PRAnL8FwdGtf4mpZoO_5YLoJEya2ZiIu4mwNV4N1URhxERBsaJdQk52sWd8ZKKpQT80MkG9nM6hUgl8cWBexrhuZbjdVYKE5Xh78UVaxM97UJXgtZfnZCBeocnn0gS0vW71Kc9LQV-6DXkcrj08dbcgmx9JzD9-7UVTFW5uZEqM77CZ6ow_NJwKBaX05qqbjVuKjRPb1XQo3mnkGS3lUzBT1uhlvCV_Nl9foKC8egUcygF8jtfgsv5TcDJSbbQ-Qw%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=56c4c8db45284498a43881833302b907&_e=mzNgb1CYxhL4idpD7d3cgQ-WkPufBmtQ0uDx-LV1GcKg0C_3oPTJ76SmjweXIZbm9zABNiNjrdsxZ7LkcNxAEAEcDVGY-UeSdJos-03o3Rltp5Yvj3VnblPo6umhPprYG5_gX546GI-Ob1dlxOuE4PRAnL8FwdGtf4mpZoO_5YLoJEya2ZiIu4mwNV4N1URhxERBsaJdQk52sWd8ZKKpQT80MkG9nM6hUgl8cWBexrgt6J_WlezWjQOKWyqDD2Kbc540LjMSlDHFJbus9D4saCdlFYPd2Rnn4i8Fqkgcfib3pLTGRK4x3nv9THNI7hPA9T8Zve7EUu4RhChnw1kSwnGaUlw0c5aiL8e30L4uCc1Jk37G_gJgrB-3hJBWO39XuR2ypotoEa6ivtI3r2OiAg%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=56c4c8db45284498a43881833302b907&_e=mzNgb1CYxhL4idpD7d3cgQ-WkPufBmtQ0uDx-LV1GcKg0C_3oPTJ76SmjweXIZbm9zABNiNjrdsxZ7LkcNxAEAEcDVGY-UeSdJos-03o3Rltp5Yvj3VnblPo6umhPprYG5_gX546GI-Ob1dlxOuE4PRAnL8FwdGtf4mpZoO_5YLoJEya2ZiIu4mwNV4N1URhxERBsaJdQk52sWd8ZKKpQT80MkG9nM6hUgl8cWBexrh8l7LFITzWw3EvMTz5V7YbDe7wYSW-x63mlxY7NLkt5PeXBYRmVSteL1eFv9yJHhy9R9RF_vnXAxCsD7g7QMVT4QU9JxrAHDplBQMvs3HyaWXe7OFV9kWWMTsaNNECILUXKIrbrjG5pVL2X2uJ3wYSZV2UDhu9e6oYRpn-aY7ooA%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=56c4c8db45284498a43881833302b907&_e=mzNgb1CYxhL4idpD7d3cgQ-WkPufBmtQ0uDx-LV1GcKg0C_3oPTJ76SmjweXIZbm9zABNiNjrdsxZ7LkcNxAEAEcDVGY-UeSdJos-03o3Rltp5Yvj3VnblPo6umhPprYG5_gX546GI-Ob1dlxOuE4PRAnL8FwdGtf4mpZoO_5YLoJEya2ZiIu4mwNV4N1URhxERBsaJdQk52sWd8ZKKpQT80MkG9nM6hUgl8cWBexrh9-qljy__t66uHZ0Pqql9Xs-GDcVOCMnJWp2rnQSUgRVFpEAXmP2USgLmdEB9HWjoztxVNX8pt7aTYMIuR3QEH6V60Nv4QIGQ6-ku9FDh2DASaVNLJrAgbMMgVIlXU64BSzRPtakYGhIwFiQrW_Mc1BDit_87rS0PFML7m-fB7wA%3D%3D)

**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)****Actor, Author, and Father**

|

| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[**Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=56c4c8db45284498a43881833302b907&_e=mzNgb1CYxhL4idpD7d3cgQ-WkPufBmtQ0uDx-LV1GcKg0C_3oPTJ76SmjweXIZbm9zABNiNjrdsxZ7LkcNxAEAEcDVGY-UeSdJos-03o3Rltp5Yvj3VnblPo6umhPprYG5_gX546GI-Ob1dlxOuE4PRAnL8FwdGtf4mpZoO_5YLoJEya2ZiIu4mwNV4N1URhxERBsaJdQk52sWd8ZKKpQT80MkG9nM6hUgl8cWBexrh_QFLSzBN-Ln8R-3eUxlsgBQPd8zQ1NIh_M7M6lRA9-O3wkIMWq4tvoVfylzaGbLz9P-5rC05pvy9t3P77JrttUWSfwkPHnmC7P8F6r6AptPava0VLe2UGXwgy5lZ8wg7RvGr-GI_gOTfCCmAbcAyJGhDDs56A2HeBk8Hx8Nebew%3D%3D)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.

don’t miss out on this exclusive chance to sign a card showing your thanks to President Biden!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22769%2E4449941%2ErYKBpx)
---
Out of thousands of Democrats, YOU were selected from your state to sign this exclusive card showing your thanks to President Biden – _so we’re really counting on you to take up this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity!_ [**_The card is closing at 11:55PM SHARP so please don’t waste a second »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58924?t=7&akid=22769%2E4449941%2ErYKBpx) | [Sign our exclusive card for President Biden now! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58924?t=8&akid=22769%2E4449941%2ErYKBpx)
---
**TO:** President Joe Biden
**FROM:** A Grateful Democrat
**Subject:** THANK YOU FOR ALL YOUR HARD WORK! Dear President Joe Biden,

First and foremost, I want to say THANK YOU!

You led our country out of a pandemic and strengthened our economy all while passing a historic agenda – _giving the American people a light in the darkness amidst ongoing MAGA Republican chaos!_

And although the 2024 Presidential Election didn’t go in our favor, we know that the country is better off because of your leadership for the past 4 years.

We anticipate challenges awaiting us during Trump’s presidency, but we are ready to face them head-on knowing that your example of leadership, prioritizing unity, protecting our freedoms, and putting people over politics endures. [**_Despite the relentless attempts from MAGA Republicans to tarnish your legacy, we know that your presidency was vital for our country. So I’m signing this card and chipping in $7 to Fight for Reform to continue to invest in critical state and local battleground races across the nation to show that Democrats will continue the work that you began. »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58924?t=9&akid=22769%2E4449941%2ErYKBpx) **_X A Grateful Democrat_** | [Donate $7 to support our work now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58924?t=10&akid=22769%2E4449941%2ErYKBpx)

️☀️️To all Democrats: 🇺🇸 ️Please don’t scroll past this one-minute read. ️It’s Sunday, January 19. Tomorrow, Trump will be sworn in as our next president — with a Republican Congress and his billionaire allies ready to do his bidding.
We have to be prepared for _anything_ coming our way — from destructive legislation and executive orders to Republican attempts to weaken our democracy. And we have to be prepared on **day one.**
But the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. We’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up right now.

## The Left Is Losing Ground Globally
Are we seeing the end of global leftism? Probably not. For one thing, politics is sort of a fuzzy spectrum; there will always be a left and a right, although things are a little more complicated than that. But there is a reason the Overton Window is a thing, and it can’t go all [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=530c15ab09e44ae88922c1f30c15862b&_e=9swMUjVzzNkH0f3rjArkT2E2TmSFmltLgfDPp2muFhU6BjQ0WjXFPBH6sentCQiGA8orrtBJXgyF0CnjRarqHrZ5Q3wQNeULRD7W628VVSHNsJwBDp6u-zOGGmkLqyx3Jsi_u4Dm1uJ4_Z_R6drIQlctMnK1TB9pC-Gr3fXRvmcn95MCw2nyQoKhGjiQJZelDmCr7_PXeX6UKvz9cFQOsSB4_sDhdT1lMMsj--WTJ6Q6EWDZV0NXGhy8XvkkxPX3)

## Jury Reaches Verdict in CNN Defamation Case – RedState
The jury in the two-week defamation trial between a former military veteran and Mid-East contract evacuation expert, Zachary Young, and news network CNN has returned its verdict. CNN has been found liable for the defamation of Young, and the jury further found that the network acted with malice in its reporting on Young. [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=530c15ab09e44ae88922c1f30c15862b&_e=9swMUjVzzNkH0f3rjArkT2E2TmSFmltLgfDPp2muFhXAHatYSKaBqd--pOGAE--ChbbwL4omxGBvbTAIPphCoJK0dcNNXTnlVG61Ku60uPfSDbGj9qBmfTgmy8Re-VDPTAbEI_ZjJcRCmda9e2kDI3Haqip2PMGeEnk-piRq4_bkLTcMte0tt-1XFyIxjcLOYSgBYYntyzyNcNPoL8MYu273786rNoCKV8Vp6NI8emJ1uB7n4Dd0mGXxvuXaSGiu3g0Gc_Ba135LNcJeas5iRQ%3D%3D)

## Anti-Israel, pro-terrorist activists plan to ‘protest’ Inauguration Day in D.C. * WorldNetDaily * by J.M. Phelps
Crowd at Trump’s first inauguration A conglomerate of anti-Israel, pro-terrorist protestors and others, including a “radical imam,” are planning to attend Inauguration Day Jan. 20 – which prompts the question, will their presence be peaceful or not? “Security will be at the maximum height for the Inauguration,” Ryan Mauro, a national security analyst at the [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=530c15ab09e44ae88922c1f30c15862b&_e=9swMUjVzzNkH0f3rjArkT2E2TmSFmltLgfDPp2muFhXH07c2XtUtL16NIL4UYQG-g4ekUltaLm0dWDU_0FuibP_drgLgohqNE8KpvYrCZegsPix7JH_MpCIGnOsCJ1Nn2rpu5rVP77WQGkuJRPGxE4qo1NPHUliOcbXdbQNg4tHmlOwZLo4Pf-cWXuL9w1L_Aj4j1YHqnxx8huiblzxJMma8lmfqNbgFia5v3HJommIodq2au2PIG2wWI-b9OCkZDzLD4BstwpxQb5QSXMGYwdke1jAy1AtwmNfEjsCSHvJtpVGppgJjVjUsf5ty1d1kgDho561sqZUpCq0MkInB-Vi80nUmLqFax0OGJAUq4Es%3D)
---
| |
## Executive Orders Coming Day 1, Border Czar Tom Homan Says
President-elect Donald Trump is expected to sign a slew of executive order on his first day in office, including multiple that pertain to securing America’s southern border with Mexico. “I think people are going to be pleased with the executive orders he is going to sign,” Tom Homan, Trump’s border czar, told “The Daily Signal [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=530c15ab09e44ae88922c1f30c15862b&_e=9swMUjVzzNkH0f3rjArkT2E2TmSFmltLgfDPp2muFhUG1yc5WUI1Yn-SDmWc-O2Iv3qSL9tOw-mNNfpZLBxdff2JPx8Fb_TiH7YwsrOWUFnlSFPfOEVN5IBXDVIoZS1QpBGg9AqkXsll9_-6hw4NIvDbEPpncaVAoOrXr9Q2eKp2butNLUJXOUdLcla6Gpp4GQBo7VZ7_ikoKhG2B7FA_orZbKZS_qo0ZXZXkZw-HzHo6OqjqL28q1-qRLOsfWfkeq0cE6Mrh15lzQdO6TLOSBtjfK_6CwM63tRxNC8HQpI%3D)

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T34337105-4803-4f37-aaf4-b61e2104e481/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Should Matt Gaetz run for governor? [[YES]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c2af499-2cad-4e85-a4d1-4d9844d9e6ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO!!]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c15cf0a-e14e-445b-b1af-f37ce024bcac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) First: Matt Gaetz represented FL-01 in Congress where he joined Marjorie Taylor Greene and other far-right MAGA Republicans in backing Trump’s attacks on our democracy. Then: In December, the House Ethics Committee revealed that Gaetz had violated House rules – and Florida laws – in reference to his illegal drug use and immoral behaviors. Now: Despite being disgraced, Gaetz is contemplating running to become Florida’s governor...yikes. Do you think it’d be a good idea for him to run, Peter? Take our one-question poll below and let us know.
Should Matt Gaetz run for governor? [[YES]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8964e7ee-7e83-4748-bbe9-94485480a5bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO!!]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07da9c31-fed4-4891-8d9c-5d85acf3ebd8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – The Team at Blue Amp Action

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75703d33-35b2-48f5-95c7-b31169b76186/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**Trump’s appointed judges are already showing corrupt tendencies. What can we expect these next 4 years?** Greetings from Gay Valimont, candidate for FL-1. The recent developments surrounding Trump-appointed Judge Aileen Cannon and the classified documents case against Donald Trump are a stark reminder of the importance of _impartiality and accountability_ in our justice system. When judicial decisions appear to favor political allies over the rule of law, it undermines the very principles of our democracy. April 1st is our final opportunity to make a difference, but _**I** _**_NEED YOUR HELP TODAY._ The clock is ticking before Trump uses these brainwashed MAGA supporters to wreck our rights.**
---
---
People deserve leaders who stand for justice, fairness, and integrity—values that seem to be missing from too many in power today. We need leadership that prioritizes the people and not partisan loyalties. **These are purposeful attacks on our democracy, all curated by the person we are going to see in the Oval Office.** **[We must put an end to these snowballing offenses to our democracy BEFORE IT IS TOO LATE. Rushing $9 over to my campaign will show this Florida judge that she does not have the support of the public, and Trump that we will not sit in silence.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100634730/523405427/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODhmMjllMjktNzZkNi1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6Y9cRvJ5HAdfoZe5OSOHmAA3xl5HIhPj5en3kEM_sY4=)**

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0743bdc02d364d37b5075299beb5f7b2&_e=1hVf7fXy-NvMM4RptvEHIe6_dviMWv4esLJoyGlN2iptwC8UPuJ6oKm9MIp1sF2Z5Au50gkEh9t71onoPyhRJgMGTzGsvZjwPprfp8OVjtCvaAkjYP9jbqmUoWZSlyxjuFn3M6NQyrN9awrqBCqmXKmUuAhsurYXxBf6WYUBW8Mfw497lYhbB4g_cBN0ClGksrCWECPwKMF8S2SBuAzJvXnEbEqBWZHg8Wo6cN2bhkxZFCrrlZTskTppZAoH3Hpf86CwSyCIB9EUytSpXleRdjldGv_de5687gnTWJQo4IW5sdemgKVG1J_HbPc3-Gv-bpsTqmF1Vg2EtywxYCod5AzjFje_oX8VIeq7vDzA5ILYyziqKlxNdtC7WZsw1SbaoFjD73yoCmQcE8TahdzguogZSQOwl_qqlH3aKMSxcJnRhIbUAUMzvVlBDwxdhSOK)
---
| | Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0743bdc02d364d37b5075299beb5f7b2&_e=1hVf7fXy-NvMM4RptvEHIe6_dviMWv4esLJoyGlN2iptwC8UPuJ6oKm9MIp1sF2Z5Au50gkEh9t71onoPyhRJgMGTzGsvZjwPprfp8OVjtCvaAkjYP9jbqmUoWZSlyxjuFn3M6NQyrN9awrqBCqmXKmUuAhsurYXxBf6WYUBW8Mfw497lYhbB4g_cBN0ClGksrCWECPwKMF8S2SBuAzJvXnEbEqBWZHg8Wo6cN2bhkxZFCrrlZTskTppZAoH3Hpf86CwSyCIB9EUytSpXleRdjldGv_de5687gnTWJQo4IV4aBLR_46Yg0XtrzECHq9hGy_drNRhFyuA3_0lQ-eEvtx_K5XTcg-X64n4_GLJ8-dqGtoXfW_sBz_5mxqzbMRPW5dD326bvECLu4iw0fLgU57SmUeeu6bAzK-j_AYBJuIIAFw8eymaF7xPGEYlSu0N)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0743bdc02d364d37b5075299beb5f7b2&_e=1hVf7fXy-NvMM4RptvEHIe6_dviMWv4esLJoyGlN2iptwC8UPuJ6oKm9MIp1sF2Z5Au50gkEh9t71onoPyhRJgMGTzGsvZjwPprfp8OVjtCvaAkjYP9jbqmUoWZSlyxjuFn3M6NQyrN9awrqBCqmXKmUuAhsurYXxBf6WYUBW8Mfw497lYhbB4g_cBN0ClGksrCWECPwKMF8S2SBuAzJvXnEbEqBWZHg8Wo6cN2bhkxZFCrrlZTskTppZAoH3Hpf86CwSyCIB9EUytSpXleRdjldGv_de5687gnTWJQo4IVPYbnjt8V3gHvFo0qqWDdjjrzT48r5QaHvLNjMfC-tpeS5JTdLl3nIu3fZt0SvZB_WGN0iyV0unrDeYNYoJ1bjoBJO8cS9dfAdgidy3Xi4aBKxOgbWpAP_9mnup2Vylkl7B_P02NUYbJW9zGbCDXUD)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0743bdc02d364d37b5075299beb5f7b2&_e=1hVf7fXy-NvMM4RptvEHIe6_dviMWv4esLJoyGlN2iptwC8UPuJ6oKm9MIp1sF2Z5Au50gkEh9t71onoPyhRJgMGTzGsvZjwPprfp8OVjtCvaAkjYP9jbqmUoWZSlyxjuFn3M6NQyrN9awrqBCqmXKmUuAhsurYXxBf6WYUBW8Mfw497lYhbB4g_cBN0ClGksrCWECPwKMF8S2SBuAzJvXnEbEqBWZHg8Wo6cN2bhkxZFCrrlZTskTppZAoH3Hpf86CwSyCIB9EUytSpXleRdjldGv_de5687gnTWJQo4IU9wD6jppdTj1SElwXKg4dEDzpottARMUkVHOCLcf8Nb7ElUeNPgT43b-091sKKjMh01AUulHCeITpHnItbQuSdvjo38VpWbwk2aUkjHZMl3cmWU25Q00yC305omDCiJ5CykOYpliKMWtPhTb9-ZUXW).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=0743bdc02d364d37b5075299beb5f7b2&_t=sLjkiw8uvQvRLn4x_sU8_N6vSFg8FN_yWkpwUNx29Xs9fcBROzkXe08PnnhuO4LD1_EpPNxtSAM5uuR5Buk3Uf05LWyg8gFb-czX5wHebu4UNKRfQb_P_dmaSSyigemp)

body:

Team,
Jocelyn is so grateful she has been able to travel across Michigan and hear from so many people through her Community Conversations tour.
Hearing directly from so many Michiganders is essential to her work to make Michigan better for everyone. Just take a look at these photos from the Community Conversations Tour:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250119-1?refcode=em20250119-1&refcode2=39_181023_DQwZye&akid=39%2E181023%2EDQwZye)
Our team is filled with hope and determination for 2025. Secretary Benson means it when she says that serving Michigan as your Secretary of State is one of the greatest honors of her life.
The past few weeks have been a reminder: **Community over chaos. Our power is in our voice.**
**[Our work continues. Can we count on you to make a contribution of $5, or whatever you can right now, to support Jocelyn Benson’s work for a greater Michigan?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20250119-1?refcode=em20250119-1&refcode2=39_181023_DQwZye&akid=39%2E181023%2EDQwZye)**

Onwards,
Team Benson
