name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Billionaires Bow to Trump’s MAGA Agenda – We Must Fight Back
body:
Inauguration is tomorrow... and there are a few attendees who have more skin in the game than others.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w4rxl-tuh2j4-kyd76rh3/)
---
# **Billionaires Bow to Trump’s MAGA Agenda – We Must Fight Back**
---
|
---
| | | | Hello friend, we need to call this out together. While America grapples with skyrocketing wealth disparity, the world’s richest billionaires are aligning with Donald Trump to secure their power, protect their profits, and deepen the control they hold over our democracy. Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Mark Zuckerberg have shamelessly bent the knee, attending Trump’s inauguration tomorrow as part of a disturbing display of oligarchic unity. These tech titans, whose combined net worth of $885 billion dwarfs the GDP of most nations, are buying their way into Trump’s good graces: **Musk** donated over $250 million to elect Trump and now co-leads an advisory body for his administration. **Bezos** overruled his own Washington Post staff to ensure no endorsement for Vice President Kamala Harris, while Amazon funneled $1 million into Trump’s inaugural fund. **Zuckerberg** reshuffled Meta’s lobbying efforts and policies to align with the incoming Republican administration, also contributing $1 million to Trump’s fund. Their motives are crystal clear: **_tax breaks, deregulation, and an unaccountable grip on industries critical to America’s future,_** from space exploration to AI to digital communications. These billionaires, who once dabbled in bipartisan donations, are now fully embracing Trump’s MAGA agenda to safeguard their empires.
**The Facade Is Gone** No longer is this corruption hidden behind closed doors—it’s blatant, brazen, and on full display. Billionaires like Musk are using their obscene wealth to pick and choose who gets elected, drowning out the voices of everyday Americans. We’re living in an oligarchy where a handful of men dictate policy, control narratives, and prioritize profits over people. And under Trump’s second term, it’s poised to get even worse. Wealth disparity is the highest it’s been since the Gilded Age, and without action, the gap will only widen as billionaires rig the system for their benefit.
**What’s at Stake?** **Meta** faces an antitrust trial that could challenge its monopolistic grip on personal social networks, but Trump’s administration will likely side with Zuckerberg. **Amazon** profits off massive federal contracts, which Trump’s policies will undoubtedly bolster. **SpaceX** thrives as a federal contractor, with Musk sitting at the table to influence policy in his favor. These men are collaborators in a project to secure their dominance while leaving ordinary Americans behind.
**We Must Act** The fight against this oligarchic takeover requires immediate action. Here’s what you can do: **Demand accountability:** Call your representatives and insist on stronger regulations to curb the influence of billionaires in politics. **Support antitrust enforcement:** Push for laws that hold monopolistic corporations like Meta and Amazon accountable. **Raise your voice:** Share this message with your network to expose the dangerous alliance between billionaires and Trump’s MAGA agenda. [**_America’s democracy belongs to the people, not to Musk, Bezos, Zuckerberg, or any other billionaire willing to sell out our country for their profits. Together, we can fight back and restore power to the people. Let’s reclaim our democracy together._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w4rxl-tuh2j5-kyd76rh4/)
---

Thank you for your help on this pressing matter, -No Dem Left Behind Team

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vkCeHscjjxb4CxnS1tgmKHxkj_B0YkFPxUAWppa9Z2Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155059502)
Multiple sources are reporting that anti-immigrant raids will start in Chicago this Tuesday, the day after Inauguration.1 Trump is expected to deploy 200 ICE officers to target immigrant communities. Throughout his entry into right wing politics nearly a decade ago, Trump has painted immigrants as criminals and a threat to the country--a narrative that is not only false but deeply hypocritical. Corporate media has remained complicit, refusing to challenge him on his bigotry and hate.
As an immigrant myself, and as someone fortunate to work as a human rights lawyer, this anti-immigrant hate strikes to my core. But I am not sitting silent, and instead, only increasing my advocacy and work to serve my fellow Americans of all backgrounds. In this piece I debunk Trump's most oft repeated anti-immigrant propaganda, answer some of the most common FAQs, and provide clear action items on how you can work to protect immigrant rights. As I've said before, I cannot do this alone--[I need your partnership](https://substack.com/redirect/6362986b-fd96-4b78-b5cd-a1ab47060b5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I am grateful for your trust and support to stand united against fascism. **Let 's Address This.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ece584ab-604b-45c9-a2d5-a9210c180a18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Donald Trump, an anti-immigrant racist, appears on CNN
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vkCeHscjjxb4CxnS1tgmKHxkj_B0YkFPxUAWppa9Z2Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155059502)
**I 've written this piece in three parts.**
1. Debunking 7 of the most common claims of anti-immigrant propaganda
2. Answering 4 of the most common FAQs on dealing with ICE agents
3. Offering 7 calls to action we can engage in to protect our immigrant neighbors

## Part 1: Debunking ant-immigrant propaganda
### Claim 1: Immigrants increase crime
**Fact:** False. Immigrants, including undocumented immigrants, have lower crime rates than native-born U.S. citizens. This has been consistently documented over not just decades, but over centuries. A Northwestern University study looked at [data going back to 1870 and found](https://substack.com/redirect/064a4761-6589-41a0-a550-e252ef9999ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Using incarceration rates as a proxy for crime, a team of economists analyzed 150 years of U.S. Census data and found immigrants were consistently less likely to be incarcerated than people born in the U.S. They also found beginning in 1960, the incarceration gap widened such that immigrants today are 60% less likely to be incarcerated than the U.S.-born. "Our study shows that since 1870, it has never been the case that immigrants as a group have been more incarcerated than the U.S.-born," Jacome said.
In other words, the more immigrants you have in your neighborhood, the statistically safer is your neighborhood.
### Claim 2: Undocumented immigrants are, by definition, criminals
**Fact:** False. The rhetoric that undocumented immigrants are "criminals" simply by virtue of being undocumented is misleading and disingenuous. Crossing the border without proper documentation is a civil violation, not a criminal one. It's comparable to receiving a parking ticket or speeding ticket--a misdemeanor, not a felony. Moreover, the process to apply for asylum--which is a legal act protected by U.S. and international law--necessarily requires crossing the border without documentation and then applying. Asylum is legal immigration, and undocumented immigration is not a criminal act.
And given that every MAGA accusation seems to be a confession, remember that [Elon Musk was an undocumented immigrant](https://substack.com/redirect/15592006-4077-47a9-8f45-eac9b861c1a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) himself. You can watch the short clip below from 2013, [where Musk's brother admits they were both "illegal immigrants.](https://substack.com/redirect/3feae52b-39d3-451f-ad1b-ebbe88915f92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"
Did not find video
These "illegal immigrants" illegally slept at their office (i.e. were homeless) and didn't even have a car (i.e. low income). Yet now Musk seems to have a short term memory as he demonizes immigrants, particularly undocumented immigrants.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vkCeHscjjxb4CxnS1tgmKHxkj_B0YkFPxUAWppa9Z2Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155059502)
### Claim 3: Undocumented immigrants bring drugs
**Fact:** False. The data is truly staggering at how much drugs are a U.S. citizen problem for which immigrants are being unfairly maligned, and how U.S. policies to restrict documented immigration has exacerbated the drug crisis. Brookings [reports](https://substack.com/redirect/d5d26d5d-6669-4097-b0e1-8ec1b1354323?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
* Annually 88% of drug trafficking is conducted by U.S. citizens, not by immigrants.
* Out of those arrested by Border Patrol for illegal crossings, only 0.02% were found with any fentanyl. Meaning, 99.98% of fentanyl was trafficked at ports of entry and the vast majority of traffickers are U.S. citizens.
* Annual deaths from fentanyl doubled between 2019 and 2021--after the U.S. government banned asylum, a policy that did nothing to curb the problem.

The real solution to America's drug crisis requires focusing on comprehensive drug policy reform, smarter border management to target actual traffickers, and a humane immigration system built on justice. Demonizing immigrants achieves none of this.
### Claim 4: Immigrants drain the economy
**Fact:** False. Countless studies quantify the immense economic benefit immigrants, and undocumented immigrants, contribute to the U.S. economy. Far from "taking Black jobs," [as Trump claims](https://substack.com/redirect/5a90fdf8-1722-42e4-80a9-0315f6745ac3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), immigrants ignite the economy and decrease overall unemployment. And while I can cite numerous studies, I'll opt to cite one by the George W. Bush Institute, lest someone accuse me of cherry picking a left leaning organization. The [Bush study concludes](https://substack.com/redirect/3cc49146-d30a-47b4-abcb-01369ddd4a50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Immigration fuels the economy. When immigrants enter the labor force, they increase the productive capacity of the economy and raise GDP. Their incomes rise, but so do those of natives. It's a phenomenon dubbed the "immigration surplus," and it amounts to $36 to $72 billion per year.
But what about undocumented immigrants? The Institute of Taxation and Economic Policy ("ITEP") reports a shocking fact that no fair minded person could argue is bad for the economy. [ITEP concludes](https://substack.com/redirect/5e81f6e6-2b7e-4276-ba05-04cc7d5b3d62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Undocumented immigrants paid $96.7 billion in federal, state, and local taxes in 2022. Most of that amount, $59.4 billion, was paid to the federal government while the remaining $37.3 billion was paid to state and local governments.
For perspective, undocumented immigrants pay more in taxes than the entire GDP of at least 10 U.S. states. These are taxes they pay towards our Medicare, Medicaid, and social service programs, for which they receive no benefit whatsoever. That's also more in taxes annually than Musk or Trump will ever pay in a lifetime.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vkCeHscjjxb4CxnS1tgmKHxkj_B0YkFPxUAWppa9Z2Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155059502)
### Claim 5: Immigrants are lazy & collect welfare.
**Fact:** False. Most immigrants, [including undocumented immigrants, are ineligible for federal public benefits](https://substack.com/redirect/42515b8c-f29c-42a1-8251-b2f983c530a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) such as welfare, food stamps (SNAP), Medicaid, and Supplemental Security Income (SSI). According to U.S. law, lawful permanent residents (green card holders) must wait at least five years before they can access these benefits. Undocumented immigrants and certain temporary visa holders are entirely ineligible for most federal welfare programs.
It's fascinating how immigrants are somehow both lazy and collect welfare, and also stealing our jobs. Behold, _Schr odinger's immigrant_!
### Claim 6: Immigrants bring diseases into the U.S.
**Fact:** False. [Immigrants have higher vaccination rates than U.S. citizens](https://substack.com/redirect/cee9fee0-14c8-4237-8b0e-e9a1ad8c73c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). So not only are they less likely to carry diseases, they are also more likely to help prevent the spread of illnesses. This myth is particularly dangerous because the Trump administration is using it to literally "find a disease" they can use as an excuse to invoke Title 42 and close the border to all new immigration.2
### Claim 7: Immigrants hurt American innovation.
**Fact:** False. Immigrants have long been drivers of American entrepreneurship and innovation. Did you know that [44% of Fortune 500 companies were founded by immigrants or their children](https://substack.com/redirect/f38e1bc2-dc8c-4187-9f0e-437a90466990?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? That's 224 of the most successful companies in America today. These companies create jobs, stimulate growth, and solidify the U.S. as a leader in the global economy. Millions of Americans are employed today, most of whom are U.S. citizens, due to immigrant ingenuity. Instead of stifling economic progress, immigrants are at the forefront of ensuring our economic success.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vkCeHscjjxb4CxnS1tgmKHxkj_B0YkFPxUAWppa9Z2Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155059502)
## Part 2: Answering FAQs
Next, here are answers to four of the most common questions I've received on how to protect yourself during these ICE raids. Feel free to post additional questions in the comments and I will do my best to answer them, or direct you to the right resource.
### 1\. In light of ICE raids, should I send my child to school?
Student and child safety is of paramount importance. If you live in Chicago, contact the Chicago Board of Education (CBE) and the Chicago Teacher's Union (CTU). Fortunately, both CBE and CTU have committed to protecting undocumented students, and ensuring their safety and security.
* Call the CBE at (773) 553-1600 or email them [here](https://substack.com/redirect/b462e42f-f398-458c-8a16-b4112fae847d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* Call CTU at (312)-329-910 or email them [here](https://substack.com/redirect/7a3b64a8-1333-43ed-9591-29ae7ba3e4c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

If you live in another city, do not wait for the Trump administration announces future raids. Call your local board of education and teacher's union now to understand what steps they are taking to protect your children, and how you can be involved. I especially ask those who do not have undocumented children to stand firm as an ally--contact your local board of education and teacher's union and ask them how you can get involved.
### 2\. What do I do if I am stopped by ICE?
ICE is short for Immigration and Customs Enforcement. If stopped by an ICE agent, do your best to remain calm. And while the following information is not official legal advice (mandatory disclaimer), this is what I would and have advised my legal clients.
* Have memorized your A number, phone number of your lawyer, and of your family.
* Do not speak to ICE agents without your lawyer present. If you are asked to speak, give testimony, or sign any document--exercise your right to remain silent.
* Do not lie or give false documents or false statements. Know that ICE agents are allowed to lie to you to get you to speak. You are not allowed to lie to ICE agents.
* If an ICE agent appears your door, you do not have to allow them to enter your home unless they have a criminal search warrant signed by a judge. You are completely within your rights to turn them away, or refuse to open the door, if they do not provide you a signed warrant.

In short, the only words you should say to ICE agents are to ask if they have a warrant for your arrest. If they do not, send them on their way. If they do, then request to speak with your lawyer and say no more to ICE. Citizen or not, documented immigrant or not--your documentation status does not restrict your right to speak to a lawyer. Exercise your rights.
### 3\. Should I call local police for help?
Calling the Chicago Police, or police at all, to stop ICE officers is not a great idea. While the Chicago PD has announced they will not assist ICE in rounding up immigrants, they will also not interfere with ICE officers, stating:
> The Chicago Police Department enforces the City of Chicago's Municipal Code, which includes the Welcoming City Ordinance. CPD does not document immigration status, and in accordance with the ordinance, does not share information with federal immigration authorities. We will not intervene or interfere with any other government agencies performing their duties.
Likewise, certain jurisdictions have what are known as 287g agreements (I elaborate on them below) and in such a situation, calling your local police potentially obliges them to arrest you on behalf of ICE. If you have questions or concerns on how to respond to ICE agents, call your lawyer, and let your lawyer speak on your behalf.
### 4\. What If I do not have a lawyer?
It is advisable to reach out to lawyers ahead of time in case you need to call them in an emergency. You can (and need to be) fully transparent with your lawyer about your immigration status. They will only be able to assist you if they have all the information needed at hand. If English is not your preferred language, most law firms have lawyers that can speak multiple languages, or have access to translators.
If you are arrested and cannot afford a lawyer, ask for a public defender. Especially if you are being charged with a crime, wait for your public defender. And to repeat yet again, no matter what, do not speak to law enforcement without a lawyer present.

## Part 3: How Americans can help protect immigrants and immigrant communities
Some of the seven action items below have immediate effect and others take time. I ask you to engage in both types of calls to action. We must act quickly to protect our immigrant neighbors now, and build capacity to change fascist policy in the future.
### **1\. Activate**
Get involved in your local politics. Whether it is your local school board, your local city council, or your local immigrant rights organization--get involved. Show up to the next meeting, meet your local elected officials, and understand the local issues impacting your community. Google is your friend in finding a local calendar of events. Use it. All politics is local, and it is critical you get involved locally.
### **2\. Communicate**
Contact your member of Congress ([find them here](https://substack.com/redirect/5a663da0-14bd-48fd-98bc-3b915eda391f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) and relentlessly remind them that you do not support mass deportations. Instead, you do support due process of law, a humane immigration policy, and equal rights for immigrants. Ensure they hear your outrage as much as possible.
### **3\. Invest**
Invest your time and your money into the people and organizations doing the front line work. If you have time to volunteer, make phone calls, knock doors, and sign petitions, do so. If you have the financial resources to donate to organizations working to protect our democracy, like the Chicago based [National Immigrant Justice Center](https://substack.com/redirect/b86a5377-a451-4011-b26c-5507de5061b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), please do so.
### **4\. Educate**
It is critical we remain informed on the key issues, by educating ourselves and those around us. As corporate media sadly continues to capitulate to fascism, support writers and human rights lawyers working to stop fascism in America (e.g. [like yours truly](https://substack.com/redirect/6362986b-fd96-4b78-b5cd-a1ab47060b5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). Read the work of non-profit media like ProPublica, The Appeal, and more. We may not have the billions of dollars in dark money from corporate autocrats, but we have strength in numbers and your support makes that difference.
### **5\. Organize**
Bring friends with you. You are the best ambassador for justice in your friend group--lead by example. Grab even one friend and drag them with you to the next school board meeting, city council session, or town hall in your local community. We need to build organizational capacity, and means each one reaches one to get involved. (And when your friend comes to the second meeting, it is their opportunity to reach one more and bring them with).
### **6\. Sanctuary Locations**
During the previous Trump administration, reports estimate 800 or more churches, synagogues, and other houses of worship established themselves as sanctuary locations for immigrants. These are locations that invited immigrants who feared deportation to remain within their walls for housing, food, and safety. To be clear, these sanctuary locations have no particular legal authority, and ICE agents can still procure a warrant to search sanctuary locations and arrest anyone a judge has authorized for arrest.
However, certain faith groups established sanctuary locations anyway as another line of protection and safety for those fearing such raids, which required ICE to have to make the decision of whether they want to violently raid a house of worship. And given the imminent passing of the Laken Riley Act, which allows authorities to arrest and deport immigrants on the mere accusation of a crime3--including petty and non-violent crimes like shoplifting--sanctuary locations may see an increase in this Trump administration.
### **7\. Repeal 287g Agreements**
While we cannot immediately change federal law at the local level, we can more quickly limit the impact of abusive federal rules on the local level. Let me explain with how 287g agreements work--and why we must repeal them. Here's the background. The Illegal Immigration Reform and Immigrant Responsibility Act of 1996 added Section 287(g) to the Immigration and Nationality Act. This authorized ICE to force state and local police to do what ICE wants them to do--in this case, round up immigrants.4
In other words, 287g agreements allow federal ICE officers to require local and state police officers to work for them. These agreements are why it's incredibly risky to call local police on immigration issues. And it is a devastating policy for several reasons:
* It pulls local human resources for local needs and forces them to do federal work.
* It puts women suffering abuse at risk. If an undocumented woman is suffering abuse, her abuser knows that she cannot go to law enforcement without fear of deportation, separation from her children, or permanent detention. Thus, 287g agreements perpetuate the cycle of abuse countless women already face.
* There's no evidence this agreement makes us safer. In fact, a detailed study by the National Institute of Justice across 167 counties that enforce 287g agreements, "_found no evidence that 287(g) arrangements were linked to meaningful crime reduction_."5
* On the contrary, there have been hundreds and hundreds of reported cases of sexual abuse committed by ICE agents in detention facilities, and few of them are ever investigated or resolved.6 To ask ICE to round up immigrants, while ICE itself has a documented history of epidemic sexual abuse, is the height of absurdity and hypocrisy.

Currently, ICE has some form of a 287g agreement with hundreds of police departments across 25 states--[which I have uploaded here](https://substack.com/redirect/af4a584b-5002-474f-9126-0ad91c68ee09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for your convenience.
Here's the key call to action--287g agreements cannot go into effect until local government approves their enforcement. That means, if your locality has a 287g agreement in place, it is because your local elected officials voted for it. Therefore, they can be repealed with that same local authority. And that local authority will only act to repeal these abusive agreements if local citizens activate, organize, and invest in that change. So, if you live in one of the states or localities listed above, advocate to your city council, mayor, or relevant governing authority to repeal this harmful agreement and instead uphold meaningful justice.
And if you do not live in such a locality, you can still petition your local government to pass ordinances to protect immigrants from abusive federal enforcement. Or, perhaps consider other options like establishing a sanctuary location, while knowing the practical and legal risks that come with such a decision.

## In Conclusion
Trump's anti-immigrant raids will hurt the American people, the U.S. economy, and betrays our constitutional right to equal justice and due process. No one is claiming that the U.S. immigration system is perfect. However, the facts are clear--immigrants make our country safer, healthier, and stronger economically. Rather than falling for political propaganda that demonizes immigrants, we should focus on meaningful immigration reform that maximizes public safety, economic growth, and public health.
My immense gratitude to those who are investing their time, money, and efforts to uphold meaningful justice in America, including for immigrant communities. Do not lose hope. Instead, double down your efforts. Be relentless. In standing united, we can build a fairer, more just, and more effective immigration system that continues to advance American growth and success.

Offering 7 calls to action we can engage in to protect our immigrant neighbors Part 1: Debunking ant-immigrant propaganda Claim 1: Immigrants increase crime Fact: False. Immigrants, including undocumented immigrants, have lower crime rates than native-born U.S. citizens. This has been consistently documented over not just decades, but over centuries. A Northwestern University study looked at : Using incarceration rates as a proxy for crime, a team of economists analyzed 150 years of U.S. Census data and found immigrants were consistently less likely to be incarcerated than people born in the U.S. They also found beginning in 1960, the incarceration gap widened such that immigrants today are 60% less likely to be incarcerated than the U.S.-born. "Our study shows that since 1870, it has never been the case that immigrants as a group have been more incarcerated than the U.S.-born," Jacome said. In other words, the more immigrants you have in your neighborhood, the statistically safer is your neighborhood. Claim 2: Undocumented immigrants are, by definition, criminals Fact: False. The rhetoric that undocumented immigrants are "criminals" simply by virtue of being undocumented is misleading and disingenuous. Crossing the border without proper documentation is a civil violation, not a criminal one. It's comparable to receiving a parking ticket or speeding ticket--a misdemeanor, not a felony. Moreover, the process to apply for asylum--which is a legal act protected by U.S. and international law--necessarily requires crossing the border without documentation and then applying. Asylum is legal immigration, and undocumented immigration is not a criminal act. And given that every MAGA accusation seems to be a confession, remember that himself. You can watch the short clip below from 2013, " Did not find video These "illegal immigrants" illegally slept at their office (i.e. were homeless) and didn't even have a car (i.e. low income). Yet now Musk seems to have a short term memory as he demonizes immigrants, particularly undocumented immigrants. Claim 3: Undocumented immigrants bring drugs Fact: False. The data is truly staggering at how much drugs are a U.S. citizen problem for which immigrants are being unfairly maligned, and how U.S. policies to restrict documented immigration has exacerbated the drug crisis. Brookings : Annually 88% of drug trafficking is conducted by U.S. citizens, not by immigrants. Out of those arrested by Border Patrol for illegal crossings, only 0.02% were found with any fentanyl. Meaning, 99.98% of fentanyl was trafficked at ports of entry and the vast majority of traffickers are U.S. citizens. Annual deaths from fentanyl doubled between 2019 and 2021--after the U.S. government banned asylum, a policy that did nothing to curb the problem. The real solution to America's drug crisis requires focusing on comprehensive drug policy reform, smarter border management to target actual traffickers, and a humane immigration system built on justice. Demonizing immigrants achieves none of this. Claim 4: Immigrants drain the economy Fact: False. Countless studies quantify the immense economic benefit immigrants, and undocumented immigrants, contribute to the U.S. economy. Far from "taking Black jobs," , immigrants ignite the economy and decrease overall unemployment. And while I can cite numerous studies, I'll opt to cite one by the George W. Bush Institute, lest someone accuse me of cherry picking a left leaning organization. The : Immigration fuels the economy. When immigrants enter the labor force, they increase the productive capacity of the economy and raise GDP. Their incomes rise, but so do those of natives. It's a phenomenon dubbed the "immigration surplus," and it amounts to $36 to $72 billion per year. But what about undocumented immigrants? The Institute of Taxation and Economic Policy ("ITEP") reports a shocking fact that no fair minded person could argue is bad for the economy. : Undocumented immigrants paid $96.7 billion in federal, state, and local taxes in 2022. Most of that amount, $59.4 billion, was paid to the federal government while the remaining $37.3 billion was paid to state and local governments. For perspective, undocumented immigrants pay more in taxes than the entire GDP of at least 10 U.S. states. These are taxes they pay towards our Medicare, Medicaid, and social service programs, for which they receive no benefit whatsoever. That's also more in taxes annually than Musk or Trump will ever pay in a lifetime. Claim 5: Immigrants are lazy & collect welfare. Fact: False. Most immigrants, such as welfare, food stamps (SNAP), Medicaid, and Supplemental Security Income (SSI). According to U.S. law, lawful permanent residents (green card holders) must wait at least five years before they can access these benefits. Undocumented immigrants and certain temporary visa holders are entirely ineligible for most federal welfare programs. It's fascinating how immigrants are somehow both lazy and collect welfare, and also stealing our jobs. Behold, Schr odinger's immigrant! Claim 6: Immigrants bring diseases into the U.S. Fact: False. . So not only are they less likely to carry diseases, they are also more likely to help prevent the spread of illnesses. This myth is particularly dangerous because the Trump administration is using it to literally "find a disease" they can use as an excuse to invoke Title 42 and close the border to all new immigration.2 Claim 7: Immigrants hurt American innovation. Fact: False. Immigrants have long been drivers of American entrepreneurship and innovation. Did you know that ? That's 224 of the most successful companies in America today. These companies create jobs, stimulate growth, and solidify the U.S. as a leader in the global economy. Millions of Americans are employed today, most of whom are U.S. citizens, due to immigrant ingenuity. Instead of stifling economic progress, immigrants are at the forefront of ensuring our economic success. Part 2: Answering FAQs Next, here are answers to four of the most common questions I've received on how to protect yourself during these ICE raids. Feel free to post additional questions in the comments and I will do my best to answer them, or direct you to the right resource. 1\. In light of ICE raids, should I send my child to school? Student and child safety is of paramount importance. If you live in Chicago, contact the Chicago Board of Education (CBE) and the Chicago Teacher's Union (CTU). Fortunately, both CBE and CTU have committed to protecting undocumented students, and ensuring their safety and security. Call the CBE at (773) 553-1600 or email them . Call CTU at (312)-329-910 or email them . If you live in another city, do not wait for the Trump administration announces future raids. Call your local board of education and teacher's union now to understand what steps they are taking to protect your children, and how you can be involved. I especially ask those who do not have undocumented children to stand firm as an ally--contact your local board of education and teacher's union and ask them how you can get involved. 2\. What do I do if I am stopped by ICE? ICE is short for Immigration and Customs Enforcement. If stopped by an ICE agent, do your best to remain calm. And while the following information is not official legal advice (mandatory disclaimer), this is what I would and have advised my legal clients. Have memorized your A number, phone number of your lawyer, and of your family. Do not speak to ICE agents without your lawyer present. If you are asked to speak, give testimony, or sign any document--exercise your right to remain silent. Do not lie or give false documents or false statements. Know that ICE agents are allowed to lie to you to get you to speak. You are not allowed to lie to ICE agents. If an ICE agent appears your door, you do not have to allow them to enter your home unless they have a criminal search warrant signed by a judge. You are completely within your rights to turn them away, or refuse to open the door, if they do not provide you a signed warrant. In short, the only words you should say to ICE agents are to ask if they have a warrant for your arrest. If they do not, send them on their way. If they do, then request to speak with your lawyer and say no more to ICE. Citizen or not, documented immigrant or not--your documentation status does not restrict your right to speak to a lawyer. Exercise your rights. 3\. Should I call local police for help? Calling the Chicago Police, or police at all, to stop ICE officers is not a great idea. While the Chicago PD has announced they will not assist ICE in rounding up immigrants, they will also not interfere with ICE officers, stating: The Chicago Police Department enforces the City of Chicago's Municipal Code, which includes the Welcoming City Ordinance. CPD does not document immigration status, and in accordance with the ordinance, does not share information with federal immigration authorities. We will not intervene or interfere with any other government agencies performing their duties. Likewise, certain jurisdictions have what are known as 287g agreements (I elaborate on them below) and in such a situation, calling your local police potentially obliges them to arrest you on behalf of ICE. If you have questions or concerns on how to respond to ICE agents, call your lawyer, and let your lawyer speak on your behalf. 4\. What If I do not have a lawyer? It is advisable to reach out to lawyers ahead of time in case you need to call them in an emergency. You can (and need to be) fully transparent with your lawyer about your immigration status. They will only be able to assist you if they have all the information needed at hand. If English is not your preferred language, most law firms have lawyers that can speak multiple languages, or have access to translators. If you are arrested and cannot afford a lawyer, ask for a public defender. Especially if you are being charged with a crime, wait for your public defender. And to repeat yet again, no matter what, do not speak to law enforcement without a lawyer present. Part 3: How Americans can help protect immigrants and immigrant communities Some of the seven action items below have immediate effect and others take time. I ask you to engage in both types of calls to action. We must act quickly to protect our immigrant neighbors now, and build capacity to change fascist policy in the future. 1\. Activate Get involved in your local politics. Whether it is your local school board, your local city council, or your local immigrant rights organization--get involved. Show up to the next meeting, meet your local elected officials, and understand the local issues impacting your community. Google is your friend in finding a local calendar of events. Use it. All politics is local, and it is critical you get involved locally. 2\. Communicate Contact your member of Congress () and relentlessly remind them that you do not support mass deportations. Instead, you do support due process of law, a humane immigration policy, and equal rights for immigrants. Ensure they hear your outrage as much as possible. 3\. Invest Invest your time and your money into the people and organizations doing the front line work. If you have time to volunteer, make phone calls, knock doors, and sign petitions, do so. If you have the financial resources to donate to organizations working to protect our democracy, like the Chicago based , please do so. 4\. Educate It is critical we remain informed on the key issues, by educating ourselves and those around us. As corporate media sadly continues to capitulate to fascism, support writers and human rights lawyers working to stop fascism in America (e.g. ). Read the work of non-profit media like ProPublica, The Appeal, and more. We may not have the billions of dollars in dark money from corporate autocrats, but we have strength in numbers and your support makes that difference. 5\. Organize Bring friends with you. You are the best ambassador for justice in your friend group--lead by example. Grab even one friend and drag them with you to the next school board meeting, city council session, or town hall in your local community. We need to build organizational capacity, and means each one reaches one to get involved. (And when your friend comes to the second meeting, it is their opportunity to reach one more and bring them with). 6\. Sanctuary Locations During the previous Trump administration, reports estimate 800 or more churches, synagogues, and other houses of worship established themselves as sanctuary locations for immigrants. These are locations that invited immigrants who feared deportation to remain within their walls for housing, food, and safety. To be clear, these sanctuary locations have no particular legal authority, and ICE agents can still procure a warrant to search sanctuary locations and arrest anyone a judge has authorized for arrest. However, certain faith groups established sanctuary locations anyway as another line of protection and safety for those fearing such raids, which required ICE to have to make the decision of whether they want to violently raid a house of worship. And given the imminent passing of the Laken Riley Act, which allows authorities to arrest and deport immigrants on the mere accusation of a crime3--including petty and non-violent crimes like shoplifting--sanctuary locations may see an increase in this Trump administration. 7\. Repeal 287g Agreements While we cannot immediately change federal law at the local level, we can more quickly limit the impact of abusive federal rules on the local level. Let me explain with how 287g agreements work--and why we must repeal them. Here's the background. The Illegal Immigration Reform and Immigrant Responsibility Act of 1996 added Section 287(g) to the Immigration and Nationality Act. This authorized ICE to force state and local police to do what ICE wants them to do--in this case, round up immigrants.4 In other words, 287g agreements allow federal ICE officers to require local and state police officers to work for them. These agreements are why it's incredibly risky to call local police on immigration issues. And it is a devastating policy for several reasons: It pulls local human resources for local needs and forces them to do federal work. It puts women suffering abuse at risk. If an undocumented woman is suffering abuse, her abuser knows that she cannot go to law enforcement without fear of deportation, separation from her children, or permanent detention. Thus, 287g agreements perpetuate the cycle of abuse countless women already face. There's no evidence this agreement makes us safer. In fact, a detailed study by the National Institute of Justice across 167 counties that enforce 287g agreements, "found no evidence that 287(g) arrangements were linked to meaningful crime reduction."5 On the contrary, there have been hundreds and hundreds of reported cases of sexual abuse committed by ICE agents in detention facilities, and few of them are ever investigated or resolved.6 To ask ICE to round up immigrants, while ICE itself has a documented history of epidemic sexual abuse, is the height of absurdity and hypocrisy. Currently, ICE has some form of a 287g agreement with hundreds of police departments across 25 states-- for your convenience. Here's the key call to action--287g agreements cannot go into effect until local government approves their enforcement. That means, if your locality has a 287g agreement in place, it is because your local elected officials voted for it. Therefore, they can be repealed with that same local authority. And that local authority will only act to repeal these abusive agreements if local citizens activate, organize, and invest in that change. So, if you live in one of the states or localities listed above, advocate to your city council, mayor, or relevant governing authority to repeal this harmful agreement and instead uphold meaningful justice. And if you do not live in such a locality, you can still petition your local government to pass ordinances to protect immigrants from abusive federal enforcement. Or, perhaps consider other options like establishing a sanctuary location, while knowing the practical and legal risks that come with such a decision. In Conclusion Trump's anti-immigrant raids will hurt the American people, the U.S. economy, and betrays our constitutional right to equal justice and due process. No one is claiming that the U.S. immigration system is perfect. However, the facts are clear--immigrants make our country safer, healthier, and stronger economically. Rather than falling for political propaganda that demonizes immigrants, we should focus on meaningful immigration reform that maximizes public safety, economic growth, and public health. My immense gratitude to those who are investing their time, money, and efforts to uphold meaningful justice in America, including for immigrant communities. Do not lose hope. Instead, double down your efforts. Be relentless. In standing united, we can build a fairer, more just, and more effective immigration system that continues to advance American growth and success. # Reporter tries to book a room at a secret NYC migrant hotel, it doesn't go well...
PolitiBrawl's Matt Miller tried to book a room at the historic Roosevelt Hotel in Manhattan, which has been closed to the public and converted into a migrant shelter using New Yorkers' tax dollars.
Miller was quickly met by unfriendly security guards as he tried to walk inside.
"Can I stay here tonight?"

# Trump's Cabinet picks stood like spartans against a bitter democrat onslaught

This week, we witnessed the kind of political theater that Washington loves; the democrats were utterly humiliated by Trump's new team of spartans. Trump has chosen some of the brightest stars for his Cabinet, and they've more than proven their mettle during the Senate confirmation hearings. I'm talking, of course, about Pete Hegseth, Pam Bondi, and Kristi Noem - three individuals who not only demonstrated their qualifications but also showed the Democrats a thing or two about toughness and resilience.
Let's start with Pete Hegseth, Trump's pick for Secretary of Defense. The Democrats tried to throw everything at him - from personal smears to questioning his credentials. But Hegseth, a decorated combat veteran and a voice of reason on Fox News, stood firm...

Donald Trump has finalized plans to move his second inauguration indoors tomorrow, with temperatures in the DC area expected to reach a high of 23°F.
That's not exactly unusual. In the 236 year-history of US Presidents being sworn in, and the 88 years since Inauguration Day was moved to January 20, several Presidents have moved the swearing in ceremony indoors, following a rather grim series of events in US history.
The first outdoor inauguration was that of James Monroe in 1817, but those early events were typically held on March 4 or 5. Despite the nearly-springtime schedule, however, the outdoor events led to many deaths - including a US President.
William Henry Harrison caught pneumonia on his March 4, 1841 inauguration day and died a month later. Franklin Pierce braved a massive snowstorm in DC during his inauguration on March 4, 1953, and his predecessor's wife died a few weeks later from sitting in the cold, wet, exposed cold for hours.
FDR's second inauguration was the first in US history to be held on January 20, breaking a 148-year tradition of springtime ceremonies, following the passage of the 20th Amendment to the US Constitution. The move to January was done to shorten the transition period between elections and inauguration...

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: You'll want this in your home in 2025
body:
Please -- for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0181eadbb9ca4b32993621130af732b5&_e=KiNNNIsFKvCy5BcpgIAMyHxfA1ZyvRwWfJj5-45rKAZDNFNyKu4nNWDmyc60jd-0BLa-C07MzOQz29ARwitCfbP2MRE4rg8J39oJzt1-lwFNzJy0wymGsNChAtxFJb1VgOOxRrN9TH4kPSpVQRDzXBCL5eI7zYYnXtkGKxo4965bANlS0IhhjsZuZZjaY-yeZwrbHlr8P28LkwlLQjHTLsRC545Ba48oxzL5RfS8VrjOoLzCksYoDI8MjiVeHK67cw3-cGT0XiJjucZ5EZepigX4vRIR_Dmk6kiUkTCORTB-OxmylxTSF92xcER9v88nqefvlXwXgVU8mr2vvknQd_a0awI0wxJSTI8o9Bqh_m4EaCsZkomRrkgOHZKXO3bOTxJSbo4FSpZhNPMzgaxJZQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0181eadbb9ca4b32993621130af732b5&_e=KiNNNIsFKvCy5BcpgIAMyHxfA1ZyvRwWfJj5-45rKAZDNFNyKu4nNWDmyc60jd-0BLa-C07MzOQz29ARwitCfbP2MRE4rg8J39oJzt1-lwFNzJy0wymGsNChAtxFJb1VgOOxRrN9TH4kPSpVQRDzXBCL5eI7zYYnXtkGKxo4965bANlS0IhhjsZuZZjaY-yeZwrbHlr8P28LkwlLQjHTLsRC545Ba48oxzL5RfS8VrjOoLzCksYoDI8MjiVeHK6749KY867USzYmDQYCOfdWC9EBbz5RinN_9XU_BFdfArXmk2S_aymn5rYdLs5DjibO6PyqHmjtAGO0kzINtctZ3Pq-a7hG2AA39siCkHS1k_64qd3sEB7scw8SFEuMkZn0GkBYZaZPrJbCJRSLpmcddQ%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0181eadbb9ca4b32993621130af732b5&_e=KiNNNIsFKvCy5BcpgIAMyHxfA1ZyvRwWfJj5-45rKAZDNFNyKu4nNWDmyc60jd-0BLa-C07MzOQz29ARwitCfbP2MRE4rg8J39oJzt1-lwFNzJy0wymGsNChAtxFJb1VgOOxRrN9TH4kPSpVQRDzXBCL5eI7zYYnXtkGKxo4965bANlS0IhhjsZuZZjaY-yeZwrbHlr8P28LkwlLQjHTLsRC545Ba48oxzL5RfS8VrjOoLzCksYoDI8MjiVeHK67X4zRG9gYBRiYbBsHSz0GBgiY9CT2VVnYX8uwsNnKRcg28IHRId6ngTSSYlC6jsbLkD5EwoU725JOGHOAIEreWm74XrGIeb7ofCaCX4IJ1Gw4KfaO8qFD65Yo26BbvzkGXo1vpadj3aR905eyZTKxBg%3D%3D) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0181eadbb9ca4b32993621130af732b5&_e=KiNNNIsFKvCy5BcpgIAMyHxfA1ZyvRwWfJj5-45rKAZDNFNyKu4nNWDmyc60jd-0BLa-C07MzOQz29ARwitCfbP2MRE4rg8J39oJzt1-lwFNzJy0wymGsNChAtxFJb1VgOOxRrN9TH4kPSpVQRDzXBCL5eI7zYYnXtkGKxo4965bANlS0IhhjsZuZZjaY-yeZwrbHlr8P28LkwlLQjHTLsRC545Ba48oxzL5RfS8VrjOoLzCksYoDI8MjiVeHK677swH9lvjbvkIMnjNCEM9yrh5ttDwRAPIhm6_58miOsggM0Bmo6fBGAMQPppgMancx-qvelrrjbnpAt2PE0tz8KCY7H-eFTbtJn5XTtkuno0c2kzCs9drY-3Fg_43L8A-PL6AgOiCRDATDm-0ZyNitA%3D%3D)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0181eadbb9ca4b32993621130af732b5&_e=KiNNNIsFKvCy5BcpgIAMyHxfA1ZyvRwWfJj5-45rKAZDNFNyKu4nNWDmyc60jd-0BLa-C07MzOQz29ARwitCfbP2MRE4rg8J39oJzt1-lwFNzJy0wymGsNChAtxFJb1VgOOxRrN9TH4kPSpVQRDzXBCL5eI7zYYnXtkGKxo4965bANlS0IhhjsZuZZjaY-yeZwrbHlr8P28LkwlLQjHTLsRC545Ba48oxzL5RfS8VrjOoLzCksYoDI8MjiVeHK67DkR8GnSfbba-Df4P-oavzTPBX9Zp6Sf2qYHkbGVWyKXEZMHjSItgVmcMPIAWLP0k5lH3EjPIcbSVekXuVULk3gTDCReXAnEeCqjwWXD8RZErFjkSxqaBct9d5qRZ6yJeks49FleV2BKa3mvjeHI8ZA%3D%3D)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0181eadbb9ca4b32993621130af732b5&_e=KiNNNIsFKvCy5BcpgIAMyHxfA1ZyvRwWfJj5-45rKAZDNFNyKu4nNWDmyc60jd-0BLa-C07MzOQz29ARwitCfbP2MRE4rg8J39oJzt1-lwFNzJy0wymGsNChAtxFJb1VgOOxRrN9TH4kPSpVQRDzXBCL5eI7zYYnXtkGKxo4965bANlS0IhhjsZuZZjaY-yeZwrbHlr8P28LkwlLQjHTLsRC545Ba48oxzL5RfS8VrjOoLzCksYoDI8MjiVeHK674GvFzwhqkN7dUJd46m7yZ8imKuCs7XJsnP26-nrDqYWxUF8HqshgxEc05Y1ahVAIRmCtnYWBDu9Cxhj9H70WMzTtQ5MoaGfTGg7YtTqSNFOEZbQ4CJVqe9Nq_xgt04ar6OJmjQQEh_bYn5pXcLahlQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Please -- for the sake of all our families | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Tulsi Gabbard’s former aides believe she is a Russian asset, yet Trump is moving forward with her as his pick for the Director of National Intelligence (DNI). Gabbard has a troubling history of aligning herself with Russian interests, often appearing on state-sponsored media platforms that promote disinformation, spread conspiracy theories and undermine our democracy. **Gabbard’s actions have raised serious concerns about her loyalty and judgment. We need your voice now more than ever!** **[Tell your Senators to protect the integrity of our intelligence agencies and ensure that they are led by individuals who truly have our nation’s best interests at heart. “Behind closed doors, people think she might be compromised. Like it’s not hyperbole,” one Republican Senate aide told The Hill. “There are members of our conference who think she’s a [Russian] asset.”
According to three of her former staffers, she regularly consumed Russian media, even after being told it wasn’t a credible source.
Russia calls Gabbard their “girlfriend.” Her nomination is a gift to Putin!
**We need a DNI who prioritizes national security and the integrity of our intelligence community, not someone who has repeatedly shown a willingness to cozy up to adversarial regimes.**

clean_body: | | | Tulsi Gabbard’s former aides believe she is a Russian asset, yet Trump is moving forward with her as his pick for the Director of National Intelligence (DNI). Gabbard has a troubling history of aligning herself with Russian interests, often appearing on state-sponsored media platforms that promote disinformation, spread conspiracy theories and undermine our democracy. Gabbard’s actions have raised serious concerns about her loyalty and judgment. We need your voice now more than ever! | “Behind closed doors, people think she might be compromised. Like it’s not hyperbole,” one Republican Senate aide told The Hill. “There are members of our conference who think she’s a [Russian] asset.” According to three of her former staffers, she regularly consumed Russian media, even after being told it wasn’t a credible source. Russia calls Gabbard their “girlfriend.” Her nomination is a gift to Putin! We need a DNI who prioritizes national security and the integrity of our intelligence community, not someone who has repeatedly shown a willingness to cozy up to adversarial regimes. ** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: It’s time to get to work
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
“The fights worth having are rarely easy.”
#

Gabby Giffords says it best:
**_“The fights worth having are rarely easy.”_**
Another Donald Trump presidency is not going to be easy for our movement. But remember: We’ve taken on a Trump Administration before, and we can do it again.
Long before MAGA was a part of our politics, we had to confront some tough challenges in our movement for gun violence prevention. We’ve made progress that Gabby could never have dreamed of when GIFFORDS was founded 12 years ago. So while the next four years won’t be easy, we know that with your help, we _can_ and _will_ take on new challenges together.
[**Are you with us? If so, please sign our petition to show your commitment to defending the progress our gun violence prevention movement has made.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_defendprog_pet_jan25/?source=em250119-1-b&refcode2=9852.3935704.bfHzNi&akid=9852%2E3935704%2EbfHzNi)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_defendprog_pet_jan25/?source=em250119-1-b&refcode2=9852.3935704.bfHzNi&akid=9852%2E3935704%2EbfHzNi)**
It’s time to get to work. Thanks so much for standing with us.
The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=9852%2E3935704%2EbfHzNi) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Time is running out, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Time is running out, Peter.

We need to raise $100,000 before February 1 to secure enough resources to
hire a new staff member who will focus on our 2026 Candidate Recruitment
efforts.

We officially launched this campaign about one week ago, but we're
currently not on track to reach our goal in time. To make up the
difference, we need to ramp up our fundraising momentum
ASAP, Peter.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250119?refcode=em20250119-36343&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36343_1203867_PvNks5&akid=36343%2E1203867%2EPvNks5 ]Will you rush a grassroots donation of any amount to help us hit our
goal before January ends?

As the second billionaire-backed Trump administration looms, we must do
everything we can to support progressive working-class leaders of all
races, places, and backgrounds to provide everyday people with real
representation in Congress.

Our corporate and far-right opponents like AIPAC and the Crypto Lobby will
do everything in their power to silence our movement — but with enough
people power behind us, we can send more working-class progressives to
Congress, grow the Squad, and fight for the bold change we deserve.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250119?refcode=em20250119-36343&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36343_1203867_PvNks5&akid=36343%2E1203867%2EPvNks5 ]If you’re ready to usher in a new generation of leaders to reshape the
Democratic Party and Congress for the better, please chip in
$5 or more right now to set our 2026 Candidate Recruitment
up for success!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250119?refcode=em20250119-36343&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36343_1203867_PvNks5&akid=36343%2E1203867%2EPvNks5 ]Contribute $5

Together,

Justice Democrats

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. We officially launched this campaign about one week ago, but we're currently not on track to reach our goal in time. To make up the difference, we need to ramp up our fundraising momentum ASAP, Peter. [ ]Will you rush a grassroots donation of any amount to help us hit our goal before January ends? As the second billionaire-backed Trump administration looms, we must do everything we can to support progressive working-class leaders of all races, places, and backgrounds to provide everyday people with real representation in Congress. Our corporate and far-right opponents like AIPAC and the Crypto Lobby will do everything in their power to silence our movement — but with enough people power behind us, we can send more working-class progressives to Congress, grow the Squad, and fight for the bold change we deserve. [ ]If you’re ready to usher in a new generation of leaders to reshape the Democratic Party and Congress for the better, please chip in $5 or more right now to set our 2026 Candidate Recruitment up for success! [ ]Contribute $5 Together, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Tomorrow we honor Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
It is up to us to continue Dr. King’s fight for racial justice, economic advancement, voting rights, and equal opportunity.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100641023/523424779/985656371?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_msg_2025.01.19_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTQzMzlhMy04MmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pNY4beHHYbq-Hy1exfwBKiOIhD4CbPHYefsliNdRaNI=) Dear Peter, Tomorrow is Martin Luther King Jr. Day, so today I want to take a moment to reflect on the historic life and immeasurable legacy of Dr. King. Dr. King devoted his life to the pursuit of a more equitable nation for all Americans – a nation where everyone, regardless of background, community, or creed, could prosper and live free from discrimination. And while we have made significant progress towards the ideals of justice, equity, and opportunity that Dr. King championed, we have a long way to go before his dream of a truly equal nation will be realized. **Peter, it is up to us to continue Dr. King’s fight for racial justice, economic advancement, voting rights, and equal opportunity.** It is not lost on me that, as I continue this fight in the halls of Congress, I stand on the shoulders of leaders like Dr. King. **As the first Black person ever elected to represent Ohio’s 13th Congressional District, I carry the names and legacies of those who came before me – including Dr. King.** So in his memory, may we all reaffirm our commitment to leading with love, serving our communities, fighting for justice, and creating a better nation for generations to come. Yours in Service, _Emilia_

| **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100641024/523424780/985656371?nd&amount=5&refcode=em_msg_2025.01.19_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTQzMzlhMy04MmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pNY4beHHYbq-Hy1exfwBKiOIhD4CbPHYefsliNdRaNI=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100641025/523424781/985656371?-nd&amount=5&refcode=em_msg_2025.01.19_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTQzMzlhMy04MmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pNY4beHHYbq-Hy1exfwBKiOIhD4CbPHYefsliNdRaNI=)

House GOP has pledged to activate 5,000 donors to celebrate the new administration, but we're WELL behind on our goal! "Will you help us close the gap ASAP?" | | | "REACH DONOR GOAL" | | | "REACH DONOR GOAL" | | | "REACH DONOR GOAL" | | | "REACH DONOR GOAL" Our Inauguration Day goal is our FIRST goal of the year, and Democrats would like nothing more than to see us come up short. body:
| [**Peter, Donald Trump is about to take the stage at his MAGA rally in just 3 hours. So I’m asking 300 of my grassroots supporters to chip in $14 before Trump’s MAGA rally begins. With your support in the next 3 hours, I’ll be able to rush resources to Democrats running in key special elections, help my colleagues hand MAGA Republicans a useless majority, and upstage Trump’s rally with a huge fundraising day for our Democrats. Can I count on you to stand with us? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100642708/523429562/-1810142051?amount=14&refcode=20250119_em_fr_b1_raja_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2IwYWNkMi04NmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xPSVbU-auMJ6_XZZWMFO30llrgJIrr5xS00HeVDmuIk=)

name: Larry P. Arnn
subject: Increase your understanding of Russia
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3dc65b2a3cd44d43a8ee99978a0c8fb3&_e=mEPPzpBLplf2bQuRO3Q67Jgqs22s-SUPWqqIx6Af5hBg61hGsn21WoBlfnFvPxlVbYS4uI6w3cpegmhNbFmUyoLHtrKvBkpAe12O3VkWiSesgrgVwRTU4a-vIyqsjxtSAl6HNgndw_uUrpTa4-_sPd5rTZbNLy8aNJ9RatPtlERqJZfYerSRSP62ff5uCbDkkPxEEu6BhDiTJ1p3fFUCehC6UDO2W1_oMwO9lVdmklCvnXUwmg3tPji-qQAsZjcK5K9jIRkJ2OfikVC2g6wtSzcQE3sC0F3Ug_pTwfatlw25elHrnQAVi_8clpfPsJOquY1EPZSs7fE8tuNDp7tXZgNfi5Mya3JbGuLzCTMIp9k%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Winston Churchill once described Russia as "a riddle, wrapped in a mystery, inside an enigma"--words that still ring true.

But given Russia's current war with Ukraine--and Russia's role in the shifting balance of power in today's world--a better understanding of Russia is critical.

Since Peter the Great, Russia's place among nations has only grown. As it transformed itself from a regional backwater to a great power, its politics and culture influenced significant events in our own history.

At the time of the American Revolution, for instance, Russia was the first nation to recognize the U.S. as a sovereign state. And in the Cold War period between World War Two and the fall of the Soviet Union in 1991, American-Russian relations became the focus of world attention.

**The need for a better understanding of post-Cold War Russia, in light of its current importance and its long history as one of the world 's great powers, is why Hillsdale College has created a [FREE online video series on Russia](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3dc65b2a3cd44d43a8ee99978a0c8fb3&_e=mEPPzpBLplf2bQuRO3Q67Jgqs22s-SUPWqqIx6Af5hBg61hGsn21WoBlfnFvPxlVbYS4uI6w3cpegmhNbFmUyoLHtrKvBkpAe12O3VkWiSesgrgVwRTU4a-vIyqsjxtSAl6HNgndw_uUrpTa4-_sPd5rTZbNLy8aNJ9RatPtlERqJZfYerSRSP62ff5uCbDkkPxEEu6BhDiTJ1p3fFUCepTPmD8_9RJSxh7EcnlJB63O403G1SBvBph2Mr1wsMFcWRGv5Eg-8QEAJuiHB_oODOKTppeGnYmGkXWQUXOOCxIqbYQPZ8Ny-0TV6F6bGMB1QayRCx-P4r7wi16kwGPD3IfsG1Qb068PODbvQ6wdMLc%3D). **

In our online video series, based on a recent conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn more about Russian history--including the "Greats" such as Peter and Catherine--with special attention to the Russian Revolution through the fall of the Soviet Union.

The video series also explores Russia's significant contributions to literature, through such authors as Dostoyevsky and Tolstoy--and to classical music, through such composers such as Tchaikovsky and Rachmaninoff.

**You 'll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia's enigmatic relationship with the West today, and about the causes and complications of the current Ukraine war. **

You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/russia-cca](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3dc65b2a3cd44d43a8ee99978a0c8fb3&_e=mEPPzpBLplf2bQuRO3Q67Jgqs22s-SUPWqqIx6Af5hBg61hGsn21WoBlfnFvPxlVbYS4uI6w3cpegmhNbFmUyoLHtrKvBkpAe12O3VkWiSesgrgVwRTU4a-vIyqsjxtSAl6HNgndw_uUrpTa4-_sPd5rTZbNLy8aNJ9RatPtlERqJZfYerSRSP62ff5uCbDkkPxEEu6BhDiTJ1p3fFUCenzoh1j0MBXze6JSsh-YnkQh1tssErM-N6GUkAx_Tw_f7WWU_Q4FGRUhOam68vVZrKSIBZKztzeVjcM38rKN-vbGljmWusQSonl-_Nmvu3A9Bosh-nEnvhn9klMEDp6eMgrn-t38u1yUh4LXEzKOXTI%3D)

**Please use the secure link above to immediately receive your video series on Russia.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **
**

* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for standing up against the MAGA Justices on the Supreme Court!_**

First, Justice Clarence Thomas was EXPOSED for accepting luxury vacations and bribes from GOP mega-donors. Then, he and fellow far-right Justice Samuel Alito REFUSED to recuse themselves from January 6th cases despite their EXTREME bias. **But now, you’re taking a stand to FINALLY hold the Supreme Court accountable for their blatant misconduct!**

[**I know Republicans are already plotting their revenge against you, so today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my support for this bill and keep electing amazing Democrats like you! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86272?t=9&akid=18614%2E878179%2EpTPDwF) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86272?t=10&akid=18614%2E878179%2EpTPDwF)

(www.protectvoting.org)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18614%2E878179%2EpTPDwF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18614%2E878179%2EpTPDwF).**
