name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here's the plan for 2025 >>
body:
My friends at EMILYs List are in the business of big, structural change. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100643595/523432342/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE143_20250119_WarrenRS_PL&sourceid=1055616&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGIwYWNkMi04NmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pm2kag4m7WXHPFGjA5j81cuw4E6y2OVGJhU_7meq2tc=) Hi Peter, it's Elizabeth Warren.

For 40 years, EMILYs List has shown us what it looks like to _**truly invest**_ in the future we want.

This organization has helped elect _thousands_ of women, at every level of government, all across the country. **I'm one of them** , and I've seen how their support makes a real difference. [**So, I'm asking: Can you donate to EMILYs List today to support Democratic pro-choice women running up and down the ballot?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100643596/523432343/-1037096532?refcode=WUEFE143_20250119_WarrenRS_PL&sourceid=1055616&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGIwYWNkMi04NmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pm2kag4m7WXHPFGjA5j81cuw4E6y2OVGJhU_7meq2tc=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100643597/523432344/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE143_20250119_WarrenRS_PL&sourceid=1055616&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGIwYWNkMi04NmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pm2kag4m7WXHPFGjA5j81cuw4E6y2OVGJhU_7meq2tc=)

You may have heard me talk before about big, structural change. My friends at EMILYs List are in the business of big, structural change to our political landscape. 40 years ago, Ellen Malcolm and the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List had a vision to change the face of American politics by investing in women candidates in the _earliest_ days of their campaigns, when it matters most. Thanks to that vision and decades of work, _thousands_ of women have been elected to office nationwide, up and down the ballot. And it's made a real difference.

I know firsthand how powerful support from EMILYs List can be. That's why I'm reaching out today, at the start of the new year, to ask for your support. EMILYs List is entirely donor-supported, so your contribution makes their work electing women like me possible.
[**Will you contribute whatever you can to EMILYs List today? name: Seth Moulton
subject: This election should have been a slam dunk for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]
Sometimes we need to be willing to say the quiet part out loud even when the truth is uncomfortable: This election should have been a slam dunk for Democrats.

Yet, when I said that the party needed to stop looking down its nose at the very voters we lost across every corner of the country, and be willing to have open conversations about tough issues like the economy, the border, and divisive cultural issues, some in our party got very angry.

The chair of the local Democratic Party called me a Nazi cooperator. The head of the Political Science Department of a major Boston university said that my office was no longer welcome to contact them. And a primary challenger has already registered to run against me.

And all of this despite an overwhelming number of national voices echoing my concerns, not to mention the hundreds of calls and texts I’ve received from voters who said themselves, “I agree with you Seth, but it feels like I’m not allowed to say that out loud.”

It’s starting to feel like some Democrats just don’t want to win. Well, I do. And if you agree, I need your help.

If you’re with me, please consider making an early contribution to my re-election campaign. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

Make no mistake: if we aren’t willing to have difficult conversations as a party and if we continue to push out any voter that doesn’t adhere to the extreme left’s self-defined purity tests, we will continue to lose elections. And, as a result, the vulnerable people whose rights you and I want to protect are the people who will be hurt the most.

As a Marine, I learned about the power of the wisdom that emerges from a group of people with different opinions and experiences. I also learned to be a fighter. I will continue to fight for the individual freedoms of every American. But in order to do that we need to start by winning elections.

Join me today.

Seth

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/seth-moulton-3]

clean_body: | = Friend — With just one day until Trump’s inauguration, we’re asking for just $1. No, that’s not a typo. Today, we’re reaching out to ask for just $1.00 to help Flip the Senate. You might be thinking, “what difference can just one dollar make?” It turns out, $1 can make a pretty big impact! $1 can help us reach persuadable voters in key states like Maine and North Carolina — so we can flip their Senate seats blue! $1 can go toward uplifting vulnerable Democratic Senators in Michigan and Georgia, who are facing their toughest re-election campaigns yet. $1 can help us book television and digital ads early. And your $1 donation can help us make sure we can take back the Senate from the GOP and stop Donald Trump’s agenda. If everyone reading this email donated just four quarters, we would blow past our fundraising goal for the month. We’re hoping you’ll be the one to help kickstart the chain reaction: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you. — Flip the Senate = Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. SMP 700 13th St NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States

name: Dr. Asif Mahmood

body:
Donation Drive Tomorrow

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us14.campaign-archive.com/?e=7b1b739a89&u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=b9a1a99873)
---
| | | | |
# Our Neighbors Need
# Our Help!
# Donation Drive Today
---
| Dear Friend,
I hope this message finds you well! I'm reaching out to remind you about our donation drive today, where we have the opportunity to make a real impact on families affected by the Eaton Fire.
**Event Details:****\- Date: Sunday, January 19th****\- Time: 12 PM - 3 PM****\- Location: Pasadena Unified School District****351 S Hudson Street, Pasadena, CA 91101**
You can drive up, donate your items, and leave—it's that simple! Your contributions of blankets, clothes, diapers, hygiene products, pet food, and other essentials will directly help those in need. If you’d like to offer financial support, please use this [_**Donation link.**_](https://drasifmahmood.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=306598b2f3a0f328de4c6676e&id=eae52db2e6&e=7b1b739a89)
Together, let's show our community the power of compassion and generosity. Your participation can truly change lives. Thank you for being a part of this effort!
Best,
Asif
---

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

name: Fight Trump via Our Revolution
subject: Citizen Army vs. Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21136?t=1014?refcode=email-20250119&akid=7545%2E5885482%2ENdgIfh ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Tomorrow, January 20, will be a challenging day for everyone who is part
of Our Revolution.

This is the beginning of a new political moment in our country, when Trump
and a handful of wealthy, far right extremists will seize control of our
government — part of a global trend of rising Authoritarian Leaders and
Oligarchy.

Many of you have shared with us your feelings of anger and hopelessness.
Some doubt our ability to fight back and fight for what we believe in.

We are not powerless in this moment of uncertainty.

Since the holidays, over 30,000 Our Revolution supporters have shown
they’re ready to fight — they’re participating in organizing meetings,
strategy huddles, and taking actions to get ready for Trump's Second Term.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21137?t=1011&akid=7545%2E5885482%2ENdgIfh ]As we prepare for the worst of the incoming Trump Administration, will
you pitch in a donation of any amount to support our nationwide network of
activists who are committed to fighting back?

We know what Trump’s 2025 Plan is, but we have our own plan.

In 2025, Our Revolution and our Grassroots Army will be working to carry
out our own 3 POINT PLAN:

1. Fight Trump & the Oligarchs
Organize a Citizen Army to fight back on Capitol Hill and in every
congressional district
2. Transform the Democratic Party
Seize the reins, root out corporate influence, forge a working class
party
3. Elect Progressive Champions
Build power in hundreds of races from City Councils to State
Legislatures

Our work on Point 1 of that plan — Fighting Trump and the Oligarchs —
starts tomorrow. As soon as he’s sworn in, Trump plans to sign 100
Executive Orders to try to undermine the progress we’ve made on climate,
healthcare, taxing the rich, and much more.

And, on Day 1, he also plans to set free ALL of the Jan. 6 traitors — his
foot soldiers in the assault on democracy — as he installs a radical team
of wealthy, far right extremists throughout the government.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21137?t=1012&akid=7545%2E5885482%2ENdgIfh ]Our Citizen Action Team is ready, but they need your help. Will you
stand with us by sending a donation today? Every dollar will be used to
build out our Grassroots Army so we have the strength to fight back
effectively on every front.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21137?t=1013&akid=7545%2E5885482%2ENdgIfh ]DONATE NOW

A lot is coming at us, but how we respond in this moment matters. Our
Revolution is committed to using everything we have to fight for our
future because we know that Despair is Not an Option.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, Tomorrow, January 20, will be a challenging day for everyone who is part of Our Revolution. This is the beginning of a new political moment in our country, when Trump and a handful of wealthy, far right extremists will seize control of our government — part of a global trend of rising Authoritarian Leaders and Oligarchy. Many of you have shared with us your feelings of anger and hopelessness. Some doubt our ability to fight back and fight for what we believe in. We are not powerless in this moment of uncertainty. Since the holidays, over 30,000 Our Revolution supporters have shown they’re ready to fight — they’re participating in organizing meetings, strategy huddles, and taking actions to get ready for Trump's Second Term. [ ]As we prepare for the worst of the incoming Trump Administration, will you pitch in a donation of any amount to support our nationwide network of activists who are committed to fighting back? We know what Trump’s 2025 Plan is, but we have our own plan. In 2025, Our Revolution and our Grassroots Army will be working to carry out our own 3 POINT PLAN: 1. Fight Trump & the Oligarchs Organize a Citizen Army to fight back on Capitol Hill and in every congressional district 2. Transform the Democratic Party Seize the reins, root out corporate influence, forge a working class party 3. Elect Progressive Champions Build power in hundreds of races from City Councils to State Legislatures Our work on Point 1 of that plan — Fighting Trump and the Oligarchs — starts tomorrow. As soon as he’s sworn in, Trump plans to sign 100 Executive Orders to try to undermine the progress we’ve made on climate, healthcare, taxing the rich, and much more. And, on Day 1, he also plans to set free ALL of the Jan. 6 traitors — his foot soldiers in the assault on democracy — as he installs a radical team of wealthy, far right extremists throughout the government. [ ]Our Citizen Action Team is ready, but they need your help. Will you stand with us by sending a donation today? Every dollar will be used to build out our Grassroots Army so we have the strength to fight back effectively on every front. [ ]DONATE NOW A lot is coming at us, but how we respond in this moment matters. Our Revolution is committed to using everything we have to fight for our future because we know that Despair is Not an Option. When we organize, we win. Our Revolution [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! body:
| | |

Peter: Today, Donald Trump is holding a rally in D.C. to fire up his most die-hard supporters. Tomorrow, he’ll be sworn in for his second term. **[Will you chip in any amount you can toward my $20,000 midnight goal and then let me explain why I need your help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100644529/523435579/-1308448140?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk435-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzBjNTMwMS04YmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QAbSJvbg8dH4_63y-8Au0-bYpYvPRIsLzJuRRn7Pwkw=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100644530/523435580/-1308448140?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk435-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzBjNTMwMS04YmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QAbSJvbg8dH4_63y-8Au0-bYpYvPRIsLzJuRRn7Pwkw=)
---
Here’s the thing, Peter: Donald Trump has made clear he’s going to fight for massive, deficit-busting tax cuts for billionaires and giant corporations while doing almost nothing to lower the cost of your groceries and health care. In fact, it’s likely that we’ll have to fight again to protect the Affordable Care Act and so much of the progress we’ve made to expand access and lower costs.
I can’t promise that we’ll be able to stop Trump every time, **but we can show him that people in this country are fired up and ready to stand up for everything that matters to them** , whether that’s our health care or our democracy.
**Tomorrow, it’s go time – and if I’m going to have the resources I need for the fights ahead, I need you with me. [So I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $5 before my midnight deadline to help me hold the incoming Trump administration accountable?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100644531/523435581/-1308448140?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk435-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzBjNTMwMS04YmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QAbSJvbg8dH4_63y-8Au0-bYpYvPRIsLzJuRRn7Pwkw=)**

name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: A time to reflect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100645255/523438670/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_202501_EN_MLKDay_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_MLKDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmRmNDkwNi04ZWQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_NT1mA-vl9-JDDjeMsQj7Kqa4kLH4uKJuWGJZbTIoo=&emci=253d4f00-8ed6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=cbdf4906-8ed6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=30096098) | Friend,

Tomorrow, we take time to honor the life and legacy of the Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

He was a champion for civil rights, a defender of democracy, and a true giant of American history. He believed in a future where everyone’s voices are heard and valued.

It’s our duty to continue his legacy and fight for the fundamental rights of all Americans. As we face setbacks, we must remember what Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. taught us: inaction is not an option.
May Dr. King's life and work inspire us to work toward a better, brighter, more equitable future for everyone.

Thank you,

Bonnie
---
* * *

clean_body: | Friend, Tomorrow, we take time to honor the life and legacy of the Reverend Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. He was a champion for civil rights, a defender of democracy, and a true giant of American history. He believed in a future where everyone’s voices are heard and valued. It’s our duty to continue his legacy and fight for the fundamental rights of all Americans. As we face setbacks, we must remember what Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. taught us: inaction is not an option. May Dr. King's life and work inspire us to work toward a better, brighter, more equitable future for everyone. Thank you, Bonnie Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Honoring MLK’s legacy for racial and economic justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
“We are confronted with the fierce urgency of now” - Martin Luther King, Jr. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW8ko6wfemNHD3blHAbj1rBz4b66bE_8-s44efap4iiWHrVwjWAw-xYH5aLErGub1N03CK_GJ-W-lqdJm7Pm7tSsmRgFRC9TTD37DqxQyDrxOfJV-j2q2GoQR3UqL-VyYAfe6sISAvyRpV3-qxepZsw9xSgiUtkNxzQYoIumJT0eFITMq9QNIrQUZYpb9m5H3k6706iooLkladp6Z5HfIQXw/4da/Tnp8abS2QMS2QC9OZyJpcQ/h0/h001.aW9kYIw1D5ZwhRvlFu8ug22SMBpZk6r0JbK1rh36MOc)
---
Friend, Tomorrow marks the 30th anniversary of Martin Luther King, Jr. Day. One way we can honor Dr. King is by supporting the Black-led groups carrying on his legacy for liberation and making change happen in our communities. As the civil rights movement showed us, people in Congress and the White House didn’t just wake up one day and decide to pass transformative policies like the _Civil Rights Act_. Transformative change doesn’t come from the government, it comes from everyday people pushing for our rights in many ways at once: through movements in the streets, the courts, campuses, and more. **I want to lift up Oakland Forward, a grassroots organization in my district that’s serving and empowering Black and brown communities and working for a more equitable society where people can live free from discrimination and oppression, akin to Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.’s vision of a Beloved Community.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtZzzfTY2NadQ7R1AXSz5TewzfNxSliP9deNsn4P04ZlY7F1Oq4WWhoKaRveNa5hGnNsl6nHO1VPxCxTkQRBnQYu9LIGt5XD2qoAM0ZQgiq6hKCReLtEtK_LysAl1QmtEkWgdVoIuV4uJD0RQQJI2CdQ_Nip-HdAZuv-7waCODVnU4IZf54PKIRTAlt8lXyhJayE1oPe9CPxRYZB7gUzgEzgUD53Mu1g5PNrakNF4V_rZW3A3z55BHcdk7K3GF-ppuA6KuGF75lIafdEWHpZtVLs/4da/Tnp8abS2QMS2QC9OZyJpcQ/h1/h001.4z8d5mlki3s69WxmLTP-e3sf1ZkTKKh-9MPhT-De8dU) Dr. King recognized that racism and poverty are interconnected. Carrying on that legacy, Oakland Forward’s priorities include securing economic justice and pushing for meaningful policy change such as paid family and medical leave. As we enter a new political term with an openly hostile president that doesn't believe in the vision of Dr. King, let's come together in support of our community-based organizations like Oakland Forward. Their work to challenge systemic injustice and racism is more important than ever. [**For MLK Day, will you chip in to the grassroots nonprofit Oakland Forward, which is carrying on MLK’s legacy for racial justice and a more equitable society?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtZzzfTY2NadQ7R1AXSz5TewzfNxSliP9deNsn4P04ZlY7F1Oq4WWhoKaRveNa5hGnNsl6nHO1VPxCxTkQRBnQYvDwQrl0XNOLtT-rczplZhvfO3gVtKNc_MtkRd14mBNYNBxyUZknjaHsDVf95vTBmFjCKPHQqXlQPIla62QRCTMFUT-8lr4zptzC8evGjj_2DKnd80jrmNvvuNnFn_eLrTVgGPcs9Zw7iKbl9xlLyfuMssUKn2CmZ7XMCSJczm9evhC8qRET1-d4_eIvdCXhsk/4da/Tnp8abS2QMS2QC9OZyJpcQ/h2/h001.3Xi6Q5M3MtNZlxEa-WZaVQ1dX3mTODM6l1GSmt6RMhQ) | [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtZzzfTY2NadQ7R1AXSz5TewzfNxSliP9deNsn4P04ZlY7F1Oq4WWhoKaRveNa5hGnNsl6nHO1VPxCxTkQRBnQYs2_M7QXqDHKOf6XNzh-iKPSkO1rrTDPpxFDzhlHTk6bbBh5bjKoZId-YL-7v7MwOWL0OuEGuBZpz6_ix2l5ZbPfOmXFMQrBTTrEi0bNhbx5JYdKGbizSMDo9GjoCdyYMmphxYjgcRMuJ5EZBqy7T-7hWL2ifCvg0-waiVfqIGwmGeFsI73pcVUPlxEGDW6lMA/4da/Tnp8abS2QMS2QC9OZyJpcQ/h3/h001.jwBdLIB0q3KzSAQqhRWxRZMgsnEd0bAPkjye5k64W-k)
---
_“We are confronted with the fierce urgency of now,”_ said MLK in April 1967. _“Now let us begin. Now let us rededicate ourselves to the long and bitter, but beautiful, struggle for a new world.”_
This Martin Luther King, Jr. Day, we are still struggling for that world. Please know that you always have an ally in me in this ongoing work. Together, we will continue the struggle our movement ancestors led.
It’s an honor to continue to serve you and all the residents of my district in my fourth term in Congress. I’m committing to partnering with my constituents in the fight for equity and justice for all, including guaranteed civil rights for everyone.
Onward together in solidarity,
Rashida

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Settlement Reached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Thanks to your support, I’ve saved my home.
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eee808fe52fa4d63a801399c49ce72f1&_e=3BicLwns-kHJV0MAkqz9QSQR8zu1s0txSQCQm3eA5oIWXRCf2r7ACX0vZ3rn4QCSjEzdlnqUXYmRfNSWqxyHyPg4eVC_VwZrUJ9DaiB_mk-VS-Qk2dNENA1Jy_ctmQ2XWipMm0aWtPoacII2_IeeeUJY1NbmU4hCIdbGT0kp6fdLfuJvym_pMNbQxtusY-iQly7A5FNPWRs8fzjLDHpUovGrhefOx4TnsdKYs85k-suq0MXKtMuKSAUudbRtKcQm40qBF6h-hj-FPsI4bvo4U53Jq8W3Wy713d3TtJQzsId-zxduPxf0HozGBBgxXjPkjNT7s2YFhSnYvTIjVPS39ZE6pTqeeSILzssIVe9OjzdncO08V9QkgQFItPixDV6G)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
From the bottom of my heart... _THANK YOU_.
---
Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you.
---
I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment.
---
__This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no grievances relating to the result we have reached.__
---
**I have been able to retain my New York co-op and Florida Condominium and all of my personal belongings. No one deserves to be subjected to threats, harassment, or intimidation.**
---
This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode was unfortunate.
---
I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same.
---
Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet.
---
_While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026._
---
But with you by my side, I am confident we will win.
---
[**Please consider making a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – to win the one remaining case against me.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=eee808fe52fa4d63a801399c49ce72f1&_e=3BicLwns-kHJV0MAkqz9QSQR8zu1s0txSQCQm3eA5oIWXRCf2r7ACX0vZ3rn4QCSjEzdlnqUXYmRfNSWqxyHyPg4eVC_VwZrUJ9DaiB_mk-VS-Qk2dNENA1Jy_ctmQ2XWipMm0aWtPoacII2_IeeeUJY1NbmU4hCIdbGT0kp6fdLfuJvym_pMNbQxtusY-iQly7A5FNPWRs8fzjLDHpUoueS-grOtKSNTV0vhqUZrDhlrOqIM4epAAVkrPzL50bmMdO8Cl2YQbwBazQ_-zbqqt4S5JrcYl-0-NbKXUnGjafTebDK9xHkpIZUFe0nVIpRMzRIFF6b_JRz_FLSSK39ZLQwG4-wWSfG2DYQA8ptX6vKAQrzT5gDmgxsRXqr7VYF)

clean_body: Thanks to your support, I’ve saved my home. | Fellow Patriot, From the bottom of my heart... THANK YOU. Thanks to the generosity of Americans like you who contributed to my Legal Defense Trust, I have great news to share with you. I have reached a resolution of the litigation with the Plaintiffs that will result in a satisfaction of the Plaintiffs’ judgment. This resolution does not involve an admission of liability or wrongdoing by any of the Parties. I am satisfied with and have no grievances relating to the result we have reached. I have been able to retain my New York co-op and Florida Condominium and all of my personal belongings. No one deserves to be subjected to threats, harassment, or intimidation. This litigation has taken its toll on all parties. This whole episode was unfortunate. I and the Plaintiffs have agreed not to ever talk about each other in any defamatory manner, and I urge others to do the same. Make no mistake: I could not have done this without the contributions you made to my Legal Defense Trust. Your support served as a reminder that America is home to the most generous souls on the planet. While this case has been settled, I still have outstanding legal expenses and one remaining case in Arizona set to go to trial in 2026. But with you by my side, I am confident we will win. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: Nancy Mace just threatened to “take me outside”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Bless her heart
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b1bbd07-3827-4ae9-b85c-887161e700fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4984efda-7485-4dc4-a6f1-db2c1c549a3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This week on the House floor, Nancy Mace threatened to physically fight me when I called her out over her obsession with transgender people and her struggling campaign coffers. Bless her heart. I’ve spent my political career standing up to bullies — from Greg Abbott and anti-choice extremists in Texas to Nancy Mace, Marjorie Taylor Greene, and Donald Trump in Washington. And when it comes to bullies, if you give an inch, they’ll take a mile. That’s why I introduced an amendment to reinstate the Oversight Subcommittee on Civil Rights and Civil Liberties. And that’s why I refuse to stand down to Nancy Mace’s bullying and threats of violence. If you agree that bullies must be held accountable, please stand with me at this critical moment. Whether on a school playground or in the halls of Congress, a bully is a bully and must be held accountable. [I will always fight back against bullies like Nancy Mace, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Donald Trump, and others. But I need your support, so will you split $10 or more between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15a3628b-d45a-4081-99d0-b5fd08815809/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5f8ff8f-4f54-4708-8d80-8b7f3855f4b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Nancy Mace’s campaign coffers are struggling. That’s why she keeps bringing up the trans issue. And that’s why she flipped out and threatened to fight me on the House floor. I’m not done fighting. Thanks for fighting with me, Jasmine Crockett
---

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: AOC
subject: TikTok ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The answer is not just playing endless whack-a-mole with apps.
#
OK, I want to talk a little bit about this TikTok ban (which I voted against, by the way).
Last year, when this ban came up for a vote, they said, “It's a national security issue, it’s a national security issue!” I said, “OK. That's serious.”
Let's see the case. Let's see the intelligence. Let's see what's going on.
**I can tell you that what was presented to all of the Members voting on this thing was not very compelling**. There was no real information that was a smoking gun or anything specific.
In fact, high ranking members on the House Foreign Affairs Committee came to me after and were pretty surprised. They were genuinely expecting there to be some real or compelling intelligence shared that would substantiate the argument. **And there just wasn't**.
Additionally, this bill, which is very large and substantive in terms of its impact, came to the Energy and Commerce Committee, was marked up, and then brought to the floor in a matter of just a few weeks — which is very, _very_ fast.
_Additionally_ , the degree to which corporations surveil the American people without genuine consent — and without real mechanisms for opting out — should be illegal. Point blank, period.
So many of us, naturally, said: **The answer is not just playing endless whack-a-mole with apps**.
We should have real privacy legislation in the United States. **We should help people have greater agency over their personal information so that they're not being spied on all the time** , whether it's a domestic company or a foreign company.
To which, of course, big tech and their lobbies are going to fight against. So they just target an _app_ instead of targeting the _problem_.
**And then lastly,** when this thing was passed, all these legislators who supported it were like, “Oh it's not a ban, it's not a ban — it's just a forced sale!” Which, to be fair, forced sales have happened in the past (Grindr was a forced sale).
Well, they provided very little time for that to happen. For an app that big... like, who's going to buy TikTok? Hello? It's _very_ large.
**Now, here we are.**
I would say that the lack of forethought and the rushed nature of this bill is now evidenced by the fact that _both_ the Biden and Trump administrations are looking to see if there's any way to reverse or stall it.
More soon,
Alexandria

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Checking in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Now, more than ever, we have to stay vigilant and fight like hell for the future we deserve.

| Hey there — it’s Jane. I know this moment might feel heavy. Tomorrow, we turn the page to another chapter under the Trump administration. The progress we’ve made, the future we’ve worked so hard for — it all feels fragile. We know the incoming administration is no friend to our movement. Trump, his campaign officials, cabinet nominees, and his allies in the fossil fuel industry have made it abundantly clear they do not consider the climate crisis a legitimate issue to focus on. Instead, they’ve taken aim at the progress we’ve made and have vowed to roll it back for the sake of corporate profits at the expense of our planet, our health, and our future. But here’s what I want you to remember: We are not powerless. This fight has always been about more than one person in one office. It’s about us — _all of us_ — coming together to build something bigger than ourselves. And together, we’ve already proven that when we rise, we can win. **The road ahead won’t be easy, but I know we can fight back and celebrate some wins along the way — if we stay united and strategic.** That’s why I’m asking you to chip in today to keep this grassroots movement alive. Every dollar helps fund JanePAC’s critical work to ensure the future of our planet is in the hands of those who will protect it. Chip in here to power our fight → **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jane-bax-email?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100648857/523451261/2105508926?refcode=ea.01764fe0-98d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.01764fe0-98d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNzY0ZmUwLTk4ZDYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eFKgPla4-uc2GgjlulJ5JAGMlS7-wEEnh43JbQXUahY=)** We’ve got this. With love and hope, xx Jane [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100648858/523451262/2105508926?refcode=ea.01764fe0-98d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ms=ea.01764fe0-98d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxNzY0ZmUwLTk4ZDYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eFKgPla4-uc2GgjlulJ5JAGMlS7-wEEnh43JbQXUahY=)

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6332212b3b2c4a7592027234139d73aa&_e=ZSKtRJww13AtmU96Fj9toBkDsZhZnxjwsG2hRwAC3sRXS5pR4kr9A-6z4tSyNYUdiZqhYWWEnw13_Lcry_utAYLaa28nJaxIMEAcyUe0uzx0xNhAdptqd5rsENoW7oL1BWVeeFO8lVLIOgCDwTWLGJwIX8gwok6Csj1I9PEcULeQVddEoa7dHkYCzqfT4bFznSz37VQ4j66YB8du4wjjJ1wkdO1pSQECiuQW7Ty_GBTYdQ8oqTR47ydz-l2w3LqSF4LLmiCyFRvOzMB7GyXFRGwIg6hNEKWAVdVbopUaMIoctbapX_0UZ2b-Nk5U-GM6RXIm1qeuf8K-uJS3RJemcSwagSJUggtAmG-qpuNonBP8uHf68nUk0eoHZ_3BCXw9)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6332212b3b2c4a7592027234139d73aa&_e=ZSKtRJww13AtmU96Fj9toBkDsZhZnxjwsG2hRwAC3sRXS5pR4kr9A-6z4tSyNYUdiZqhYWWEnw13_Lcry_utAYLaa28nJaxIMEAcyUe0uzx0xNhAdptqd5rsENoW7oL1BWVeeFO8lVLIOgCDwTWLGJwIX8gwok6Csj1I9PEcULeQVddEoa7dHkYCzqfT4bFznSz37VQ4j66YB8du4wjjJ1wkdO1pSQECiuQW7Ty_GBToJeEh5XzfWqkB01_k8BA-fbQDQ5A7s1_f1amuuKv1oz1uyonSMHWMC_6bmIrTA1jjcaaQZjhb5IZzC8eUu25CQlTaXAghzUEO7w1lxwUyHLMmzL1jm5gKNJhMxjeUjR9aN1vVhzBJSw7lZJzvDZAM)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6332212b3b2c4a7592027234139d73aa&_e=ZSKtRJww13AtmU96Fj9toBkDsZhZnxjwsG2hRwAC3sRXS5pR4kr9A-6z4tSyNYUdiZqhYWWEnw13_Lcry_utAYLaa28nJaxIMEAcyUe0uzx0xNhAdptqd5rsENoW7oL1BWVeeFO8lVLIOgCDwTWLGJwIX8gwok6Csj1I9PEcULeQVddEoa7dHkYCzqfT4bFznSz37VQ4j66YB8du4wjjJ1wkdO1pSQECiuQW7Ty_GBTR9KR4xWGk2KDrkNGxhihel6TOJExni4wICkCznB0HqnlDJrT4Pt7uHxBIaagEsakvoxvvbSCuYiL7yWZm7x1CtiRmHjm3_xlRo40Rz5baLeKf315ngt-VsLy2_VycM4uh-IL1vlnekeBqlgTpDLrd)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6332212b3b2c4a7592027234139d73aa&_e=ZSKtRJww13AtmU96Fj9toBkDsZhZnxjwsG2hRwAC3sRXS5pR4kr9A-6z4tSyNYUdiZqhYWWEnw13_Lcry_utAYLaa28nJaxIMEAcyUe0uzx0xNhAdptqd5rsENoW7oL1BWVeeFO8lVLIOgCDwTWLGJwIX8gwok6Csj1I9PEcULeQVddEoa7dHkYCzqfT4bFznSz37VQ4j66YB8du4wjjJ1wkdO1pSQECiuQW7Ty_GBQNql8iXU2KmuORHSHYtWCjtjg8eQl9Mb0e-AhG5z2XXOMNUoT39tC80UNiagr36CwB-99P-BKxv-a2BInxL-TuIMf7s4a3ZMEzG_c06ZweVy5hzbN6oSsUdyF-E6nVOyWJ1J3q6XZQgmqs-3mDztYd)**

His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6332212b3b2c4a7592027234139d73aa&_e=ZSKtRJww13AtmU96Fj9toBkDsZhZnxjwsG2hRwAC3sRXS5pR4kr9A-6z4tSyNYUdiZqhYWWEnw13_Lcry_utAYLaa28nJaxIMEAcyUe0uzx0xNhAdptqd5rsENoW7oL1BWVeeFO8lVLIOgCDwTWLGJwIX8gwok6Csj1I9PEcULeQVddEoa7dHkYCzqfT4bFznSz37VQ4j66YB8du4wjjJ1wkdO1pSQECiuQW7Ty_GBQgZpWhibwS_fBOUEyMaE4EhiCzmQFiY_NuhzO-tWqZSEC-nd-8S0nGKIKfyVav_-l0SxE27dpd_Xl9TkTzddauxbRAmZQ5LP_95ndRgCGcpHHMkwHfRyJIq00tz-pTvmKYT_31reKaCvKDtCRItbg9)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6332212b3b2c4a7592027234139d73aa&_e=ZSKtRJww13AtmU96Fj9toBkDsZhZnxjwsG2hRwAC3sRXS5pR4kr9A-6z4tSyNYUdiZqhYWWEnw13_Lcry_utAYLaa28nJaxIMEAcyUe0uzx0xNhAdptqd5rsENoW7oL1BWVeeFO8lVLIOgCDwTWLGJwIX8gwok6Csj1I9PEcULeQVddEoa7dHkYCzqfT4bFznSz37VQ4j66YB8du4wjjJ1wkdO1pSQECiuQW7Ty_GBS3w6ijsIlqeR29En3bapP2oiqaEIc48ASxBnGycIwkj4uMTSan9Lre-atntHv1kI8K43Ojs84_k7mcMWb7H0G3P0vZHASRvgcFjR0rHQXaA-2IjkiZvlxer39PeQkgWhu3WIc2mFU1CYZBY9IylMps)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6332212b3b2c4a7592027234139d73aa&_e=ZSKtRJww13AtmU96Fj9toBkDsZhZnxjwsG2hRwAC3sRXS5pR4kr9A-6z4tSyNYUdiZqhYWWEnw13_Lcry_utAYLaa28nJaxIMEAcyUe0uzx0xNhAdptqd5rsENoW7oL1BWVeeFO8lVLIOgCDwTWLGJwIX8gwok6Csj1I9PEcULeQVddEoa7dHkYCzqfT4bFznSz37VQ4j66YB8du4wjjJ1wkdO1pSQECiuQW7Ty_GBRaL6_vIeyRgSJcCnZtNGL18djlGCn8lzxPr5kKaJCFbJVzrdRsm7I8jY25-HZHaTlxFUWMKYwsuq7wQ6EWyzLmbz66mL6TtGmBLysLSQrLQoo9WJWuP29wh8Oh0nngEFHxXXVJKsfiXqgg4l1eoxSz)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6332212b3b2c4a7592027234139d73aa&_e=ZSKtRJww13AtmU96Fj9toBDIC80LQ8xPYLrS4wOQnFflSPLRb3vu0Nard-h5r6tfLum0-d0AGyEl_5eIsQgx-R4Uy7WykoSiiClGmWeXcY6Ez7Zqd7BFjN4OTPhD8B0p-hd5yKrJh2NY84WguR8uAQwryRs0pY_Zoy3xeMBHdrW5pAywn5CVJj1k7YDrVR8XFUJgtckIqAFxi6m5DHgLwQ%3D%3D)

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

It’s been tough at times but also incredibly SUCCESSFUL!
From the very moment I stepped off the golden staircase in Trump Tower with Melania to announce I was running for President in 2016...
The deep state couldn’t believe that a businessman was running for president. They thought I had no chance of winning, but of course, we proved them wrong.
During my first term, we made the economy stronger than anyone ever thought possible. And then, Joe Biden came in and destroyed it.
I saw the direction our great country was headed, and I couldn’t just sit back and watch. That’s when I made the decision to run for President again - for a third time.
Endless attacks, witch hunts, and fake news came pouring in the moment I announced.
The radical left knew they couldn’t beat me fairly, so they tried to stop me at every turn.

name: Doug White
subject: Voices of Resilience: Yakima County Stands Firm in 2025

| | In this edition:
* It is good to be back. We are on track and energized for 2025.
* Threat of Mass Deportation Mobilizes Yakima County Groups
* MAGA Mind: Yakima City Council Put in Their Place by Yakima Citizens for Civic Engagement
* Where Does Truth Reside: Moving Forward in a Post-Fact World

---
| | | |
---
| |
## It is good to be back
---
| | Rural Americans United took some time away from our regular writing to recover from the end-of-year politics and to focus on some internal matters that would ensure our ongoing success.Rural Americans United is quickly approaching its second anniversary. This is quite a milestone, and it could not have been achieved without the generous support from you. We have accomplished much in our short tenure and have found our niche.Rural Americans United is, firstly, a team player. Our support for other people and organizations in our communities that do so much to improve our lives and those of our neighbors is paramount. Secondly, Rural Americans United takes pride in focusing on actions that reach marginalized persons and encourage them to participate in the democratic process.Our recent and future endeavors focus on reaching those who might otherwise be excluded from participation in the democratic process, whether due to geography, program limitations, or budget constraints. These include rural communities and individuals without an established voting record, who are often overlooked by programs designed to encourage and rally democratic participation.We could not be more proud of the foundation we have created. With your continued support, we will persevere in bringing a voice to those in rural communities and encouraging full participation in the democratic process.
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
|

| | David Morales of the [Northwest Justice Project Farmworker Unit](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PChr1vM/c?w=OSxFX1pt8ncgsUPHUBVH-UIQVTYEYzcHb9sFZxiiaMg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ud2p1c3RpY2Uub3JnL2Zhcm13b3JrZXItdW5pdCIsInIiOiIyMzkyZTY1ZC05Yzg0LTRjZDYtODUzOC05YTE0NzdiZjcyMjciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ) and Michelle Besso of the [Yakima Immigrant Response Network](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PChr1vM/c?w=I6eO6JqKHsrjXhaFkPqQLXuHNGSzbxSG6bEpyPgdr_k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL1lha2ltYUltbWlncmFudFJlc3BvbnNlTmV0d29yay8iLCJyIjoiMjM5MmU2NWQtOWM4NC00Y2Q2LTg1MzgtOWExNDc3YmY3MjI3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) spoke at the [Wapato Filipino Community Hall](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PChr1vM/c?w=wXWt2nqvncpmxvRckEnLUKpYmNZgd0XqsXX8CMmLBs8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL2ZpbGlwaW5vaGFsbHdhcGF0by8iLCJyIjoiMjM5MmU2NWQtOWM4NC00Y2Q2LTg1MzgtOWExNDc3YmY3MjI3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) on January 11, 2025. The event was a listening session addressing the threat of mass deportation.One in ten people in Yakima County are vulnerable to deportation, and three million people nationwide have already received deportation orders. Our community is actively planning how to protect our own against the worst.Thank you to the Latino Community Fund, We Are Ella, Poder Latinx, and the Asian Pacific Islander Coalition - Yakima for their support.

| | Yakima Citizens for Civic Engagement Wins Court Case Against Yakima City Council! Community champions Natalie McClendon, Coleen Anderson, Dori Peralta Baker, and Spencer and Leslie Hatton took on city hall—and won. In a move straight out of Project 2025, the Yakima City Council attempted to circumvent citizen participation in government by overreaching their authority and then denying the facts. Read the Yakima Herald article [here](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PChr1vM/c?w=PHKHS8T75r-4m6xPEZ042xM3YA7in4sin8HhMOLQssA.).
---
| | | |
---
| |
## Where Does Truth Reside?
---
| | Today is a very troubling day. TikTok has been forced offline by the United States government. Many will brush it off as the loss of a frivolous app, and some may even think, "Good riddance." After all, it was—and is—largely an app for the young, which was its greatest strength. In a time when it seems that younger generations are detached from the reality and truth of our nation, engaging them is of the utmost importance. They are our future. One hundred seventy million Americans were on TikTok ([CNN](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PChr1vM/c?w=1ugY5yDiPvt4niUCE4nKGtKnwCPbTxUVXZjwZwmKzPU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY25uLmNvbS8yMDI1LzAxLzE5L3RlY2gvdGlrdG9rLWJhbiIsInIiOiJiNWUyMzBjMi1mMTM4LTQ1ZWUtOTBkZS1lYWZjN2M4YTkzNjkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ))—that’s half of our nation’s population. For many, TikTok became the first place to receive news and information. It was fast, concise, and always ahead of more traditional news services. Could it be trusted? The app itself is neither good nor bad; it is merely a vehicle. Those who published on it, like any other news source, must be vetted by the individual to determine whether the content was accurate. In that respect, it was no different from most other news outlets today. Rupert Murdoch owns the Fox News empire (why do they call it an empire?), Elon Musk owns X, Jeff Bezos owns The Washington Post, Mark Zuckerberg owns Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp, and most major news outlets have bent a knee to Donald Trump. Younger generations have developed a significant distrust of the accuracy of news sources—an issue that Trump and MAGA have successfully exploited. They proved this distrust valid by securing ownership or loyalty from many news outlets, ensuring that "truth" is no longer based on facts but on what can be sold to the public. After a recent visit to Mar-a-Lago, Mark Zuckerberg made significant policy changes at Facebook, stating (and I paraphrase): Facebook is removing fact-checking because facts are politically biased, and the last election proved that the American people support this idea. A statement like that could only have come from the mouth of MAGA.
---
| | [](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PChr1vM/c?w=x1V7vD8ZmNLedExicknz0y5TR3NfsgWTl3rdIJNKxsk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYi53YXRjaC94Y1FMVHBmMG5TLyIsInIiOiJkOTUxYWVjYi00YzE5LTQxNjktODVmMS0zYjc3N2JjNGU4MDgiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | According to [Statista](https://ruralamericansunited.org/so/b4PChr1vM/c?w=3pDClvs7vDJ5IXHcUbJ5bZVfwyg3jz0gP5mlkNwKwFY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3RhdGlzdGEuY29tL3N0YXRpc3RpY3MvNDA4OTcxL251bWJlci1vZi11cy1mYWNlYm9vay11c2Vycy8iLCJyIjoiMDlhMmU0NjAtODE3ZS00YjViLTljYjMtOTE1M2I4NTVmZGNkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0), there are 253 million Facebook users in America. Facebook, more than any other information source, influences what we think. This is because it is driven by an algorithm that prioritizes family and friends—our most trusted sources—and reinforces our beliefs by sending refined content to our newsfeeds. This substantiates what we already believe, stroking our egos and creating an echo chamber. What do Democrats do in a post-truth era of Orwellian doublespeak, where using facts implies bias and, therefore, cannot be trusted? How do we make truth as enticing as juicy gossip, conspiracy theories, or lazy logic? I don’t know. We’ve been on this slippery slope for a very long time. The decline in our education system, the retirement of Walter Cronkite, the rise of social media, the unbridled power of American oligarchs, and the impressive education Roy Cohn gave Donald Trump on how to obscure, intimidate, and flaunt the law and social norms through blatant and unrelenting lies—all have contributed to the normalization of falsehood over fact, as confirmed by a voting majority of the American population. I do not despair. Our access to news and information has been far more corrupt in the past, and we had far less ability to participate in and vet it. At the turn of the century, media empires were run by a handful of wealthy men who controlled what we knew about the world. Since individuals had no power to spread their own voices, it was our only truth. Today, we have a chance to find the truth, validate it, and share it. This is how Democrats will triumph: by using the tools of our oppressors for our benefit.
---

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: America is on the brink of destruction
body:
I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=087bd1643e1a45c0b1703ade25e26bd7&_e=sgCgAWAoRzTLSxcfEn6GodZit5PC5OOl8aQ8dYd_dFYeGM8JLioifW9vGpDhmVc-bT4XCn1RwYHJFxpi4VufhUkksgVFVHBCgb6acHeADmhSzhlYcIlU2lAHwr4IpJGwO0AfSrBURb_-0e5Qd--FohoShqDHQi22D3AR5jv3j_4OPEDMFirTX0YSquWvgBU9xxR8jNo_0oBDfuSQg-dS6w037cS8oSGnJt0iumi79cHQXK9wMXMotiYCk3xHx--mhFFrlJjbJwrGQFwjvmW0_IzEaIFFBIyKkq6LcFNhYUx83qbMp2UUhPM0tQIYxkSX7E8K2MZTMrWjpoH-aBUbCTBOfVk3yjPzw7uUX7Ehmv38zymImfW09Ego_70apiULusgBCkzZDb3w77WTTrgpJQ%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=087bd1643e1a45c0b1703ade25e26bd7&_e=sgCgAWAoRzTLSxcfEn6GodZit5PC5OOl8aQ8dYd_dFYeGM8JLioifW9vGpDhmVc-bT4XCn1RwYHJFxpi4VufhUkksgVFVHBCgb6acHeADmhSzhlYcIlU2lAHwr4IpJGwO0AfSrBURb_-0e5Qd--FohoShqDHQi22D3AR5jv3j_4OPEDMFirTX0YSquWvgBU9xxR8jNo_0oBDfuSQg-dS6w037cS8oSGnJt0iumi79cHQXK9wMXMotiYCk3xHx--mNWShmnHX4f1NjLImWcPo4Y27jsr6Uc_jEgkXAibXAXkr9d2pXs-8RTGGo_ODXzD74eWAgSMrBfZz6Fp50QR--5H0iHsdAFLcUS5pQ8IIVJNFBGWgSoj6XMThrT1i0Dkf4z9iwEPtbEdYw1NC6EFKrQ%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=087bd1643e1a45c0b1703ade25e26bd7&_e=sgCgAWAoRzTLSxcfEn6GodZit5PC5OOl8aQ8dYd_dFYeGM8JLioifW9vGpDhmVc-bT4XCn1RwYHJFxpi4VufhUkksgVFVHBCgb6acHeADmhSzhlYcIlU2lAHwr4IpJGwO0AfSrBURb_-0e5Qd--FohoShqDHQi22D3AR5jv3j_4OPEDMFirTX0YSquWvgBU9xxR8jNo_0oBDfuSQg-dS6w037cS8oSGnJt0iumi79cHQXK9wMXMotiYCk3xHx--m7Tn7raPkY4r8KoHODdm_HVfdkj7F9sSvli8jy6Jw_HEj3a1lI6Mb5BpU2gSADkijc_ncLLZtAIJaQgYQjl7OgiTwzkzLjewdCYe04bzkwdnNxaSAQ0fPWdl4RJ9Q5CbIJNdUcfr1PsysDlhK_ysdaA%3D%3D)**

That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | |

name: Jeff Younger
subject: Help Me Save My Son
body:
| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.

#
---
| | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0ae2194b7667455284dd689f79366cb7&_e=3SVsHh5dEbabhixrEyEd2_C2L7lu9W1G0Fw_yGxgbWPOw0SRHvntedIVU3CKpIkNOxh1mzfCuIVArXpZFYYv2dCGW2Jqd6Ev9p4qyed_XE_dcA7sjLe2SyIJ_JW9R0bt_D4himTLt2STCxU44piJk2s3qnlYGoYU-o0po8Pj1yp8MMusjGge__zJp5w-0Cg3l44oaO0wbPqo4wb3Ddf7h9EszQ_PYd4BXiXFbig28FuV7tC2d5V9X-UD4D9LscMyPbBudVYkT6cCjj4c8_6XdV-9nuy0wtUO1McYqhDfk95ZQLST277OscdsZA2CauWzW9Ofo3N7Wfbs-v5PGTXn8N8m6O-3O6o86N2jFl-eQm8pc2nmp4OtWuFS57l6P1QtfuOg9y1QExgZXXjtECX_Da95HcNRgWGaGEtua767vDxUDmh9Uh9kHwRG8K_jx0h9)
---
My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. **[I need your help.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0ae2194b7667455284dd689f79366cb7&_e=3SVsHh5dEbabhixrEyEd2_C2L7lu9W1G0Fw_yGxgbWPOw0SRHvntedIVU3CKpIkNOxh1mzfCuIVArXpZFYYv2dCGW2Jqd6Ev9p4qyed_XE_dcA7sjLe2SyIJ_JW9R0bt_D4himTLt2STCxU44piJk2s3qnlYGoYU-o0po8Pj1yp8MMusjGge__zJp5w-0Cg3l44oaO0wbPqo4wb3Ddf7h9EszQ_PYd4BXiXFbig28FuV7tC2d5V9X-UD4D9LscMyPbBudVYkT6cCjj4c8_6XdV-9nuy0wtUO1McYqhDfk97wxPORnLDey5CNDG6wNx3ho0jx2IraEmKzToXryQXdVzmg9dZ8RwYm_beUYcX6EQ9NH5kSa-JVIHTt6x3nMid0c93ahK3BeieFGlarBhKOfwl6S1w82YMSJkXT5G8HhWYu88TGZmCAEk0esr319ypx)** I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to **Save James** , **[would you consider making a generous $25 contribution to my Legal Defense Fund today?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0ae2194b7667455284dd689f79366cb7&_e=3SVsHh5dEbabhixrEyEd2_C2L7lu9W1G0Fw_yGxgbWPOw0SRHvntedIVU3CKpIkNOxh1mzfCuIVArXpZFYYv2Sj5AzlTmNxnFPpoUZu7d10URc_GIPRztGAoV41OAOuk2087mGgsz3lHus10V9w24MtdwTfv4kUGGBZaeGXzS7XS2KkqYGqwYubLTlOvkP2zgCc_icBR1-nOTrG54OuUS17Qh_BJXqIjlbQkr_bWFx5zE4ystKRTFDxK5_ZT6htqqpt3Su-rhU3tRg9KI-ZZlxvq-hJKVRLIQYJ0wmBvpKCDnMR5k8oXOD9_HqEQUwfU1dwkdOZe78t9Ch_kEYuXMvidWy7rNgy96fqpCpLSOUPyX-wrqNtknMHPMyXf5oCjQDKOi89fMZsg1dMjZEz4ND9mgwF5a9Y0B6tznZB7to1hI9XrN10fELv8ScqDZEiYd3jXnTnHonKmk5gZtekiH6kfrqJJU9anePfxQmlKMuY%3D)** But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because **he is a boy**. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.**Do you see what we’re up against?** I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** from their butchery.**[THAT’S why I need your help.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0ae2194b7667455284dd689f79366cb7&_e=3SVsHh5dEbabhixrEyEd2_C2L7lu9W1G0Fw_yGxgbWPOw0SRHvntedIVU3CKpIkNOxh1mzfCuIVArXpZFYYv2dCGW2Jqd6Ev9p4qyed_XE_dcA7sjLe2SyIJ_JW9R0bt_D4himTLt2STCxU44piJk2s3qnlYGoYU-o0po8Pj1yp8MMusjGge__zJp5w-0Cg3l44oaO0wbPqo4wb3Ddf7h9EszQ_PYd4BXiXFbig28FuV7tC2d5V9X-UD4D9LscMyPbBudVYkT6cCjj4c8_6XdV-9nuy0wtUO1McYqhDfk94gsJ_g-RY4EIOFxg_K8R0ESNCgJFr7kqLyY0ZENGx1YmxtMBh8J635EvTDCoMxGxuD5Ve_xJQrp4XI6H-LNbEDrw1p6A68Roa3_dNXdXWga5EKGZVcC-DToGG8JoR19kwS7HpJM_C0g3EYklGPsJ5-)** I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on **James**.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:**If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere.** Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...**Do you see what we’re up against?** But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. **[Will you stand with us?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=0ae2194b7667455284dd689f79366cb7&_e=3SVsHh5dEbabhixrEyEd2_C2L7lu9W1G0Fw_yGxgbWPOw0SRHvntedIVU3CKpIkNOxh1mzfCuIVArXpZFYYv2dCGW2Jqd6Ev9p4qyed_XE_dcA7sjLe2SyIJ_JW9R0bt_D4himTLt2STCxU44piJk2s3qnlYGoYU-o0po8Pj1yp8MMusjGge__zJp5w-0Cg3l44oaO0wbPqo4wb3Ddf7h9EszQ_PYd4BXiXFbig28FuV7tC2d5V9X-UD4D9LscMyPbBudVYkT6cCjj4c8_6XdV-9nuy0wtUO1McYqhDfk95uEVi42KMMDNs5m45pvYbJkO_C8LLXAWxSieziiHYquqVRuGk0wtT3wacHZeiE1iGXy8R3a6sIo9vtXKrXZ5oXYW94LYm7rqegF5A3OvHT1eke5LqYLdIIXFZ5xpPQLG7u3i1cK3znA6Zkoqg1HC8R)**
