clean_body: | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to Save James , But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because he is a boy. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.Do you see what we’re up against? I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved from their butchery.- I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on James.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere. Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...Do you see what we’re up against? But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. | | | | | | | The fact is, if you care about keeping your children or grandchildren safe...If you want to save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again...And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come...Then you’ll need someone who knows how these kangaroo courts ACTUALLY operate, and someone who’s willing to do WHATEVER it takes to save his son and every other kid like him.I humbly submit to you that I am that man. Your Warrior on the Frontlines,Jeff Younger P.S. I need your help to save my son. I have fought for a decade to keep radical activists and judges from transitioning my son against my will and against all reason. I have lobbied politicians, wiped out my life’s savings, and spent thousands of hours in court trying to save my son. Would you please rush me your I need your help, and I need to know that I’m not alone in this fight. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789 |

subject: Why the Tik Tok Ban Should Worry You

NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Why the Tik Tok Ban Should Worry You](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=155167984&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1MTY3OTg0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzczMTcxMjMsImV4cCI6MTczOTkwOTEyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tOieGfE8L-fGNZ4qR1Y2Mj9DOvY3J4gYblRDxcXs9I4)
### Please read, even if you are not a Tik Tok user
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Jan 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e09f8914-b97f-4c86-9b3d-ee18771af0f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Around 10:35pm EST on January 18, 2025, Tik Tok users received this message.
It was a stunning answer to the question, "Would they REALLY ban Tik Tok?"
What was equally stunning was the message that Trump would become the savior of Tik Tok. Way to go, Dems. You handed the incoming administration a huge win, even before Day One.
Thank goodness Trump can't run again. Can he?
### Full disclosure: I'm not really a Tik Tok user
I wasn't really a user of Tik Tok, though occasionally someone would send me a video that I enjoyed. Early on, I tried to make pithy, sassy professionally-savvy videos. I was terrible at them. Maybe I was never an avid Tik Tok user because I just wasn't that good at it.
During my 2024 campaign, my team tested the Tik Tok waters. We couldn't get engagement sufficient to justify the time and energy spent. Several supporters offered. We had so many weird experiences with data and bots, we couldn't fathom loosening the reigns enough to let someone else in to our team. Time was precious.
### I wasn't aligned with my own Senator on the Tik Tok issue
At one of my first campaign events, Democratic Senator Kirsten Gillibrand spoke about the need to ban Tik Tok for security reasons. When I heard Sen. Gillibrand make this remark, the US was somewhere in the spluttering quagmire of the documents case. Reports of Trump revealing security secrets over dinner at Mar A Lago abounded.
Ah. But this was Chinese.
Hatred for things "Chinese" has resulted in a rise in anti-Asian crime. I'm part Filipino. This raised my hackles. Most violence against Asians is not preceded by a "show us your family tree" demand from the usually-white assailant.
I looked around the room. Most of the sound equipment was probably Chinese. The dishes. Probably many of the garments worn by the audience members were from China. The technology in the cars outside: China. Oh. Those cell phones that were enthusiastically being used to photograph the Senator as she spoke: Chinese technology, undoubtedly traveling through other Chinese satellite technology.
I agree with Sen. Gillibrand on the overwhelming majority of her ideas. The Tik Tok ban was not one of them.
### Other arguments
**Other arguments deployed by proponents of the Tik Tok ban** : the algorithm can be manipulated. My response: ask anyone who works in marketing. Algorithms are almost designed to be manipulated.
**Argument** : There are Chinese spies listening in. My response: Sure. But have you had the experience of talking to someone, and lo and behold you get ads on Google? I'm not dismissive of this security breach, but it isn't just China doing this. Siri and other "smart" technologies have had similar complaints. Some such complaints are based in fact; others not.
Other response to the Chinese spies argument: hasn't the incoming administration made it clear that they intend to work closely with Vladimir Putin? Isn't Russia still our enemy also? Apparently not.
Still another response: we never had much of a resolution over the use by Facebook of [Cambridge Analytica, which we know was used to manipulate the 2016 presidential election](https://substack.com/redirect/6e192500-07b4-47e5-ac71-0532dfa87449?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), aka Trump 1.0. And now we have allowed Facebook to lift any semblance of guardrails through release of its fact-checking filters. (Except for my campaign account, which temporarily had a post banned for suspected sexual content when I invited people to last week's Zoom Town Hall. Thankfully the ban was lifted about 12 hours later.)
In case you have forgotten the Cambridge Analytica scandal (there have been so many:
> The Times [reported that in 2014 contractors and employees](https://substack.com/redirect/090de204-ece5-4859-95ca-e1350293b2b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Cambridge Analytica, eager to sell psychological profiles of American voters to political campaigns, acquired the private Facebook data of tens of millions of users -- the largest known leak in Facebook history. (Source: [NYTimes](https://substack.com/redirect/16ce6d04-127d-4e80-995d-bb55e704a6b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
No ban of Facebook. Open the doors wider, and give the CEO a seat at the Inauguration.
**Argument:** Your data isn't kept on US servers. My response: neither is all of my cell phone data, or XBox data, or GPS data.
**Argument** : The technology is addictive. My response: True. So is online gambling. So are many other things online. Why single this platform out?
**Argument:** Your data is at risk. My response: colleges and universities have major data breaches. So do hospitals. So do banks. Should we ban all of them, too?
**Argument** : Our children are at risk. My response: OK. Ban assault weapons so I know that you are serious about keeping kids safe.
Other response: the terms of service of most social media platforms includes a filter for age verification. A user must be 13 years or older to use Tik Tok. But talk to the tweens, and you hear much enthusiastic chatter about latest Tik Tok posts. And like any social media app, there still needs to be a parent lurking to double check that the kids are OK. If this is all about keeping the kids safe, couldn't we find other workarounds to make sure that the tweens stay off the Tik Tok?
**Argument** : Our whole society is at risk: My response: True. Did I mention the assault weapons? And how about the vulnerabilities in our food supply that are so messed up we can die from listeria-laced lettuce? Or the attacks we have seen on our powergrid and communications networks? And to date, I have not heard a clear explanation of what, exactly, were [all of those drones in the sky in New Jersey and New York](https://substack.com/redirect/4366258f-1e0c-49a7-a338-341f01a18d24?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
### Several wrongs don't make a right
My responses to the arguments are, admittedly, on the level of a 15-year-old saying, "but...but...it's not fair." Several wrongs don't make Tik Tok right or completely safe. In fact, no technology is safe. How many debit cards have I had to replace because my data was compromised?
It isn't fair. The Tik Tok ban is simply not a measured, just response to valid concerns. And that's exactly why I want everyone -- even those who don't care a darn about social media or Tik Tok -- to sit up and take note of what is going on.
### It's really a grab for money and power
My queasiness over the Tik Tok ban is that Donald Trump and the Billionaire Bros are lined up to profit from it. Cue image of vultures descending on road kill.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/73747c90-540a-4481-a81f-c57649ed67c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We saw it coming when generous donors Bezos, Musk, and Zuckerberg were invited to join those seated on the dais for Monday's Inauguration. Then came the announcement three days ago that [Shou Chew, the CEO of Tik Tok](https://substack.com/redirect/c0837006-1708-43ba-9962-aae0a4d72312?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) would join the group.
So let's get this straight: we are so worried about this CEO's impact on a national security that we are seating him within steps of the new president, not to mention hundreds of other members of our government? Has anyone ever heard of scanner technology that can lift personal data through a device held in someone's pocket, and have they thought about this at the Inauguration?
### The plan for Trump and his cronies to profit from Tik Tok is not exactly late-breaking news
As the Tik Tok case made its way through courts and the halls of Congress, Trump was already cashing in. In October, 2024, wife of a board member of Tik Tok's company, Byte Dance, [generously contributed $1.4 million to the Trump campaign.](https://substack.com/redirect/e3eb5374-a7c4-45d8-a268-b9acad52b3bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Non-Trump supporters have been concerned that Musk would be able to use his financial support and close proximity to Trump to advance his own business interests. That concept is clear in Musk's complaint that [his social media platform, "X" is not permitted in China](https://substack.com/redirect/9ca341fe-e785-4b66-a6de-db7cda7f3e5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and his attempts to [buy Tik Tok](https://substack.com/redirect/8737bc17-1066-461c-8448-bca1427d37c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (like Greenland, it wasn't for sale -- at least 5 days ago it wasn't). [Others have chimed in to attempt to buy Tik Tok](https://substack.com/redirect/fd3df17f-cb48-4a41-89ef-7f55be29042f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
These multi-billion-dollar transactions make it clear that the US government isn't really saying, "Tik Tok bad; ban it forever". Really what they are saying is that they want more of the profit stream to be funneled back to the US, specifically to the inner circle of billionaires who will be seated with the Tik Tok CEO at the Inauguration.
### The good news for Democrats
The good news for Democrats is that, once again, Trump's antics are causing splintering of the GOP. House Speaker Mike Johnson is clearly not in the same room with the likes of Musk.
> Speaker Mike Johnson on Sunday dispelled the notion that President-elect [Donald Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/16ce0682-4942-4e2f-a84c-aeec2099e45b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) would bring [TikTok](https://substack.com/redirect/9ccc6381-8fc3-406e-a2f5-aedad6d28deb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) back early in his second term without the company's willingness to sell to a U.S.-based owner.
> "I think we will enforce the law," Johnson told NBC News' "Meet the Press" on Sunday, a day after Trump told NBC News that [he would "most likely" give TikTok a 90-day extension](https://substack.com/redirect/0aef533c-1b36-4578-b7e4-d0b7f27b241c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to operate in the U.S.
> Johnson's remarks come just hours after TikTok [halted operations in the U.S.](https://substack.com/redirect/36db8a39-e151-4803-93a1-f0931176bf37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), cutting user access to the app. At the same time, Apple, Google and Microsoft removed the app from app stores, preventing new users from downloading it. (Source: [NBC News](https://substack.com/redirect/5d2b1ee9-b598-4701-adfe-9518ddd63075?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
### Tik Tok has been restored even before Trump was sworn in
I guess Mike Johnson didn't get the memo from Trump.
While many Americans were sleeping in on a cold winter Sunday (in fact, while I was typing this post!), the new administration and its Tech oligarchs were busy behind the scenes. At around 12:45pm on Sunday, January 19, 2025, Tik Tok issued this notification:
> "In agreement with our service providers, TikTok is in the process of restoring service," TikTok said in a statement that thanked Trump for "providing the necessary clarity and assurance to our service providers that they will face no penalties (for) providing TikTok to over 170 million Americans and allowing over 7 million small businesses to thrive." (Source: [Reuters](https://substack.com/redirect/b5b25036-2675-4aa5-8a97-c4f41feb76df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cf5c3ef2-f841-4806-a4fb-a89e78a58799?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### Joe Biden warned us of oligarchs and the "tech industrial complex"
In his farewell address on January 15, 2025, President Joe Biden warned of a "dangerous concentration of power in the hands of very few ultra-wealthy people, and the dangerous consequences if their abuse of power is left unchecked." (Source: [Whitehouse.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/cf689958-5662-4139-b9db-fc1dc4ad10c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
He also warned of a "tech industrial complex" and of "the potential for the disastrous rise of misplaced power..." ([Biden, quoting Eisenhower](https://substack.com/redirect/cf689958-5662-4139-b9db-fc1dc4ad10c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
Days later, here we are.
### The tech oligarchy isn't using its power to benefit everyday Americans
Biden's concerns about the tech industry are echoed by Sen. Bernie Sanders. Writing on "X" on Jan 8, 2025, Sanders said this:
> "If there is truly a major shortage of skilled tech workers in this country, why did Tesla lay-off over 7,500 American workers last year -- including many software developers and engineers at its factory in Austin, Texas -- while applying to hire thousands of H-1B guest workers?" ([Bernie Sanders on X on Jan 8, 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/6a64e1f8-8c4f-44f5-bbff-ba33ac6e7660?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
The likes of Bezos, Musk, and Zuckerberg are not interested in creating American jobs. They are not seeking to find solutions to the problems of education, healthcare, poverty, housing, and nutrition by investing in America. No. They intend to acquire new platforms and technologies, and [staff them with H1B Visa holders](https://substack.com/redirect/a654c696-bdda-44ba-a6e4-45ab24a36849?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
See comments above about splintering the GOP platform, which wants to see us get rid of migrant workers. This inner-GOP controversy on H1B Visa holders is good for Democrats in general, but it seems like it isn't really helping to get us a strong immigration policy.
### The Tik Tok ban did not solve the problem. In fact, it only made it worse!
Once again, we are seeing that when Trump gets involved in something, the rule of law is not applied evenly. Trump decided he wants this Tik Tok ban to change. It will happen.
The lack of problem-solving to address the security concerns could have been an opportunity to engage the under-40 set in genuine discussions about data, access, and corporate structures. We abandoned that opportunity.
Falling so quickly on the heels of an election in which Democrats seemed to lose voters, as well as the Gaza issue which ignited university protestors, the losses to the young progressives are adding up. I don't know that we will ever get them back, despite our claims of "big tent" democracy.
### Tik Tok users just downloaded another app owned by the Chinese government
Instead of taking up other hobbies outside of social media, American Tik Tok users found another Chinese-owned app. Wildly popular, the [2013 app known as Red Note has become the #1 app in the United States](https://substack.com/redirect/4451eeea-58f5-4e39-a5f2-ad80ef1db2d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Note that Red Note is known as Xiaohongshu in China.
There was no thought given to the US government telling them that Chinese apps were dangerous. The Tik Tok ban ignited a level of furor at the US government and against the tech giants such as we have not seen before. The anger by American users is palpable.
> "I'm going to download it [Red Note] on my phone. I'm going to let it track other apps. I'm going to give it permission to see my location and all of my contacts and then I'm just going to let it sit there," a TikTok user posted. "I'm going to let it sit there as a little window through which my personal Chinese spy can see everything that I'm doing."
> Others had a more somber tone discussing their decisions to download RedNote, suggesting the U.S. government's intention was to hurt its people, many of whom have built large followings and full-time careers on TikTok.
> "Our government, I'm convinced, loves and thrives seeing us unhappy and seeing us struggle and seeing us poor," [another TikToker](https://substack.com/redirect/cd260494-5307-44c9-88b2-b5b2107f21d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) said. "Seeing that RedNote, another Chinese app, which is owned and hosted in China, is the No. 1 app in the App Store today is just beautiful." (Source: [NBC News](https://substack.com/redirect/4451eeea-58f5-4e39-a5f2-ad80ef1db2d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
The younger set has little concern that Red Note is named after The Little Red Book of quotations by Chairman Mao, nor that it is owned by a communist government. Instead it seems to be an anti-Meta protest, as well as a protest over the sell-out of our country. The user named heathermckay6049, commenting on Youtube, said the following about the migration of users from Tik Tok to Red Note:
> It's not just a dislike for Mark Zuckerberg, it's a protest against the influence of private companies on politics. American politicians have shown time and time again that they feel more of a responsibility to their donors than their constituents. We're all being fed this line about concerns over foreign influence on American user data as the reason for the ban, but it's not hard to also draw a line to who voted to ban TikTok and how many of those politicians received campaign donations from Meta. (Source: [Youtube; see comments](https://substack.com/redirect/c620ce1a-88cd-4463-998c-0a4ea1f7dc49?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
Take a listen to that Youtube video, and you will also discover that young Americans and young Chinese are learning language and culture. There is comparison of our respective differences in labor, healthcare, housing, and general economic stability.
Newsflash: Middle Class life in China looks pretty good to our young Americans on Red Note. Middle Class life in the US looks horrifying to young Chinese on Red Note, and in turn, to Americans. Good luck getting those voters to the polls for a moderate Democratic platform in 2026 and beyond.
### We've been played
I acknowledge that Tik Tok has security concerns. But this ban and the surrounding controversy was not about addressing those security concerns. In the months since I heard Sen. Gillibrand speak, our national security has been placed at even greater risk, with the inclusion of numerous advisors and cronies in the incoming president's inner circle who cannot even pass a security check.
No -- this Tik Tok ban was a fumble. In allowing it to go this far, with providing only a binary solution (either sell to a US investor or shut down), rather than addressing the actual security concerns, we opened the door for nefarious practices in billionaire circles that most everyday Americans cannot fathom.
In the process, we have, once again, cut ties with the very hope of our future election process, with the under-40 social media users.
The timing of the Tik Tok ban handed the incoming Trump administration a huge win. Very soon, I am convinced, the Tik Tok ban will result in the billionaire tech oligarchs that surround Trump will profit handsomely, all while hundreds of thousands of American Tik Tok users migrate to yet another Chinese-owned platform.
We didn't solve the problem. We made it worse. We will feel this in future elections. Plus we handed more profits to the billionaire oligarchs.
In short, we have been played.

clean_body: Please read, even if you are not a Tik Tok user | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race Please read, even if you are not a Tik Tok user | | | Jan 19 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Around 10:35pm EST on January 18, 2025, Tik Tok users received this message. It was a stunning answer to the question, "Would they REALLY ban Tik Tok?" What was equally stunning was the message that Trump would become the savior of Tik Tok. Way to go, Dems. You handed the incoming administration a huge win, even before Day One. Thank goodness Trump can't run again. Can he? Full disclosure: I'm not really a Tik Tok user I wasn't really a user of Tik Tok, though occasionally someone would send me a video that I enjoyed. Early on, I tried to make pithy, sassy professionally-savvy videos. I was terrible at them. Maybe I was never an avid Tik Tok user because I just wasn't that good at it. During my 2024 campaign, my team tested the Tik Tok waters. We couldn't get engagement sufficient to justify the time and energy spent. Several supporters offered. We had so many weird experiences with data and bots, we couldn't fathom loosening the reigns enough to let someone else in to our team. Time was precious. I wasn't aligned with my own Senator on the Tik Tok issue At one of my first campaign events, Democratic Senator Kirsten Gillibrand spoke about the need to ban Tik Tok for security reasons. When I heard Sen. Gillibrand make this remark, the US was somewhere in the spluttering quagmire of the documents case. Reports of Trump revealing security secrets over dinner at Mar A Lago abounded. Ah. But this was Chinese. Hatred for things "Chinese" has resulted in a rise in anti-Asian crime. I'm part Filipino. This raised my hackles. Most violence against Asians is not preceded by a "show us your family tree" demand from the usually-white assailant. I looked around the room. Most of the sound equipment was probably Chinese. The dishes. Probably many of the garments worn by the audience members were from China. The technology in the cars outside: China. Oh. Those cell phones that were enthusiastically being used to photograph the Senator as she spoke: Chinese technology, undoubtedly traveling through other Chinese satellite technology. I agree with Sen. Gillibrand on the overwhelming majority of her ideas. The Tik Tok ban was not one of them. Other arguments Other arguments deployed by proponents of the Tik Tok ban : the algorithm can be manipulated. My response: ask anyone who works in marketing. Algorithms are almost designed to be manipulated. Argument : There are Chinese spies listening in. My response: Sure. But have you had the experience of talking to someone, and lo and behold you get ads on Google? I'm not dismissive of this security breach, but it isn't just China doing this. Siri and other "smart" technologies have had similar complaints. Some such complaints are based in fact; others not. Other response to the Chinese spies argument: hasn't the incoming administration made it clear that they intend to work closely with Vladimir Putin? Isn't Russia still our enemy also? Apparently not. Still another response: we never had much of a resolution over the use by Facebook of , aka Trump 1.0. And now we have allowed Facebook to lift any semblance of guardrails through release of its fact-checking filters. (Except for my campaign account, which temporarily had a post banned for suspected sexual content when I invited people to last week's Zoom Town Hall. Thankfully the ban was lifted about 12 hours later.) In case you have forgotten the Cambridge Analytica scandal (there have been so many: The Times of Cambridge Analytica, eager to sell psychological profiles of American voters to political campaigns, acquired the private Facebook data of tens of millions of users -- the largest known leak in Facebook history. (Source: ) No ban of Facebook. Open the doors wider, and give the CEO a seat at the Inauguration. Argument: Your data isn't kept on US servers. My response: neither is all of my cell phone data, or XBox data, or GPS data. Argument : The technology is addictive. My response: True. So is online gambling. So are many other things online. Why single this platform out? Argument: Your data is at risk. My response: colleges and universities have major data breaches. So do hospitals. So do banks. Should we ban all of them, too? Argument : Our children are at risk. My response: OK. Ban assault weapons so I know that you are serious about keeping kids safe. Other response: the terms of service of most social media platforms includes a filter for age verification. A user must be 13 years or older to use Tik Tok. But talk to the tweens, and you hear much enthusiastic chatter about latest Tik Tok posts. And like any social media app, there still needs to be a parent lurking to double check that the kids are OK. If this is all about keeping the kids safe, couldn't we find other workarounds to make sure that the tweens stay off the Tik Tok? Argument** : Our whole society is at risk: My response: True. Did I mention the assault weapons? And how about the vulnerabilities in our food supply that are so messed up we can die from listeria-laced lettuce? Or the attacks we have seen on our powergrid and communications networks? And to date, I have not heard a clear explanation of what, exactly, were ? Several wrongs don't make a right My responses to the arguments are, admittedly, on the level of a 15-year-old saying, "but...but...it's not fair." Several wrongs don't make Tik Tok right or completely safe. In fact, no technology is safe. How many debit cards have I had to replace because my data was compromised? It isn't fair. The Tik Tok ban is simply not a measured, just response to valid concerns. And that's exactly why I want everyone -- even those who don't care a darn about social media or Tik Tok -- to sit up and take note of what is going on. It's really a grab for money and power My queasiness over the Tik Tok ban is that Donald Trump and the Billionaire Bros are lined up to profit from it. Cue image of vultures descending on road kill. | | ---|---|--- We saw it coming when generous donors Bezos, Musk, and Zuckerberg were invited to join those seated on the dais for Monday's Inauguration. Then came the announcement three days ago that would join the group. So let's get this straight: we are so worried about this CEO's impact on a national security that we are seating him within steps of the new president, not to mention hundreds of other members of our government? Has anyone ever heard of scanner technology that can lift personal data through a device held in someone's pocket, and have they thought about this at the Inauguration? The plan for Trump and his cronies to profit from Tik Tok is not exactly late-breaking news As the Tik Tok case made its way through courts and the halls of Congress, Trump was already cashing in. In October, 2024, wife of a board member of Tik Tok's company, Byte Dance, Non-Trump supporters have been concerned that Musk would be able to use his financial support and close proximity to Trump to advance his own business interests. That concept is clear in Musk's complaint that , and his attempts to (like Greenland, it wasn't for sale -- at least 5 days ago it wasn't). . These multi-billion-dollar transactions make it clear that the US government isn't really saying, "Tik Tok bad; ban it forever". Really what they are saying is that they want more of the profit stream to be funneled back to the US, specifically to the inner circle of billionaires who will be seated with the Tik Tok CEO at the Inauguration. The good news for Democrats The good news for Democrats is that, once again, Trump's antics are causing splintering of the GOP. House Speaker Mike Johnson is clearly not in the same room with the likes of Musk. Speaker Mike Johnson on Sunday dispelled the notion that President-elect would bring back early in his second term without the company's willingness to sell to a U.S.-based owner. "I think we will enforce the law," Johnson told NBC News' "Meet the Press" on Sunday, a day after Trump told NBC News that to operate in the U.S. Johnson's remarks come just hours after TikTok , cutting user access to the app. At the same time, Apple, Google and Microsoft removed the app from app stores, preventing new users from downloading it. (Source: ) Tik Tok has been restored even before Trump was sworn in I guess Mike Johnson didn't get the memo from Trump. While many Americans were sleeping in on a cold winter Sunday (in fact, while I was typing this post!), the new administration and its Tech oligarchs were busy behind the scenes. At around 12:45pm on Sunday, January 19, 2025, Tik Tok issued this notification: "In agreement with our service providers, TikTok is in the process of restoring service," TikTok said in a statement that thanked Trump for "providing the necessary clarity and assurance to our service providers that they will face no penalties (for) providing TikTok to over 170 million Americans and allowing over 7 million small businesses to thrive." (Source: ) | | ---|---|--- Joe Biden warned us of oligarchs and the "tech industrial complex" In his farewell address on January 15, 2025, President Joe Biden warned of a "dangerous concentration of power in the hands of very few ultra-wealthy people, and the dangerous consequences if their abuse of power is left unchecked." (Source: ) He also warned of a "tech industrial complex" and of "the potential for the disastrous rise of misplaced power..." () Days later, here we are. The tech oligarchy isn't using its power to benefit everyday Americans Biden's concerns about the tech industry are echoed by Sen. Bernie Sanders. Writing on "X" on Jan 8, 2025, Sanders said this: "If there is truly a major shortage of skilled tech workers in this country, why did Tesla lay-off over 7,500 American workers last year -- including many software developers and engineers at its factory in Austin, Texas -- while applying to hire thousands of H-1B guest workers?" () The likes of Bezos, Musk, and Zuckerberg are not interested in creating American jobs. They are not seeking to find solutions to the problems of education, healthcare, poverty, housing, and nutrition by investing in America. No. They intend to acquire new platforms and technologies, and . See comments above about splintering the GOP platform, which wants to see us get rid of migrant workers. This inner-GOP controversy on H1B Visa holders is good for Democrats in general, but it seems like it isn't really helping to get us a strong immigration policy. The Tik Tok ban did not solve the problem. In fact, it only made it worse! Once again, we are seeing that when Trump gets involved in something, the rule of law is not applied evenly. Trump decided he wants this Tik Tok ban to change. It will happen. The lack of problem-solving to address the security concerns could have been an opportunity to engage the under-40 set in genuine discussions about data, access, and corporate structures. We abandoned that opportunity. Falling so quickly on the heels of an election in which Democrats seemed to lose voters, as well as the Gaza issue which ignited university protestors, the losses to the young progressives are adding up. I don't know that we will ever get them back, despite our claims of "big tent" democracy. Tik Tok users just downloaded another app owned by the Chinese government Instead of taking up other hobbies outside of social media, American Tik Tok users found another Chinese-owned app. Wildly popular, the . Note that Red Note is known as Xiaohongshu in China. There was no thought given to the US government telling them that Chinese apps were dangerous. The Tik Tok ban ignited a level of furor at the US government and against the tech giants such as we have not seen before. The anger by American users is palpable. "I'm going to download it [Red Note] on my phone. I'm going to let it track other apps. I'm going to give it permission to see my location and all of my contacts and then I'm just going to let it sit there," a TikTok user posted. "I'm going to let it sit there as a little window through which my personal Chinese spy can see everything that I'm doing." Others had a more somber tone discussing their decisions to download RedNote, suggesting the U.S. government's intention was to hurt its people, many of whom have built large followings and full-time careers on TikTok. "Our government, I'm convinced, loves and thrives seeing us unhappy and seeing us struggle and seeing us poor," said. "Seeing that RedNote, another Chinese app, which is owned and hosted in China, is the No. 1 app in the App Store today is just beautiful." (Source: ) The younger set has little concern that Red Note is named after The Little Red Book of quotations by Chairman Mao, nor that it is owned by a communist government. Instead it seems to be an anti-Meta protest, as well as a protest over the sell-out of our country. The user named heathermckay6049, commenting on Youtube, said the following about the migration of users from Tik Tok to Red Note: It's not just a dislike for Mark Zuckerberg, it's a protest against the influence of private companies on politics. American politicians have shown time and time again that they feel more of a responsibility to their donors than their constituents. We're all being fed this line about concerns over foreign influence on American user data as the reason for the ban, but it's not hard to also draw a line to who voted to ban TikTok and how many of those politicians received campaign donations from Meta. (Source: ) Take a listen to that Youtube video, and you will also discover that young Americans and young Chinese are learning language and culture. There is comparison of our respective differences in labor, healthcare, housing, and general economic stability. Newsflash: Middle Class life in China looks pretty good to our young Americans on Red Note. Middle Class life in the US looks horrifying to young Chinese on Red Note, and in turn, to Americans. Good luck getting those voters to the polls for a moderate Democratic platform in 2026 and beyond. We've been played I acknowledge that Tik Tok has security concerns. But this ban and the surrounding controversy was not about addressing those security concerns. In the months since I heard Sen. Gillibrand speak, our national security has been placed at even greater risk, with the inclusion of numerous advisors and cronies in the incoming president's inner circle who cannot even pass a security check. No -- this Tik Tok ban was a fumble. In allowing it to go this far, with providing only a binary solution (either sell to a US investor or shut down), rather than addressing the actual security concerns, we opened the door for nefarious practices in billionaire circles that most everyday Americans cannot fathom. In the process, we have, once again, cut ties with the very hope of our future election process, with the under-40 social media users. The timing of the Tik Tok ban handed the incoming Trump administration a huge win. Very soon, I am convinced, the Tik Tok ban will result in the billionaire tech oligarchs that surround Trump will profit handsomely, all while hundreds of thousands of American Tik Tok users migrate to yet another Chinese-owned platform. We didn't solve the problem. We made it worse. We will feel this in future elections. Plus we handed more profits to the billionaire oligarchs. In short, we have been played. If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. Donations are much appreciated. Checks can be sent to Paula Collins for Congress; 441 Old State Road, DeKalb Junction, NY 13630, or click these words to: . ("Subscribe Now" is a great way to subscribe to my Substack!) | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

clean_body: This is my last rally...so thank you for everything you’ve done for me. I will always love you and the MAGA Movement! | | | | | I’M MAKING A HUGE ANNOUNCEMENT! This will be my FINAL RALLY before I’m sworn in as President, so I need to make this announcement... At this very moment at my rally, I AM LAUNCHING THE FINAL TRUMP RALLY BLITZ EVER! Friend, you have until the END OF THE DAY to be a part of history, and I know you won’t let me down. WE ARE GOING TO BREAK RECORDS! If you make this the best Trump Rally Blitz of ALL TIME , I just know that Inauguration Day tomorrow will be the start of unleashing the best years in AMERICAN HISTORY. BUT Democrats are already trying to END MAGA and my ENTIRE CABINET could be in jeopardy! Thank you, Donald J. name: History Facts
subject: 6 of the most famous photos of the 1950s
body:
The 1950s were a time of profound change and contrast, both in American society and globally.
---

# [6 Photos That Define the 1950s](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqcquq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqcquq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqcquq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T he 1950s were a time of profound change and contrast, both in American society and globally. These complexities were captured in the period’s photography, from celebrity snaps by the burgeoning paparazzi to powerful images of the Civil Rights Movement taken by experienced photojournalists. Here are six photos that encapsulate the spirit and struggles of the decade, and have become iconic images of the 1950s.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Before Trump officially takes office tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I have a few minutes while I get ready for tomorrow, so I wanted to send you a quick note.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1456%2E791427%2EqLK2vY)

Hi Friend,
I have a few minutes while I get ready for tomorrow, so I wanted to send you a quick note.
I know that for all of us in this movement, Trump’s inauguration is a moment of great anxiety for the future of our country and the progress we’ve fought for.
Truth is, the next four years will be hard. They will present all kinds of challenges, and we will surely take some losses.
But nothing is set in stone. Nothing is certain as long as we exercise the greatest power we have in our democracy: the power of the people, organized and ready to fight for what we know is right.
That’s why I’m asking you. Let’s make tomorrow day one of our mission to turn the tide against the far-right, fight for the working class of this country, and take back Congress and the White House.
It’s a lofty goal, I know, but every successful grassroots movement is built piece by piece, one person at a time. And we just can’t afford the alternative. We don’t have the luxury of backing down as MAGA extremists target the most vulnerable among us and make the ultra-rich even richer.
So, if you’re ready to get started on the work ahead, you can use **[this link](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan25.usI49z&refcode=em250119-1-gm&t=2&akid=1456%2E791427%2EqLK2vY)** or the button below to make a contribution to this campaign and our movement.
Tomorrow will be hard, but we will get through this together. Our friends and neighbors are counting on us to stay strong and get to work.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[DONATE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan25.usI49z&refcode=em250119-1-gm&t=3&akid=1456%2E791427%2EqLK2vY)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=1456%2E791427%2EqLK2vY)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=1456%2E791427%2EqLK2vY)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=1456%2E791427%2EqLK2vY)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1456_791427_qLK2vY&akid=1456%2E791427%2EqLK2vY)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: Humbly asking Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458

| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22775%2E4449941%2EPlLAsl)
---
**Friend, Bernie Sanders is sounding alarm about the disastrous effects of _Citizens United_:** | [Please, chip in $7 to help us end the influence of _Citizens United_ and support our work »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58945?t=7&akid=22775%2E4449941%2EPlLAsl)
---
**GOAL: $5,000 | DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT**
* * *
**Friend, here are three things we need you to know:**

1️⃣ _Citizens United_ is the BIGGEST threat to our Democracy.

2️⃣Billionaires and corporate special interests use _Citizens United_ to FLOOD elections with Dark Money.

3️⃣The only way to save our Democracy is to STOP DARK MONEY!
[**Please, we live in a DEMOCRACY and we should decide our elections with our votes! Chip in $7 or anything you can to help us elect state and local Democrats who will END _Citizens United_ »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58945?t=8&akid=22775%2E4449941%2EPlLAsl)

subject: depraved lunacy
body:
We're building a grassroots war chest that will take on MAGA and win.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zEJ-Xi76gXKa_YdTco2M81P51hEZcWzK2MRC-oLUmMyr-GwA7v5AOOjKlH44DMmk3cqAJAyfXhAIafUi-f28kmKgcL2vNDKz99y-ur1P_wt0Q7w-5mB9-stgHCoZf6n5VfKFxGBseFfGii9iaML-G8S1u-S_mYjPFCgKOcM6YZeD_LGO_5U3hS3h9PCR1yFF9ja0dCS92pbwNSaMEg8lOen79SsaQJ_i&c=Fws89h2BW4tMdoxA1fICRure9vrCTb6h8fSVbxy9270B4NsFGnx4ag==&ch=d7qcAgAMTADdc0K9JVDzBqYMBs72RcbSCwgqUgKa-2oeHu-G_mAotw==)
---
| | | | Team,
We don't have much time left. On April 1, Democrat Josh Weil--a respected teacher, educator, and Florida activist--will be facing off against Trump's handpicked MAGA lunatic, Randy Fine.
Fine is notorious in Florida for his "crude antics," including his support for Florida's strict abortion ban, and his sponsorship of the infamous "Don't Say Gay" bill that stigmatizes LGBTQ+ children and punishes teachers for doing their jobs.
But Randy Fine is deeply unpopular and vulnerable. Josh Weil is building a grassroots war chest that will take on MAGA's depravity--and win:

clean_body: We're building a grassroots war chest that will take on MAGA and win. | | | | | == | | | | Team, We don't have much time left. On April 1, Democrat Josh Weil--a respected teacher, educator, and Florida activist--will be facing off against Trump's handpicked MAGA lunatic, Randy Fine. Fine is notorious in Florida for his "crude antics," including his support for Florida's strict abortion ban, and his sponsorship of the infamous "Don't Say Gay" bill that stigmatizes LGBTQ+ children and punishes teachers for doing their jobs. But Randy Fine is deeply unpopular and vulnerable. Josh Weil is building a grassroots war chest that will take on MAGA's depravity--and win: | | | | | == | This team is closing in on over half a million dollars raised since this special election was announced last month. But to win, we need supporters from across the country coming together and chipping in what they can. | | | | == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | | | == | | | | Thank you for doing everything you can to secure a win in April. -Josh Weil for Congress | | | | | == | | | | Josh Weil for Congress | 8381 Citrus Chase Drive | Orlando, FL 32836 US | |

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: Say NO to the political blackmail
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| Hi, Fellow American,

We did it! We reached another milestone!

Well, not what you're probably expecting. Likely a far more grim, despicable milestone.

**We 've topped $36,000,000,000,000 in our national debt. (That's $36 trillion if that's too many zeros to count).**

The debt is rising faster and faster, reaching new milestones every few months. We remember when headlines buzzed after the debt exceeded $35 trillion.

However, we've been given a glimmer of hope in the past few months, with the incoming government promising to cut frivolous to the bone.

[_**Now 's the time to sign your demand to Congress to STOP the endless printing.**_](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/52eb1b6ce06345328baa7134a354b7ce-baba043a14ee4f498144f7cd4b881c05/63)

We aren't asking for something crazy-- just responsible spending and limited government. Basic concepts to those outside Capitol Hill.

Imagine what it's like to spend $1 trillion in just a few months. No individual can possibly fathom that. Not even Elon Musk, the richest man in the world. Not even the government bureaucrats who authorize the spending.

Last week, Congress decided on a whim to spend $895 billion right before many of them left office.

And they always try to blackmail us by claiming, "If we don't pass this spending bill, the government is going to shut down"

**Have you noticed the pattern? Democrat or Republican, in the majority or minority, nothing changes. **

_The debt clock doesn 't stop climbing and neither do politicians' net worths_.

We've bought the bogus talking points for long enough, which is why Convention of States is taking action to end this fiscal insanity.

[_**Will you stand with us as we work to hold D.C. accountable permanently? Take one minute to sign your demand to Congress today!**_](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/52eb1b6ce06345328baa7134a354b7ce-baba043a14ee4f498144f7cd4b881c05/63)

We will let them know who's in charge.

For America's future,

The Convention of States Action Team
---

DCDailyJournal.com

[Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam](https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/52eb1b6ce06345328baa7134a354b7ce?op-notrack)

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

Fellow Patriot, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President-elect's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... ... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people. To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president-elect: DONALD TRUMP. - Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA: Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states, Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25! But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! ** Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the "Woke" Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country's way of life again! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: securing my place on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots
body:
To get my name on the ballot, I need to gather 10,000 signatures from voters all across Virginia. It’s a crucial step in the process, and it’s a big challenge—one that will take resources, staff, organization, and a lot of hard work.
Peter,
On the first day of 2025, I officially signed the petition to get my name on the ballot to run for Governor of Virginia! This is a big first step in our campaign, and I’m incredibly excited to hit the road this year, meet Virginians across the Commonwealth, listen to their challenges and aspirations, and work hard to earn their support.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85327?refcode=em20250119-8725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8725%2E614464%2E2HEmh3)
But I need your help to make this a reality. To get my name on the ballot, I need to gather 10,000 signatures from voters all across Virginia. It’s a crucial step in the process, and it’s a big challenge—one that will take resources, staff, organization, and a lot of hard work. And this is only step one. Once we get on the ballot, then the real work begins.
My campaign is already working to organize events, mobilize volunteers, and fund the materials needed to collect these signatures—everything from petition forms to resources for our dedicated teams out in the field. To reach our goal and secure my place on the ballot, I’m counting on supporters like you to help fund this vital effort.
**[Will you split a contribution today between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us gather the signatures we need and keep our momentum going? Every dollar you donate helps us get one step closer to flipping Virginia blue in November.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85327?refcode=em20250119-8725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8725%2E614464%2E2HEmh3)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250119-8725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8725%2E614464%2E2HEmh3) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250119-8725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=8725%2E614464%2E2HEmh3) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250119-8725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=8725%2E614464%2E2HEmh3) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250119-8725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=8725%2E614464%2E2HEmh3) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250119-8725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=8725%2E614464%2E2HEmh3) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250119-8725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=8725%2E614464%2E2HEmh3) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85327?refcode=em20250119-8725&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8725%2E614464%2E2HEmh3)

Thank you,
Abigail Spanberger

Folks, tomorrow's inauguration is the start of the newest phase in this fight for our future. [This youth-powered movement is ready and willing to take a stand against the worst of the MAGA agenda. But to do that, we need you with us in this fight.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100650955/523458826/2093376396?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzM1ZWViNy1hZmQ2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYdz3pyg_gVCWnV2lFC5RWosi0GWazZNGp_sNOHoTwU=&emci=b17e661c-abd6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=7c35eeb7-afd6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=6787172)
Here are our priorities:
* **Critical elections in two battleground states:** This year, we'll be heavily involved in state races in **Virginia** and **Pennsylvania**. Young voters will have a huge part to play in these elections, especially with abortion access and economic justice on the line.
* **34 Senate Seats in 2026:** We're starting the work _right now_ to prepare young voters to take action at the polls in 2026. If we lay the groundwork today, we'll be in a great position to win big next November and (hopefully!) retake the Senate.\
* **A razor-thin GOP majority:** Republicans' House majority is _slim_. At **219-215** , Republicans can't afford to lose a single vote. That gives us the advantage young voters need to put pressure on their elected officials to stop or promote major legislation. When we rally young voters to make a difference, _things change for the better!_

We're not waiting until tomorrow morning to start this path forward. Our resistance to the MAGA agenda starts **_RIGHT NOW_**.
Every dollar we receive from supporters like you strengthens this movement. Your support means we can keep up the fight for our rights and future by getting involved in critical elections, holding elected officials accountable, and empowering young Americans to make a difference.
[Your support directly fuels the campaigns, advocacy, and grassroots organizing that makes this youth-powered movement work. Here are our priorities: Critical elections in two battleground states: This year, we'll be heavily involved in state races in Virginia and Pennsylvania. Young voters will have a huge part to play in these elections, especially with abortion access and economic justice on the line. 34 Senate Seats in 2026: We're starting the work right now to prepare young voters to take action at the polls in 2026. If we lay the groundwork today, we'll be in a great position to win big next November and (hopefully!) retake the Senate.\ A razor-thin GOP majority: Republicans' House majority is slim. At 219-215 , Republicans can't afford to lose a single vote. That gives us the advantage young voters need to put pressure on their elected officials to stop or promote major legislation. When we rally young voters to make a difference, things change for the better! We're not waiting until tomorrow morning to start this path forward. Our resistance to the MAGA agenda starts RIGHT NOW**. Every dollar we receive from supporters like you strengthens this movement. Your support means we can keep up the fight for our rights and future by getting involved in critical elections, holding elected officials accountable, and empowering young Americans to make a difference. | | | | | | Together, NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: The list goes on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
The races listed below aren't all, folks. School boards, county officials, judges for lower state courts and county counts... the list goes on. We need to fight for our right to vote up and down our government, up and down the ballot, and not just focus on Congress or who is president.
Team, state legislatures are starting back up, these special elections are coming fast, and our efforts to defend voting rights across the board depend on you. RUSH $25 or more right now to make sure we have the resources to fight everywhere our right to vote is threatened >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=011925_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011925_1&amount=25]
Team,
2025 is considered an "off year" for elections, but the reality is that there are a number of important elections on the ballot:
* Three special elections (so far) to fill vacancies in the U.S. House of Representatives

* Two special elections to fill vacancies in the U.S. Senate

* Two Governorships in Virginia and New Jersey, who will have the power to appoint judges

* All 100 seats in Virginia’s House of Delegates

* All 80 seats in the New Jersey General Assembly

* State Supreme Court seats in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin -- where legal challenges to mail-in voting have been heard and continue to be brought forward

* 10 major Mayoral races in big cities
And those are just the highlights. You can bet that opponents of voting rights are already targeting these races after their victories in 2024. We've got to match their efforts and help mobilize voters for these special elections and defend our right to vote .
Team: Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us prepare for these important elections, fight for voting rights in state legislatures, and so much more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=011925_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011925_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=011925_1&amount=25]

RUSH $25 or more right now to make sure we have the resources to fight everywhere our right to vote is threatened >> [] Voter Action Project Logo [] Team, 2025 is considered an "off year" for elections, but the reality is that there are a number of important elections on the ballot: Three special elections (so far) to fill vacancies in the U.S. House of Representatives Two special elections to fill vacancies in the U.S. Senate Two Governorships in Virginia and New Jersey, who will have the power to appoint judges All 100 seats in Virginia’s House of Delegates All 80 seats in the New Jersey General Assembly State Supreme Court seats in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin -- where legal challenges to mail-in voting have been heard and continue to be brought forward * 10 major Mayoral races in big cities And those are just the highlights. You can bet that opponents of voting rights are already targeting these races after their victories in 2024. We've got to match their efforts and help mobilize voters for these special elections and defend our right to vote . Team: Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us prepare for these important elections, fight for voting rights in state legislatures, and so much more >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: A.G. Holder
subject: Peter: Key state-level fights we’re watching
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Read this update to stay in the know →
|
---

Hi Peter,
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: **There is no “off year” in the fight for fair electoral maps.**
With the consequential 2024 presidential election in our rearview, 2025 is a crucial year to put in the work that will advance the fight for our democracy in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
**In fact, we’ve already got our eyes on a handful of key advocacy efforts coming up this year in multiple states across the country.** Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is currently litigating in five states to dismantle illegal gerrymanders and protect fair maps. Meanwhile, we’re preparing to stop potential efforts by Republicans to steal more congressional seats through extreme gerrymandering — including in Ohio, where new congressional maps will be drawn this year. And we must stay ready to protect the 2030 Census from efforts to tamper with it, to ensure an accurate count and fair representation.
**There’s plenty of work lying ahead — and I know that with your help, we’ll be able to do whatever it takes in 2025 to ensure fair electoral maps for years to come.[Chip in now to fund our work to stop gerrymandering and defend fair elections.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100651261/523460083/358328389?refcode=don_aotl_Tier1NonOpenrs_email_AGAheadNOR_email_20250119-AOTL-Tier1NonOpeners-AGAheadNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250119-AOTL-Tier1NonOpeners-AGAheadNOR_&utm_campaign=AGAheadNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjNDdhYWJiLWIwZDYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Q_xHZM7-tALitOpXqSqkSFsllkaH89Ixhi664vMExE=)**

Here are some of the key fights we’re eyeing this year — including court cases that our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), is actively involved in that _**could affect the makeup of up to eight or even nine districts**_ and where we must make sure voters are fairly represented:
* **In Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana,** plaintiffs supported by the NRF will be fighting to protect Black opportunity districts that came about as a result of our landmark victory before the U.S. Supreme Court in _Allen v. Milligan_.
* **In Texas,** the NRF continues to support a case involving Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, challenging the state’s congressional and legislative maps.
* **In Florida,** we are awaiting a decision from the state supreme court that could restore a Black opportunity district in Jacksonville.

In addition to our affiliate, NRF’s, court cases, we are gearing up for new maps in key states, including:
* **In Ohio,** we’re gearing up for a new congressional map to be drawn this year — the latest step in a years-long battle for fair maps in the state that has seen far-right partisans continue to mislead Ohioans about the redistricting process and manipulate maps despite the redistricting reforms passed by voters in 2015 and 2018.
* **And in New Hampshire,** with a Republican majority in the state legislature, we need to be vigilant about any attempts to alter the maps and steal more congressional seats — like Republicans did in North Carolina.

**We must stay ready to mobilize against power grabs in these states and across the country.** The work we put in during the weeks and months ahead could make a massive difference in fair representation. We must not wait, we must not waver — the stakes are simply too high.
[**Please, Peter, make a contribution to power the movement for fair maps throughout 2025 and the years ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100651275/523460126/358328389?refcode=don_aotl_Tier1NonOpenrs_email_AGAheadNOR_email_20250119-AOTL-Tier1NonOpeners-AGAheadNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250119-AOTL-Tier1NonOpeners-AGAheadNOR_&utm_campaign=AGAheadNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZjNDdhYWJiLWIwZDYtZWYxMS04OGQwLTAwMjI0ODJhOWQ5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Q_xHZM7-tALitOpXqSqkSFsllkaH89Ixhi664vMExE=)
Thanks for everything you do. We’ll be in touch soon with further updates about these state-level battles and many more.
Sincerely,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=65277766e8f84a5ba6b06510b159e1a0&_e=uz2_2gmYzSoI18OgpQcDzRov64zWryRUOvw7XwKM1toAma80RyXpUjxey9t9mxTwzRWpoUQ_8L8EiB8v8S9XDXNl1RwlWwCtDCElZMDFS5cosaIf1n7pKfi672g3NmkCirDxDu2PRHX30pHpqwRZKK8S_mXYaajeKkIK7DkOB6AEz02hfuDdZDDLkyPDaGSK3ZeQed77ojxROwTJv2GTHZDGLitKOlggRUTfSj8LifAgqdL08Jc_S1JyRvm6U_iREWnlMLW-Q7gwZ7_w1m1XH143YepKWA0ulQQ_ewNIjr3G9LtsE_OHK5afw7-1afyFpss52w_E20hakWPCdyXoPxjKxbHGhP504P3-ZimVcIDk3hjhnqCTcvOpSm4KoFeQCcgNeseSqzZ4Xs01ZQ03kg%3D%3D) [NO](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=65277766e8f84a5ba6b06510b159e1a0&_e=uz2_2gmYzSoI18OgpQcDzRov64zWryRUOvw7XwKM1toAma80RyXpUjxey9t9mxTwzRWpoUQ_8L8EiB8v8S9XDXNl1RwlWwCtDCElZMDFS5cosaIf1n7pKfi672g3NmkCirDxDu2PRHX30pHpqwRZKK8S_mXYaajeKkIK7DkOB6AEz02hfuDdZDDLkyPDaGSK3ZeQed77ojxROwTJv2GTHZDGLitKOlggRUTfSj8LifBlzpr633Guh2Yclm0HJ1RE0lPXlG6gmjbkO-ZZwrRmr3JX40CdfFabJXsaGKbx1QQlBUKlHYSWsNjhxKP5WgxQHMIDzJkA2k67eTXMBCWBT00BydBs25Cor0As-Zvr3HvE6Q0rPGI9zVQz2oZICCUSoiSZAta_Yvy1MHM2AQ7iIg%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=65277766e8f84a5ba6b06510b159e1a0&_e=uz2_2gmYzSoI18OgpQcDzRov64zWryRUOvw7XwKM1toAma80RyXpUjxey9t9mxTwzRWpoUQ_8L8EiB8v8S9XDXNl1RwlWwCtDCElZMDFS5cosaIf1n7pKfi672g3NmkCirDxDu2PRHX30pHpqwRZKK8S_mXYaajeKkIK7DkOB6AEz02hfuDdZDDLkyPDaGSK3ZeQed77ojxROwTJv2GTHZDGLitKOlggRUTfSj8LifA0YOihfZU1T7fLwss1glu8mzOLmfMQQTL7qmY0W-74-Pk-inGc852vKCOkaP92KXAOdJ_gPjn0nGKqyHF2nHRlub8Waeg1DgfxV0K3kaPJFPF-qfTyZJv8fkXFx9-4pBBqpgRM94dY_lB3nbNkZ5di_nn0W03IM6PhNwIjbHa6hg%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=65277766e8f84a5ba6b06510b159e1a0&_e=uz2_2gmYzSoI18OgpQcDzRov64zWryRUOvw7XwKM1toAma80RyXpUjxey9t9mxTwzRWpoUQ_8L8EiB8v8S9XDXNl1RwlWwCtDCElZMDFS5cosaIf1n7pKfi672g3NmkCirDxDu2PRHX30pHpqwRZKK8S_mXYaajeKkIK7DkOB6AEz02hfuDdZDDLkyPDaGSK3ZeQed77ojxROwTJv2GTHZDGLitKOlggRUTfSj8LifCfrv6r0fq1Vimi8Y0B5D17WBP1Bbx_Cy8_z80EumquKfLXCaB9GLc0P1MZFSjcYfcRmT9ZE3M2hlshR0K-m9TwxtcikzSjxyZ173dR2Ygg9L0crNc6TRE7O-0eQtoGSigLw4dGM89pHXQ1ztOZpQZi1rosTdM40kp7BK0hXdlOQA%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
