* * *
## Can Trump Tear Down the Anglo-American Establishment?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/387436da-2d27-4f11-9d03-3d999a451ed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Richie McGinniss**
Cheers, my compatriots! We are on the eve of America's second chance. Ever since its inception America has been pulled in one of two directions: internationalism and isolationism.
The former has been hopelessly polluted by globalist oligarchs who care more about making their shareholders and their cross-border companies rich than looking after their employees or creating American jobs.
The latter has scarcely appeared on a major political platform in the last 100 years.
_Pssst_ , I'm gonna let you in on a little secret: the international order that America inherited was conquered by the Red Coats, and the bogus borders in the Middle East that the American people have been coerced into enforcing were drawn up by the Brits and the Froggies with the express intention of dividing and conquering the region, rather than creating harmonious and self-sustaining nation states. For those who claim that Israel really runs the United States, I would ask them who was instrumental in creating the state of Israel in the first place? HINT: It was the Brits!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..p6snOTUrbQUJNo6MiTOGqt5xUXnFYcVq-jyE2ttnKhc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155185772)
Obama promised to look after the average American and reinvent the way that America projected its power abroad (SPOILER: he perpetuated the Neocon foreign policy but did it by exploding adversaries with remote-controlled drones). In fact, Obama turned out to be another smooth-talking politician who promised reform but mostly just kept the gravy train chugging along the same tracks. Trump promised to change this train's course. In my humble opinion, Obama failed. But it remains to be seen if Trump will succeed in his second, non-consecutive term. And it all comes down to one thing: does our President serve We The People, or They The Corporations? Let's take a walk down memory lane...
The night before Inauguration in 2009, I was a 19-year-old with a booze-numbed-skull that was full of idealism and devoid of real-world experience. I was studying intensive Arabic at Georgetown five days per week with an hour of class and an hour of homework per day. I was excited by Obama's 2008 _Washington Post_ op-ed in which he promised to pull the troops out of Iraq by 2010. "We can safely redeploy our combat brigades at a pace that would remove them in 16 months. That would be the summer of 2010 two years from now, and more than seven years after the war began."
When I exited Harbin Hall, the same dorm where Bill Clinton and my dad lived, the weather was well below freezing. But as a cocksure teenager I wore only a cotton hoodie and a hockey jacket, I figured the beer blanket would keep me plenty warm. I was right initially, but I forgot that a beer blanket can quickly disintegrate without more booze.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d2656218-944a-4760-a786-534cfa7b2c3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Long story short my buddies and I decided to go straight to the National Mall from a house party at 2 AM. I recall topping off a half-full bottle of Grey Goose with keg beer. I also recall upchucking some of that into a planter on the walk to the Mall. I recall losing my friends and becoming violently hungover with an empty bottle of Goose, no cell service, and packed shoulder to shoulder beneath the Obelisk of Washington.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b0f047c-0846-4649-9171-0033dae3a8fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
All I wanted to do was eat something and sleep. I fought against hundreds of thousands of people entering the mall and by the time I returned from the arduous climb back up to the hills of Georgetown, I passed out right as Obama placed his hand on the Bible. The entire experience was a living metaphor for how my youthful vigor turned to cold cynicism as I studied and worked in DC media over Obama's two terms. To keep things brief, I'm still stuck in DC and Obama didn't _change_ shit.
* * *
# Quick intermission...
Check out my book **["Riot Diet"](https://substack.com/redirect/e16d709c-df48-47e5-9cc5-ae89d4689e64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for my firsthand account covering the left-wing riots of 2020 that the media told you were "peaceful protests."
FYI, they weren't...
Get your info directly from the source, not from mainstream media giants trying to sell you an agenda. **[Pick it up using the link below:](https://substack.com/redirect/e16d709c-df48-47e5-9cc5-ae89d4689e64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e16d709c-df48-47e5-9cc5-ae89d4689e64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[ Get "Riot Diet" Today](https://substack.com/redirect/e16d709c-df48-47e5-9cc5-ae89d4689e64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
On the heels of the Great Recession of 2008, Obama ended up bailing out the banks. He didn't pull the troops out of Iraq by 2010 as promised. He and Hillary Clinton's State Department also used a NATO-imposed no-fly zone to depose Qaddafi from Libya. At the time the country had the second highest per capita income in Africa. Within a year there were slave markets run by Islamists. This was the same year that I graduated without honors from college with a major in Middle Eastern History and a minor in Arabic in 2012. I studied and lived in the Middle East hoping that Obama would usher in a new era in the region, but by the time I graduated it was becoming increasingly clear that Obama was changing exactly diddly squat. I decided to work in American media instead.
Then I watched the Syrian Civil war devolve into chaos: Obama let Assad cross his red line and sat cross legged while allies like Saudi Arabia and Qatar funded opposition to Assad's Iranian/Russian backed regime via radical Islamist groups like Jabhat Al-Nusra, the later iterations of which would become known as the Islamic State. Oh! And Obamacare was way short of the universal healthcare plan that he called for in 2007. Instead we got Obamacare, which amounted to a payout for insurance companies paid for by the youngest rather than the richest Americans. The Multinational Banksters, the Military and Medical Industrial complexes had a great eight years under Obama. The average American did not.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..p6snOTUrbQUJNo6MiTOGqt5xUXnFYcVq-jyE2ttnKhc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155185772)
Fifty years before Obama's Inauguration, my dad took a two semester class taught by the famous professor, Carroll Quigley. Bill Clinton took this same class two years before my dad. After WWII, Quigley wrote a book called _The Anglo American Establishment_ , but requested that it not be published until after he died. Why? Because the book outlined how secret organizations like the Milner Group, and the Rhodes Trust-later evolved into groups like the Council of Foreign Relations (CFR) and the Bilderberg Group-controlled American affairs from outside its borders. Other iterations of such groups include but are not limited to the World Economic Forum, the G20, and NATO.
Quigley outlined precisely how these groups gained influence in The White House, the Halls of Congress, and the American media establishment. Though the book was written 75 years ago, the principles still hold true. [Take a look at how many members of the CFR have served in previous Presidential Cabinets for a peek into how influential this organization is.](https://substack.com/redirect/b7b718b2-09c4-4ba9-8679-0624a1d286c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
At the conclusion of his speech where he accepted the nomination for the Democratic nominee for President in 1992, [Clinton invoked his favorite professor](https://substack.com/redirect/64d9af29-0758-4342-bd7c-9fab8e84213e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "As a teenager I heard John Kennedy's summons to citizenship and then as a student at Georgetown I heard that call clarified by a professor named Carroll Quigley who said to us that America was the greatest nation in history because our people people had always believed in two things that tomorrow can be better than today and that every one of us has a personal moral responsibility to make it so."
After his election, Clinton perpetuated the Bush-era policies of free trade that sold the American workers' jobs across borders when he oversaw the implementation the Bush-sponsored NAFTA agreement in 1994, then brought America under the umbrella of the World Trade Organization: an organization that was supposed to create a wealthy and harmonious global community by, among other things, opening up trade with China. The result was anything but, and while Slick Willy Clinton made tens of millions of dollars the American worker got screwed.
In fact, Quigely warned us about this in publisher's note on the first page of _The Anglo-American Establishment_ :
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/14733332-b072-4bdd-81ba-edd38c62c09f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Again to keep things short: ever since America became the world's preeminent superpower, the special interests have done more to control foreign and economic policies than the American citizens who went to the polls.
I experienced a similar dissatisfaction with Trump's first term, mostly because of how it ended: A pandemic that apparently gave governors around the country the right to lock down businesses while Amazon nearly doubled its revenue and Jeff Bezos's wealth skyrocketed to make him the richest man in the world by 2021. Like it or not, Trump fast-tracked the vaccine and printed Covid relief money like it was going out of style. That money did little to alleviate the suffering of shuttered businesses and[ resulted in billions of dollars of fraud.](https://substack.com/redirect/91a4c599-e8d1-4cce-8fe6-62c83c0f9160?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..p6snOTUrbQUJNo6MiTOGqt5xUXnFYcVq-jyE2ttnKhc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155185772)
For many reasons we don't have time to get into, Trump left office without the big, beautiful wall completed. When I went to the border in March of 2021, I witnessed thousands of migrants entering through the gaps in uncompleted sections of the wall. When I asked at least four scores of them why they decided to make the arduous trip to our southern border, nearly every one stated that they came because Trump was gone and they knew that Biden was going to let them in.
Were it not for such a disastrous last four years under Biden, perhaps there would not be the opportunity for actual change presented before us today. When I enrolled in Georgetown, my anti-war, pro-free speech stances as well as my skepticism towards big pharmaceutical companies was what I thought made me left wing. The paradigm shift is clearly upon us because apparently by 2025 those positions make me "far right".
Though I would contest that my political ideations place me in any political box under the current definitions 2,025 years after the birth of Christ, I remain cautiously optimistic that Trump can buck the New World Order that favors international banks and neverending wars over the interests of the American, who just wants to eat and be financially, legally, and spiritually free.
* * *

clean_body: We are on the eve of America's second chance. Ever since its inception America has been pulled in one of two directions: internationalism and isolationism. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? We are on the eve of America's second chance. Ever since its inception America has been pulled in one of two directions: internationalism and isolationism. Jan 19 | | | | | | | | | | | PolitiBrawl is determined to bring you voices from across the anti-establishment political spectrum including, conservatives, populists, libertarians, and even former liberals. Become a paid subscriber to support our work and get access to our exclusive content. Can Trump Tear Down the Anglo-American Establishment? | | ---|---|--- By Richie McGinniss Cheers, my compatriots! We are on the eve of America's second chance. Ever since its inception America has been pulled in one of two directions: internationalism and isolationism. The former has been hopelessly polluted by globalist oligarchs who care more about making their shareholders and their cross-border companies rich than looking after their employees or creating American jobs. The latter has scarcely appeared on a major political platform in the last 100 years. Pssst , I'm gonna let you in on a little secret: the international order that America inherited was conquered by the Red Coats, and the bogus borders in the Middle East that the American people have been coerced into enforcing were drawn up by the Brits and the Froggies with the express intention of dividing and conquering the region, rather than creating harmonious and self-sustaining nation states. For those who claim that Israel really runs the United States, I would ask them who was instrumental in creating the state of Israel in the first place? HINT: It was the Brits! Obama promised to look after the average American and reinvent the way that America projected its power abroad (SPOILER: he perpetuated the Neocon foreign policy but did it by exploding adversaries with remote-controlled drones). In fact, Obama turned out to be another smooth-talking politician who promised reform but mostly just kept the gravy train chugging along the same tracks. Trump promised to change this train's course. In my humble opinion, Obama failed. But it remains to be seen if Trump will succeed in his second, non-consecutive term. And it all comes down to one thing: does our President serve We The People, or They The Corporations? Let's take a walk down memory lane... The night before Inauguration in 2009, I was a 19-year-old with a booze-numbed-skull that was full of idealism and devoid of real-world experience. I was studying intensive Arabic at Georgetown five days per week with an hour of class and an hour of homework per day. I was excited by Obama's 2008 Washington Post op-ed in which he promised to pull the troops out of Iraq by 2010. "We can safely redeploy our combat brigades at a pace that would remove them in 16 months. That would be the summer of 2010 two years from now, and more than seven years after the war began." When I exited Harbin Hall, the same dorm where Bill Clinton and my dad lived, the weather was well below freezing. But as a cocksure teenager I wore only a cotton hoodie and a hockey jacket, I figured the beer blanket would keep me plenty warm. I was right initially, but I forgot that a beer blanket can quickly disintegrate without more booze. | | ---|---|--- Long story short my buddies and I decided to go straight to the National Mall from a house party at 2 AM. I recall topping off a half-full bottle of Grey Goose with keg beer. I also recall upchucking some of that into a planter on the walk to the Mall. I recall losing my friends and becoming violently hungover with an empty bottle of Goose, no cell service, and packed shoulder to shoulder beneath the Obelisk of Washington. | | ---|---|--- All I wanted to do was eat something and sleep. I fought against hundreds of thousands of people entering the mall and by the time I returned from the arduous climb back up to the hills of Georgetown, I passed out right as Obama placed his hand on the Bible. The entire experience was a living metaphor for how my youthful vigor turned to cold cynicism as I studied and worked in DC media over Obama's two terms. To keep things brief, I'm still stuck in DC and Obama didn't change shit. Quick intermission... Check out my book for my firsthand account covering the left-wing riots of 2020 that the media told you were "peaceful protests." FYI, they weren't... Get your info directly from the source, not from mainstream media giants trying to sell you an agenda. | | ---|---|--- On the heels of the Great Recession of 2008, Obama ended up bailing out the banks. He didn't pull the troops out of Iraq by 2010 as promised. He and Hillary Clinton's State Department also used a NATO-imposed no-fly zone to depose Qaddafi from Libya. At the time the country had the second highest per capita income in Africa. Within a year there were slave markets run by Islamists. This was the same year that I graduated without honors from college with a major in Middle Eastern History and a minor in Arabic in 2012. I studied and lived in the Middle East hoping that Obama would usher in a new era in the region, but by the time I graduated it was becoming increasingly clear that Obama was changing exactly diddly squat. I decided to work in American media instead. Then I watched the Syrian Civil war devolve into chaos: Obama let Assad cross his red line and sat cross legged while allies like Saudi Arabia and Qatar funded opposition to Assad's Iranian/Russian backed regime via radical Islamist groups like Jabhat Al-Nusra, the later iterations of which would become known as the Islamic State. Oh! And Obamacare was way short of the universal healthcare plan that he called for in 2007. Instead we got Obamacare, which amounted to a payout for insurance companies paid for by the youngest rather than the richest Americans. The Multinational Banksters, the Military and Medical Industrial complexes had a great eight years under Obama. The average American did not. Fifty years before Obama's Inauguration, my dad took a two semester class taught by the famous professor, Carroll Quigley. Bill Clinton took this same class two years before my dad. After WWII, Quigley wrote a book called The Anglo American Establishment , but requested that it not be published until after he died. Why? Because the book outlined how secret organizations like the Milner Group, and the Rhodes Trust-later evolved into groups like the Council of Foreign Relations (CFR) and the Bilderberg Group-controlled American affairs from outside its borders. Other iterations of such groups include but are not limited to the World Economic Forum, the G20, and NATO. Quigley outlined precisely how these groups gained influence in The White House, the Halls of Congress, and the American media establishment. Though the book was written 75 years ago, the principles still hold true. At the conclusion of his speech where he accepted the nomination for the Democratic nominee for President in 1992, , "As a teenager I heard John Kennedy's summons to citizenship and then as a student at Georgetown I heard that call clarified by a professor named Carroll Quigley who said to us that America was the greatest nation in history because our people people had always believed in two things that tomorrow can be better than today and that every one of us has a personal moral responsibility to make it so." After his election, Clinton perpetuated the Bush-era policies of free trade that sold the American workers' jobs across borders when he oversaw the implementation the Bush-sponsored NAFTA agreement in 1994, then brought America under the umbrella of the World Trade Organization: an organization that was supposed to create a wealthy and harmonious global community by, among other things, opening up trade with China. The result was anything but, and while Slick Willy Clinton made tens of millions of dollars the American worker got screwed. In fact, Quigely warned us about this in publisher's note on the first page of The Anglo-American Establishment : | | ---|---|--- Again to keep things short: ever since America became the world's preeminent superpower, the special interests have done more to control foreign and economic policies than the American citizens who went to the polls. I experienced a similar dissatisfaction with Trump's first term, mostly because of how it ended: A pandemic that apparently gave governors around the country the right to lock down businesses while Amazon nearly doubled its revenue and Jeff Bezos's wealth skyrocketed to make him the richest man in the world by 2021. Like it or not, Trump fast-tracked the vaccine and printed Covid relief money like it was going out of style. That money did little to alleviate the suffering of shuttered businesses and For many reasons we don't have time to get into, Trump left office without the big, beautiful wall completed. When I went to the border in March of 2021, I witnessed thousands of migrants entering through the gaps in uncompleted sections of the wall. When I asked at least four scores of them why they decided to make the arduous trip to our southern border, nearly every one stated that they came because Trump was gone and they knew that Biden was going to let them in. Were it not for such a disastrous last four years under Biden, perhaps there would not be the opportunity for actual change presented before us today. When I enrolled in Georgetown, my anti-war, pro-free speech stances as well as my skepticism towards big pharmaceutical companies was what I thought made me left wing. The paradigm shift is clearly upon us because apparently by 2025 those positions make me "far right". Though I would contest that my political ideations place me in any political box under the current definitions 2,025 years after the birth of Christ, I remain cautiously optimistic that Trump can buck the New World Order that favors international banks and neverending wars over the interests of the American, who just wants to eat and be financially, legally, and spiritually free. | A guest post by| McGinniss is a DC-based independent journalist with over 12 years of experience working for media outlets across the political spectrum. We won’t take much of your time. Since the election, Donald Trump has been preparing to enact his Project 2025 agenda by packing his cabinet full of staunch MAGA loyalists. From Wall Street executives out of touch with the needs of everyday Americans to Fox News hosts with a history of backing his every move, Trump will have all the tools he needs to make good on his campaign promises. The same promises that fundamentally threaten our freedoms, our democracy, and our future. We have to be prepared. We have just 12 hours before our mid-January fundraising deadline — the last one before Donald Trump is officially inaugurated as President and he can begin to make due on his dangerous promises. With a Republican Congress to help him every step of the way, it’s more important than ever that we’re sending Dr. Ruiz back to Washington with the support he needs to take on Trump and his MAGA attacks on our freedoms. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | We won’t take much of your time. Since the election, Donald Trump has been preparing to enact his Project 2025 agenda by packing his cabinet full of staunch MAGA loyalists. From Wall Street executives out of touch with the needs of everyday Americans to Fox News hosts with a history of backing his every move, Trump will have all the tools he needs to make good on his campaign promises. The same promises that fundamentally threaten our freedoms, our democracy, and our future. We have to be prepared. We have just 12 hours before our mid-January fundraising deadline — the last one before Donald Trump is officially inaugurated as President and he can begin to make due on his dangerous promises. With a Republican Congress to help him every step of the way, it’s more important than ever that we’re sending Dr. Ruiz back to Washington with the support he needs to take on Trump and his MAGA attacks on our freedoms. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = — Team Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. body:
We are ready to fight. | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100651509/523460971/2141984067?sourceid=1150302&utm_campaign=25emrge-0103aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJlNmVkYi1iM2Q2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ceU4H9reFFtgD42D2EdYaAo-gMpM-0jNHvDnKmBXDW0=&emci=3217a7d4-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6abe6edb-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100651510/523460972/2141984067?sourceid=1150302&utm_campaign=25emrge-0103aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJlNmVkYi1iM2Q2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ceU4H9reFFtgD42D2EdYaAo-gMpM-0jNHvDnKmBXDW0=&emci=3217a7d4-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6abe6edb-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237)

Dear Peter,

Tomorrow marks a devastating moment in our nation's history as Donald J. Trump is inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States. His return to the White House is a dire threat to the democratic values of liberty, equality, and reproductive freedom.

During his first administration, we witnessed the dangerous consequences of anti-rights extremism: the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , near-total abortion bans in 17 states, and the creation of maternal health deserts as obstetricians fled states hostile to reproductive care. Patients were left to cross state lines, navigate insurmountable barriers, or forego care altogether. The harm was unprecedented— _and it was only the beginning._

A second Trump administration threatens even greater destruction... attempts to ban medication abortion by mail, a vital resource in a post-_Roe_ America... expanded "gag rules" silencing organizations that provide or advocate for abortion care globally... and increased prosecutions of patients and providers under restrictive abortion laws.

[**But we are ready. The Center for Reproductive Rights is mobilized to fight back at every level.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100651511/523460973/1474386068?sourceid=1150302&utm_campaign=25emrge-0103aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJlNmVkYi1iM2Q2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ceU4H9reFFtgD42D2EdYaAo-gMpM-0jNHvDnKmBXDW0=&emci=3217a7d4-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6abe6edb-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237)
* **In the courts:** We will challenge harmful policies, from attempts to enact a national abortion ban to efforts to restrict access to medication abortion.
* **In the states:** We will protect and expand reproductive rights where they are under attack and champion bold policies in reproductive freedom strongholds.
* **Around the world:** We will defend against efforts to erode UN protections for reproductive rights and push for progress in countries worldwide.

The fight ahead will not be easy, but is a fight we must take on. Most Americans believe in reproductive freedom, as evidenced by the passage of state initiatives in seven of 10 states where measures were on the ballot, protecting abortion rights even in this divisive climate. Together, we will harness this momentum to counter the attacks of the emboldened opposition.

[**Your support fuels this fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100651512/523460974/1474386068?sourceid=1150302&utm_campaign=25emrge-0103aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJlNmVkYi1iM2Q2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ceU4H9reFFtgD42D2EdYaAo-gMpM-0jNHvDnKmBXDW0=&emci=3217a7d4-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6abe6edb-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237) It strengthens our resolve, empowers our legal battles, and gives hope to those facing impossible barriers. [**As we step into this new chapter, I ask you to recommit to this mission and renew your support today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100651513/523460975/1474386068?sourceid=1150302&utm_campaign=25emrge-0103aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJlNmVkYi1iM2Q2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ceU4H9reFFtgD42D2EdYaAo-gMpM-0jNHvDnKmBXDW0=&emci=3217a7d4-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6abe6edb-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237)

We stand together, ready to defend reproductive rights and push for a future of equity and justice.

Thank you for being part of this fight,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100651514/523460976/1474386068?sourceid=1150302&utm_campaign=25emrge-0103aaa-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=renewals&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJlNmVkYi1iM2Q2LWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDIyNDgyYTlkOTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ceU4H9reFFtgD42D2EdYaAo-gMpM-0jNHvDnKmBXDW0=&emci=3217a7d4-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=6abe6edb-b3d6-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")

Peter,

President-Elect Donald J. Trump just met with our brand new Senate Majority to lay out a unified plan of action to Make America Great Again!

_But there 's certainly a lot that must be done to clean up the mess left by Biden and Kamala after 4 disastrous years._

_That 's why the National Republican Senatorial Committee HQ is surveying top conservatives from every zip code in the nation to decide what we should prioritize FIRST._

name: Russ Vought
subject: Goodbye
body:
It’s been the honor of a lifetime to build the Center and I can only describe the circumstances that led to this moment as providential. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/americarenewing.com/were-on-the-offensive-10707615?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

I wanted to let you know that as of today I will be resigning from my role as president of the Center for Renewing America, while I continue to navigate the Senate confirmation process to once again serve as President Trump’s Director of the Office of Management and Budget.

It’s been the honor of a lifetime to build the Center and I can only describe the circumstances that led to this moment as providential.

Four years ago, just after Inauguration Day 2021, I founded the Center for Renewing America. I had finished serving as OMB Director to President Trump, and launched the Center to be a bulwark against the weaponized agenda of the incoming administration.

In spite of overwhelming odds, a small group of family, friends, and generous supporters rallied around our fledgling organization, united by the consensus that American renewal was still possible and our country was worth fighting for. Since then CRA has played a pivotal role in the shaping of national affairs and advancing paradigm-shifting policies which helped lead to this historic moment.

I will be stepping down as president, but with painstaking preparation, we have built an unrivaled leadership team, led by Eric Teetsel, which will move the organization forward in ways I couldn’t have imagined four years ago.

Trust me when I say, with your help, the Center will continue to have a direct impact on the success of our work to save the country.

Friends, words cannot convey my gratitude, but must suffice. Thank you for the trust, support, and dedication you have shown to me and our cause these past four years. I will never forget it.

For now, I must say goodbye. There is critical work to be done.

Above all, stay in the fight.

---
|
---
| Russ Vought

---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americarenewing.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=7477ee1c43&e=17913c7d6d)

# 2025 Presidential Inauguration Schedule

The schedule of events for the 60th Presidential Inauguration on January 20, 2025, is as follows:

* Security Screening Gates Open: 6:00 AM
* Musical Performances: Around 9:30 AM
* Opening Remarks: 11:30 AM
* Swearing-In Ceremony: 12:00 PM at the U.S. Capitol Rotunda
* Inaugural Address: Immediately following the swearing-in ceremony
* Inaugural Luncheon: Held at the U.S. Capitol for the new President, Vice President, and guests
* Pass in Review (Inaugural Parade): After the luncheon, the newly-sworn president and vice president will review military troops at the East Front steps of the Capitol and lead a procession down Pennsylvania Avenue to the White House
* Inaugural Balls: Various balls will be held in the evening, with the President delivering remarks at each

---
|

# AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| Dear Hello Martin Luther King Day is probably the busiest day of the entire General Assembly. People are off of work and students are out of school. There are usually many rallies by the Bell Tower.
With the inauguration of President Donald J Trump, most patriots will be focused on Washington instead of Richmond. That said, tomorrow is a regular work day for Richmond legislators.
Tomorrow, there are a number of Senate committees and subcommittees meeting. I encourage you to click on each of the links for a full listing of all bills coming up. One such subcommittee meeting is the Gaming Subcommittee.
Personally, I've never thought the Commonwealth should balance it's budget on alcohol, gambling and marijuana. But that's what we've been doing for years. Now that gambling is here, now legislators are pushing for expanding the size of government to including state agencies to oversee gambling in Virginia.
What happened to only spending taxpayer funds on the core functions of government?

---
| |
---
|
---
Don't be surprised.
Most of the Democrat's authoritarian bills will pass both the House 51-48 and Senate 21-19, which are both controlled by Democrats. Thankfully, Governor Glenn Youngkin will be the red brick wall to stop most of these bills.
All the more reason we must win big this year in the 2025 elections for the House, Governor, Lieutenant Governor and Attorney General. We can't go back to the days of 2020 with the Democrat Trifecta when all of these authoritarian bills passed and were signed into law., limiting our individual rights as Virginians.
We can never surrender. We can never give up. Stay and fight or there will be no place left that's safe.
---
|

|

body:
If he was a shoo-in, MAGA wouldn’t need to pump millions into the district. If he was a shoo-in, MAGA wouldn’t need to pump millions into the district.
---
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquU-upYfKbMaiFacMQ1owrS1t9qJQKW_NpihtdP09BWcE0XDglkhAtoFQ9W7wXvNuSQ30X5vk4cuW1xX20j0cwOL_ckic0kNyeXpZ1Bi-x6BqX-EcnTafmqjk4MdUp0tPfZnS3NdI1MagLk__a3rXRhbrzqEmB2knsTAAvErdOEfOSS1jsrZyFqSrZzxEwN9h5-4tc0SdhvyJ2gpybdTXZ9rau30aw8gCNH4h4K3SYX7vH5_CcMkVaqhdzd1IA3O2VVp97j2UfsYSfjxPFs19plDnb7CwV_CwjyQpkoY-WSO1Ci3RQhh8VMEZcznvf3aTkSCg785IR3JolRFNKi-8uS-T4BioiwDZxV1-aShCqbTA/4da/gZWi95BUQlWK-5Ud1Tm_RA/h0/h001.bRtX_2KJLIPO8OTx4mL32mw6YOAgQIjdycyOhLFeMaI)
---
Friend, As you may know, I am the Dad, public teacher, and the Democrat running in the FL-06 Special Election which is set to take place on April 1st.

Whereas in most normal special elections for vacant Congressional seats, the Governor in the state will give campaigns an average of six months to build their campaigns and introduce themselves to voters.

Florida’s Governor Ron DeSantis has compressed this window into around 4 months to give us the shortest amount of time to build out our campaign while the MAGA movement dumps tens of millions into our district, saturating it with ads in hopes of shooing in their ultra MAGA pick: Randy Fine.

Yesterday the **_full frontal MAGA assault on my district_** entered its newest phase. A pro-Trump super PAC began flooding our district with this ad in support of our opponent:

---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquU-upYfKbMaiFacMQ1owrS1t9qJQKW_NpihtdP09BWcE0XDglkhAtoFQ9W7wXvNuRiK923t91CIVzioRaFWH_D-1FXAzpthTSrofEyiAZgzPhDHuxNZ-8uugfQcU74yNdfJ4gTE2aN8X27PLgO2uvsB45X6wpyd2hVCGoM79JfT0_YA8Dxrtz42adQlqqXn3t7gvgYULfqQOUsuTrXqAKtmjmkKKocUb27AK3kOYHg6rpBzx6utrWwijKlyY5AGS3k-zibOribuqSesqotnwamc4apqY_-qb6dKoPNmc76MtEPMDXTB4isAbX31jmmdWTYzinuN21dnGkrqcY3bclXmREmeXhrLDasFGscJNP9OQ/4da/gZWi95BUQlWK-5Ud1Tm_RA/h1/h001.gyDxJ0HABCN5a_gcmIQdqZC6B02fi0oL4voIm0fABkA)
---
_The ad that Defend American Jobs - a MAGA aligned super PAC began running in my district yesterday._
---
These ads are beyond critical to my opponent's path to victory because **no one** in this district **_knows him_**. He is a carpetbagging Casino mogul from South Florida.

If he was a true shoo-in, MAGA would keep its powder dry and wouldn’t feel the need to pump millions into this district. The fact that they are having to saturate the district in ads to save their candidate, is extremely promising for us **_but only if we can keep up with their spends_** in the 73 days left until E-Day.

So far we are rolling with the punches and are closing in on having raised _$500,000_ since we began fundraising in late December but we need to scale up faster.

**If just _1_ out of every 20 people we send this email to donated $5 we could raise 100k off of a single email and run more of our own ads to keep up. **[**Can you help us keep up with the dark money pro-MAGA PACs flooding into this race by making a donation of $5 or more?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquU-upYfKbMaiFacMQ1owrS1t9qJQKW_NpihtdP09BWcE0XDglkhAtoFQ9W7wXvNuQuulBG4Q1-K8BSwfYuSWkrc2dTdZns07MklyDdr8PZURR0KCJuKXBms3s7cOPK1QDCbHcJv9Z_R6p-4s3F7hLrcFV0NemqpwZgzngI44ou8atDElC_pQqkYIolULM99nx7d-GxgXZhfwoNJwjVD0v--iN17g3dZ7-tuTenIIgU1u6qTvHkuBPVa-otr9k47yLomY8X2RF4pdG42CgDu92hw0mePKS6oi62YrI4Q9xc_tdGDlrIsrP4qbstPuyxW_XDsrsymiTVL9KUc-cMjut3NB_q0lg09qSvWzAr9_LTow/4da/gZWi95BUQlWK-5Ud1Tm_RA/h2/h001.ry4WoBmV9W85TnMlcF8xRW9yW2sJwsCu6w7shKPpeEU)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: This is actually unprecedented...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
#
Peter,
From administration to administration, there has always been partisan tension.
But there is one area where the parties have continued to set their differences aside and focus on what they can do together, in the interest of the entire country.
National Security.
That is not to say there has not been disagreement — there certainly has. And that is not to say this cooperation was always to our benefit — the Iraq War comes to mind. Nonetheless, congressional action on National Security has usually been approached in a good faith and bipartisan manner. Politics should stop at the water's edge.
That good faith and bipartisanship was shattered in the final two years of President Biden’s administration — when Tommy Tuberville blocked hundreds of senior flag officers from approval to their posts, and when the Republican conference at large stood by and enabled it. It did untold harm to our readiness, and it had a deep and negative impact on the Military at large. It was also a harbinger of things to come.
We’re seeing the next phase of this breakdown now — as Donald Trump has nominated Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense. Hegseth is the most unqualified, unserious, and outright dangerous nominee to this critical National Security position that we have ever seen. It is no exaggeration to say that this is truly unprecedented.
In past generations, Republicans would have balked at this nomination. Now, they are falling in line behind Trump’s pick.
As SECDEF, Hegseth intends to impose his radical far-right extremist agenda on the Military. He would enable the worst of Project 2025 — the purges of senior leadership deemed insufficiently loyal to Trump, their replacement with Trump fanatics, and the politicization of the force at large. And in his hearing on Tuesday, Hegseth would not commit to standing in the breach and opposing unconstitutional orders from Donald Trump.
This is about as bad as it gets.
VoteVets led the charge against Tuberville. Today, we are leading the charge against Hegseth. This is too important to ignore, and we need your help.
[**Please, if you’re in a position to contribute, make a donation to VoteVets as we work to spread the word about Pete Hegseth and prevent his confirmation as Secretary of Defense. It adds up fast when everyone is chipping in, and we’ll have more of an impact if we all come together.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.34Pqeh&refcode=em250119-1-120&t=1&akid=34094%2E3013755%2E7pw_ie)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.M8sTR_&refcode=em250119-1-120&t=20&akid=34094%2E3013755%2E7pw_ie)**
---
****
| **[Rush $25 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2935?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.49Iizk&refcode=em250119-1-120&t=21&akid=34094%2E3013755%2E7pw_ie)**
---
****
| | **[Rush $50 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2928?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.xwxeOZ&refcode=em250119-1-120&t=22&akid=34094%2E3013755%2E7pw_ie)**
---
****
| **[Rush $100 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2929?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.zEdHpx&refcode=em250119-1-120&t=23&akid=34094%2E3013755%2E7pw_ie)**
---
****

---
****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.Qk0j0F&refcode=em250119-1-120&t=25&akid=34094%2E3013755%2E7pw_ie)**

Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

name: Pat Herrity
subject: Herrity Headlines: Initial Weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Peter,

In the few short weeks since announcing my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, I've been overwhelmed by the outpouring of support from all across the Commonwealth.

My team and I have been putting in long hours every single day - working to earn the support of voters in every locality, from Southwest Virginia to the Northern Neck and everywhere in-between.

If you missed it, we kicked off the campaign on January 3rd with an announcement video that you can see here:

---
| [ ](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=eaf2a29e80&e=a1ea0f9c99)
---
|
Since releasing the video, I've spent the majority of my time on the road, traveling the Commonwealth to meet with voters, local leaders and elected officials at every opportunity.

>From visiting Virginia Beach the evening I announced, to traversing Southwest Virginia in the first week of the race - I'm committed to putting in the work we need to do to win in November. I've enjoyed time in Richmond, Harrisonburg, Roanoke, and even some of my home counties in Northern Virginia these first two weeks, and I'm looking forward to continuing to travel Virginia this year and for years to come.

As a member of the Board of Supervisors, I know how unique the issues facing every community can be. In my district, sometimes that's as granular as a traffic light or a snow removal issue affecting a single residential street.

My commitment on this campaign is to learn those issues at as local a level as possible. As your Lieutenant Governor, I won't just work to bring commonsense, conservative solutions to the Commonwealth - I'll work to find the solutions that benefit each and every unique community.

---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
As we've traveled the last few weeks, I've been honored to earn the support of current and former elected officials across Virginia, which we began releasing last week.

>From **Senator Bill Desteph** and **Mayor Bobby Dyer** in Virginia Beach, to **Supervisor Chuck Presley** in Tazewell and former **Supervisor Jeanine Lawson** in Prince William, leaders across Virginia agree that our mission in 2025 is to continue Governor Youngkin's commonsense, conservative leadership and that I am the best candidate to do so as our Lieutenant Governor.

---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
If you received this email as a forward, I'd love to have you sign up for Herrity's Headline to receive updates directly on my campaign:

---
| [Sign Up for Herrity's Headline](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=fdeae1e486&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Sign Up for Herrity's Headline")
---
|
**Last week we put out an announcement that my campaign raised over $200,000** from hundreds of donors across the Commonwealth in the first week of the campaign.

If you're fired up to support my candidacy, I'd be honored if you'd consider making a personal endorsement and a small contribution towards my campaign fund for the fight we have ahead:

---
| [Make a Contribution](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=7a6bd9a941&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Make a Contribution")
---
|
I'll see you soon on the campaign trail, and I hope I can count on your support to continue commonsense, conservative leadership in Richmond and secure a safe and affordable community for every Virginian!

Thank you,
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor
---
|
P.S. - please save the date of March 16th for my annual Saint Patrick's Day Celebration in Fairfax County! We'll feature an exciting special guest, and the opportunity to learn more and get involved with my campaign for Lieutenant Governor this year!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=419ae20544&e=a1ea0f9c99)
---
| | [](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=413b1c807c&e=a1ea0f9c99)
---
| | [](www.patforva.com)
---
| | Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2025 Friends of Pat Herrity, all rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Friends of Pat HerrityP.O Box 2863Springfield, VA 22152
[Add us to your address book](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=6bc8cb28bb) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=823194a417&t=b&e=a1ea0f9c99&c=6bc8cb28bb)

If you're fired up to support my candidacy, I'd be honored if you'd consider making a personal endorsement and a small contribution towards my campaign fund for the fight we have ahead: | "Make a Contribution" | I'll see you soon on the campaign trail, and I hope I can count on your support to continue commonsense, conservative leadership in Richmond and secure a safe and affordable community for every Virginian! Thank you, | | | Pat Herrity Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County Candidate for Lieutenant Governor | P.S. - please save the date of March 16th for my annual Saint Patrick's Day Celebration in Fairfax County! We'll feature an exciting special guest, and the opportunity to learn more and get involved with my campaign for Lieutenant Governor this year! | | | | | | | | | | | www.patforva.com | | Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity | | | Copyright © 2025 Friends of Pat Herrity, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Friends of Pat HerrityP.O Box 2863Springfield, VA 22152 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What difference does a future heaven make in our lives today?
body:
The difference heaven makes today
Imagine you’re planning a move to a new country
| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=023ebe3303674eb58eb3146891b83145&_e=F5evB5PkPE851MOK7lzealQx9FUA93oM0FVzSf_ZOL089X2qxlBjuKwPljvakAA7Nb9BR_qCu5Yqj5hIrvKLib57Bg1CU2ofvLWpVxrjrk5HCYRmFB_9G3SuSk-JgEpSsoCZ5wQcMTzt5U80RNyNvXX_edVTYvkoxMPelf3DkPr1xwjA8k2Uom1oBv_qoC4DugkRjr_7SRUE37DXNzxFSn703T2ninHcvpl2-olpRAtD93n3HdB--ot5ZsFw5tV2dsxFgBiR8QzHbBlWez8jF5KRY7ebKIW-TaHGx3YWuPuojz1otQ6_LPaiG1tXQDbvArCc7Ltw-dccxCbzcXScNLu0l4YwoPnkvSBCdbs-jHHug7Da4nbhQqyA-hdkzLW_enZHcb1mnv1BQCLoxR4oro_Sd23sJVai68PM-IoEIgk%3D)
---
Hello Friend,

Imagine you're planning a move to a new country--a faraway place you've never visited before. Wouldn't you want to know everything you could about it--what the culture is like, the language, the climate, and most importantly, how to get there? It would make a huge difference in how you prepare for the journey!

As Christians, we know that one day we will leave this world and be united with God in heaven. But surprisingly, many of us know very little about what awaits us in that incredible place.
---
| | In my book _A Place Called Heaven_ , I dive into Scripture to answer 10 surprising questions about heaven, including:

* Is heaven a real place or just a state of mind?
* Will we know our loved ones when we get there?
* Do people in heaven know what's happening on earth?
* What difference does a future heaven make in our lives today?

---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=023ebe3303674eb58eb3146891b83145&_e=F5evB5PkPE851MOK7lzealQx9FUA93oM0FVzSf_ZOL089X2qxlBjuKwPljvakAA7Nb9BR_qCu5Yqj5hIrvKLib57Bg1CU2ofvLWpVxrjrk5HCYRmFB_9G3SuSk-JgEpSsoCZ5wQcMTzt5U80RNyNvXX_edVTYvkoxMPelf3DkPr1xwjA8k2Uom1oBv_qoC4DugkRjr_7SRUE37DXNzxFSn703T2ninHcvpl2-olpRAtD93n3HdB--ot5ZsFw5tV2QbO0y62indvabFY4LDcGxSSrwWJ2Wijw6rYxS0NWFrVfx85E3ScWWQGRNAE0ypZLVFcV1zBqrcMF5HUZ-vYHzdks6FukHfYFtbIaheSckKbyk4jTPxHxemx1kp3TbINErZ0q73Y_WqbvAPsuW3Fa1xT7USoMFcUJ2gdHgLGL3Io%3D)
---
| | I know many of us have asked these questions at some point. Understanding what the Bible says about our eternal home doesn't just satisfy our curiosity--it transforms how we live today. By shifting our focus from the temporary struggles of this life to the eternal glory that awaits us, we can live with greater hope, purpose, and peace.

To thank you for your generous gift to _Pathway to Victory_ today, I'd love to send you a copy of _A Place Called Heaven_ , [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=023ebe3303674eb58eb3146891b83145&_e=F5evB5PkPE851MOK7lzealQx9FUA93oM0FVzSf_ZOL089X2qxlBjuKwPljvakAA7Nb9BR_qCu5Yqj5hIrvKLib57Bg1CU2ofvLWpVxrjrk5HCYRmFB_9G3SuSk-JgEpSsoCZ5wQcMTzt5U80RNyNvXX_edVTYvkoxMPelf3DkPr1xwjA8k2Uom1oBv_qoC4DugkRjr_7SRUE37DXNzxFSn703T2ninHcvpl2-olpRAtD93n3HdB--ot5ZsFw5tV2Fi_67viHtQPU6M7qbbS_kpLN33Dg2pKeM6UoTf4Z2p4OhplzUNbGGDHWErowWNu9TLzOOBVMPGpUwo18tgfkM_xj3IpaEDZdhmn3CN0WQ88p9GYDaac2DWn-TYYrYPfSYpw5JffSyB7DiGcrJAzOL7K4hK50jjvca0ctiB0p9Wc%3D)

I hope this book will give you a clearer picture of the future God has prepared for you and help you live each day with eternity in mind.

Thank you for your continued support, which helps us spread the gospel of Jesus Christ to a world in need of hope.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - For your gift of $75 or more, we'll send you _A Place Called Heaven_ , the beautiful gift book _Encouragement from A Place Called Heaven_ , our exclusive ministry brochure, and the companion message series on DVD and MP3 audio. Click here to get a copy of this spiritually uplifting bundle: [https://secure.ptv.org/encouragement-from-a-place-called-heaven-large-kit-1](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=023ebe3303674eb58eb3146891b83145&_e=F5evB5PkPE851MOK7lzeapI51LBAPsrYBQKkzOnfWcYwzKZXeZQ2EN0ZRqfbmaGhNFHuY_QMTmsRdHQIMWZ_JSf4TtyGb93WZLpWlNL9Ad8Aec41HrUHLW70IIrT-V8P_GzVPjHQV3N0B-It6ymaxutleQDzzvVkupJ_Bikg5Va_0xHVjC9uDzBBzxhw_P6LJf2audjVitQljrV_zDcZJgQ0zdm_CZNS4bILQ2vE6Sv_6raeu0r-V1g7tkoSVuNj2YHxoAwOp8qjF4pvkPoGiO_VXNlrO5aHMI7TLG3OtXDqczUv5MSD7MhemrQZT6IF9kMsimmpZWsxYM2yYw_QpsLEOtE16AoYFkZlPl_iabX1Yu1CW3Sk4L04ufIIb_ax7h5gTc7S8sQYHz7h23_HXFy-xJudz2tNxkTEbr6rOYI%3D)

[Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=023ebe3303674eb58eb3146891b83145&_t=Su0OhyCBMNAm5VbccDE3CKJovzyrQ7KSHBRs8XOwEJhI8pIWbPLxYWYelbPpVvtUz6wyCB75P5sHoXvZanBGRh0O7hoNpgvwMaowsYT6z0ZdJZFkRprm2ZXhXk0S1dH1)

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.
It's a voice America needs
| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=161f5a9e43c9407a8dc6cb51c2d55774&_e=LBosM0GmeajWRTaSlU3Q8TiYycBexIiPNzWp2WO0-yf33kxH_RyFSb5LktKxHAGRwWQw2sFL99iIJwRdlbVryFOWP1BukvzFhWQg8HrMspN1IhTDD0casZRXcOT3GgfUeC0J1fGgXwcsU1UEp7PQ9miuZcLEQoPRVoc3LFiJTy896sEI65gRK-RwoGj-D_ABm7EynQsVsxLvWk8JoftcUuyFVCiTe-AlsKDMMygcd3KlSo5xBrVAQFTgvNycotnVKUnXX1_weqKmnaMchN3p2dOgSp-7kUOBRN_dYOuYv3gNeAaF-1ldRgwjZ-nhK3Z-p0kZnuX-4g3slG65Xi5Lz6sWYmHQn4ARMyeQl-UGzlyVOKeTfE63S6WCXh5s4vNk52ngtWX0xiO9gn2KSQZnFg%3D%3D)

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Peter,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=161f5a9e43c9407a8dc6cb51c2d55774&_e=LBosM0GmeajWRTaSlU3Q8TiYycBexIiPNzWp2WO0-yf33kxH_RyFSb5LktKxHAGRwWQw2sFL99iIJwRdlbVryFOWP1BukvzFhWQg8HrMspN1IhTDD0casZRXcOT3GgfUeC0J1fGgXwcsU1UEp7PQ9miuZcLEQoPRVoc3LFiJTy896sEI65gRK-RwoGj-D_ABm7EynQsVsxLvWk8JoftcUuyFVCiTe-AlsKDMMygcd3L5PeskTzdj4flrU9oy1NXndd4cp5-o_xMHc4TiSlfgGflpEHN4-ixbW9OXwtA1jxiQAng7ApdntNavoccRnP90KfaPqaiTRef6Q2MEovBLcspS9cXSpdhDMhTrZ-sUXIu6XQ3y92pOF_pP1-8bYrTmGQzsDfbPXaqgpkeI_uh-mQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs.
---

name: Trump Watch (via DLCC.org)
subject: Grassroots Democrats in your state and across the country are stepping up – will you join them?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
It’s more important than ever for Democrats to stick together. If we don’t act now, it’s a real possibility that we lose ground to Trump’s state Republican allies in upcoming special elections. | | |
---
| |
---|---
This evening, Trump took the stage in D.C. for his pre-inaugural rally. This rally will rile up his far-right base and could raise Trump and his allies _millions_. name: AOC
subject: TikTok & Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Every mass social media platform in the U.S. has been taken over by the right wing.
#
There's another development, and I want to show you this.
Now, if you log on to TikTok, you'll see this:
“Welcome back! Thanks for your patience and support. _As a result of President Trump's efforts, TikTok is back in the U.S.!_ ”
First of all, **Donald Trump is not president right now**.
He's a private citizen. He does not have access to presidential powers. He does not have the ability to do any of that.
Please understand that TikTok's decision to name Trump in the notification is a choice. **They are signaling that they have agreed to privately collaborate with Donald Trump and the Trump administration**.
For all of those concerns that people were saying that TikTok is gonna be used as a propaganda tool by the Chinese, understand **they're using it as a propaganda tool for the right**.
Now, I want you all to put all the pieces together because what **this effectively means is that every mass social media platform in the United States has been taken over by the right wing** , with the exception of Blue Sky (but Blue Sky is still very small, relatively).
So when I say put the pieces together:
Elon Musk took over Twitter, and there's open reporting that **they have artificially manipulated the algorithms to boost right-wing content on X** and to amplify harassment.
**Then you have Meta**. You have Mark Zuckerberg saying that they're basically also bending the knee to Trump with their changes to fact checking, regardless of how effective that was in the first place.
**Now TikTok** is now saying, “Hey, we are agreeing we will use our push notification system for _all 170 million American users_ to promote Donald Trump.”
Just understand that government announcements like this with companies, they never name politicians — they will usually name law or policy. TikTok is making an explicit agreement to do this.
And if I were a betting person: they probably are making a deal with Donald Trump to not just use these push notifications — they probably would consider algorithmic changes. Which is ironic because at the time when people voted for the TikTok ban, because there was a lot of pro-Palestinian content, that argument was being used as being somehow “anti-American,” which, you know — I guess supporting human rights is somehow bad.
**So what does this mean for us?**
We are on the eve of an authoritarian administration. **This is what 21st century fascism is starting to look like**. Republicans model themselves after Viktor Orbán’s Hungary. You can look to Hungary to get a taste of how they will try to control media and companies in the United States. This is a kind of entrée to that.
As far as **what we do** :
This is a time of experimentation. A lot of people can and will still use platforms, but I also **look towards places where you have more ownership and develop your audiences there** — like Blue Sky.
More soon,
Alexandria

Unlike every social media platform in this country, our movement for a better world takes no money from right-wing billionaires.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250119-2.r98vZd&refcode=em20250119-7945-P_ENG_CTR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7945%2E2526796%2EimujHt)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250119-2.r98vZd&refcode=em20250119-7945-P_ENG_CTR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7945%2E2526796%2EimujHt)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250119-2?refcode=em20250119-7945-P_ENG_CTR_LEG&t=21&refcode2=7945_2526796_imujHt&akid=7945%2E2526796%2EimujHt)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250119-7945-P_ENG_CTR_LEG&t=22&akid=7945%2E2526796%2EimujHt)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=7945%2E2526796%2EimujHt) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=7945%2E2526796%2EimujHt) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=7945%2E2526796%2EimujHt)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

body:
The Democrats aren’t playing with kid gloves in these Special Elections. As of right now, this is their LAST CHANCE to take power and they won’t waste a second to start banking votes.
If we lose even one of these Special Elections we could be looking at a TOTAL COLLAPSE of our House Majority!
| |
---
| | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=259738a281ce4d32be1e9f19da66a5a7&_e=ovvR7oVdZ1r6qydQYbZWdpeE7Aq7RF50Ldh37tp7OJKDq0VDpUW_tRzMxnmIkOXKa_jGUNQCj-d6dDbAiS8rwUjdVPWAsrPkOBBXBKG7CtRxCwYUow2Ez0bftwBUgVDf4ylrRwvR0ppGrln77kBDprms-05mf0YPotfLMVWLgfAMjbgSEAkVluHqDIduMobdivKR1TJGV2T7OkkgxaaumfsXuGsRVQTT1AzIti9bA2ym3j36SXhevFauDY6cpm3hahI0WNydKK3Zb5llG5H5iqmyHqxzY4PyPOHz6SFKmy2W-D4fRNy8L8oxhmhOzeB8pt3MXt6QC1lkdCEScb7aFZPjRNTvmy9J_r5CiUMtFn6cUUJ5xNH-lKHMT9mnNU9BAryXdgxOhI6GBh28GDSHUQ%3D%3D "Special Elections")
It's official, Friend:

**Early voting is about to begin in the all-important Special Elections in FL-06 and FL-01!**

The Democrats aren't playing with kid gloves in these Special Elections. As of right now, this is their LAST CHANCE to take power and they won't waste a second to start banking votes.

**_[That's why we need your help right now.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=259738a281ce4d32be1e9f19da66a5a7&_e=ovvR7oVdZ1r6qydQYbZWdpeE7Aq7RF50Ldh37tp7OJKDq0VDpUW_tRzMxnmIkOXKa_jGUNQCj-d6dDbAiS8rwUjdVPWAsrPkOBBXBKG7CtRxCwYUow2Ez0bftwBUgVDf4ylrRwvR0ppGrln77kBDprms-05mf0YPotfLMVWLgfAMjbgSEAkVluHqDIduMobdivKR1TJGV2T7OkkgxaaumfsXuGsRVQTT1AzIti9bA2yh4XsVCahZayfcUrnln_uFiy582_R-dr6Z2omAND0CD_iVjPT9_LlyU0uWDa-dKKziiEjFwYhHxz9mPgTLZ43JSxnc50NF4E5140uDeDNcGQxgNbj8ZGCyKto2IcblA0W-yPWG8-c17STifikAIerYIO84MXJAC3lVtFxwxxrxKQ%3D%3D "That’s why we need your help right now. ")_**

Majority Leader Scalise set a goal of raising $500,000 before early voting ends to help win BOTH Special Elections and save our House Majority!

The first votes will be cast next week and we need your help to make sure an America First Patriot wins:
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=259738a281ce4d32be1e9f19da66a5a7&_e=ovvR7oVdZ1r6qydQYbZWdpeE7Aq7RF50Ldh37tp7OJKDq0VDpUW_tRzMxnmIkOXKa_jGUNQCj-d6dDbAiS8rwUjdVPWAsrPkOBBXBKG7CtRxCwYUow2Ez0bftwBUgVDf4ylrRwvR0ppGrln77kBDprms-05mf0YPotfLMVWLgfAMjbgSEAkVluHqDIduMobdivKR1TJGV2T7OkkgxaaumfsXuGsRVQTT1AzIti9bA2ydJlxgSzr7BMsKjKAXMb3uFQgNgdIckwY-nwvRnYnF8bzNhoanC0v6zuAj1fAZXHEqLzsb1cJYTQSlZ5u3EfvdjOb-poaRgtnpKVj7NiGBak88oct9-u0HTeh3vcp-fCeUIYHkFvLWXuzhdTcjzFbGCHBMby4jgqhDLvwAhjUsZA%3D%3D "PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---

To put this in perspective, Republicans only control the House Majority by a hair. And if we lose these Special Elections, we could be looking at a TOTAL COLLAPSE of our House Majority.

This means we have no choice but to mobilize our entire Conservative grassroots network.

Friend, we need your support right now. This could be the make-or-break for saving our Republican Trifecta. **_[So please consider contributing what you can today.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=259738a281ce4d32be1e9f19da66a5a7&_e=ovvR7oVdZ1r6qydQYbZWdpeE7Aq7RF50Ldh37tp7OJKDq0VDpUW_tRzMxnmIkOXKa_jGUNQCj-d6dDbAiS8rwUjdVPWAsrPkOBBXBKG7CtRxCwYUow2Ez0bftwBUgVDf4ylrRwvR0ppGrln77kBDprms-05mf0YPotfLMVWLgfAMjbgSEAkVluHqDIduMobdivKR1TJGV2T7OkkgxaaumfsXuGsRVQTT1AzIti9bA2yDaJQZ4SCZ2I-2FHEgbpAP6bsRtx3OIass9LQ4QTvrlBh03DtLAbub2bFlTPI4SQKJgqsy5CxPpE1seYEkKZ-DcSekrXWj8NhUHgg57NKpwGquXadGUOvqc8m0PNgOmsVL45rPzpIexctTURVpFGdCNNIp5SoudSBdNe6HqIwO8g%3D%3D "So please consider contributing what you can today. ")_**
| [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=259738a281ce4d32be1e9f19da66a5a7&_e=ovvR7oVdZ1r6qydQYbZWdpeE7Aq7RF50Ldh37tp7OJKDq0VDpUW_tRzMxnmIkOXKa_jGUNQCj-d6dDbAiS8rwUjdVPWAsrPkOBBXBKG7CtRxCwYUow2Ez0bftwBUgVDf4ylrRwvR0ppGrln77kBDprms-05mf0YPotfLMVWLgfAMjbgSEAkVluHqDIduMobdivKR1TJGV2T7OkkgxaaumfsXuGsRVQTT1AzIti9bA2ycbNnp1iww_uhg5SjItp9vq1fn1X0ErXdLAItRUaAFocn8XgyiY0JlLlPQkBj8IsOOyZQKe9E-p-lPDxODkcAhDljJIcpGLZ6UpPr9J9O3nXP4ccZrdaMUQu85JGdsOSaegd2wx4P2cAVWPqUwIH55aak9uq4RJmpIt6zw3X3Xcw%3D%3D "PLEASE DONATE NOW")

_Every single dollar makes a difference. We mean that._

Thank you,
House GOP

And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=259738a281ce4d32be1e9f19da66a5a7&_e=ovvR7oVdZ1r6qydQYbZWdpeE7Aq7RF50Ldh37tp7OJJyxvROEmxk33t1gtd05x2kkVQ4_HQbEo-VkxrW4jaNwd-bKyfsVBI-mP8D2ymSixsnVkumihHwlz-84ekMTvMuc7gbEjGYbWCOWK8q5DBX-yCHIUl8IaGDHQOwq5HPzEZ-50jCxky4HShXtK_Jnxhjn6ajF8pZMdt7VyE4pI1Bb94dU1W-zUTlDiNsB7sSWA9usG-GWD9hhplthebzXZQyzhH9Ep6rG1Wm5o_QjDQQT29cXbm-ztFDO0pKR6d282ZjxVkSdGX1skGD6_khBxqEqwO5f7-HQudX6pw3IaxhHC9X42WVVD4htpSZ8mcydbaHsY58dmo5HXHtJTqW6-GLyfzwFlPYmxqvvR12ryif_pva4u1XT-dqQgFdmEFcZEw%3D "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

body:
